peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Emporio Armani Stronger With You Intensely

reviews.name: bogusgogus
reviews.comment: Smells like a bold, sweet lemon cake and I mean that in the best way. Absolutely love this scent; there’s something incredibly alluring in how literal and synthetic it is. I would give this 9/10 because my all-time favourite from this brand is miere de viespi which smells mostly of wasp wax (limited edition for polish niche fragrance store) and Katz!

reviews.name: Fushang_
reviews.comment: Sa di crostata al limone, alcuni sentono un po' di pandoro. Per me è crostata al limone al 100%

reviews.name: zvvf
reviews.comment: Reminds me of the lemon-y Girl Scout cookies they sell in the us

title: Citrus Reverie Skylar perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2024
description: Citrus Reverie by Skylar is a fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Reverie was launched in 2024. Top notes are Pineapple, Rangpur, Blood Orange and Mandarin; middle notes are Orange, Freesia and Rose Water; base notes are Cedarwood, Amber and Musk. Citrus Reverie is a fruity Eau de Parfum launched by Skylar in 2024. It features top notes of Rangpur Mandarin, Blood Orange, and Pink Pineapple; a heart of Rose Water, Orange Flower, and Freesia; and a base of Amber, Cedarwood, and Musk. As a clean fragrance, it is hypoallergenic, safe for sensitive skin, vegan, and cruelty-free.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: I Don't Need A Prince By My Side To Be A Princess

reviews.name: Evie43/
reviews.comment: This is a super juicy shampoo-ey citrus fragrance. I love the mandarin notes in this and find it layers well with lactonic fragrances as it gives a creamsicle effect! A favorite of mine, though certainly lacks complexity of niche fragrances.

reviews.name: IsobelWren
reviews.comment: Garnier fructis shampoo

reviews.name: alexatb
reviews.comment: Smells like a childhood hair de-tangler. Love it! But wouldn't wear other than right out of the shower in the summer.

reviews.name: blithemrchvn
reviews.comment: Surprisingly long lasting and strong for a citrus fragrance. Something about this is very nostalgic; it reminds me of the coral craze from 2013. Something that your favorite Disney Channel girl would wear.

reviews.name: Juicyvine
reviews.comment: WTH is this?? I had a literal visceral reaction to this - crinkled up nose revulsion... This smells so unlike the citrus melody I was hoping for, that's so easy to do being a "natural" company! Come on.... I LOVE the pure essential oil smells of citrus fruits and this smelled like cheap tropical carpet cleaner from a dollar store 😭🤢

reviews.name: shelbybell3
reviews.comment: It's nice enough, but reminds me of a Glade plug-in.

reviews.name: ceilige
reviews.comment: Fun, pineapple-y, poolside scent. The wood and amber notes keep it from smelling overly sharp or sweet, but it stays true to its fruity concept. It evokes a nostalgia for Summer vacations past.

reviews.name: tabithaclancy.1
reviews.comment: This reminds me of something I wore in the late 90s/early 2000s, one of the really popular body sprays. I can't nail down which one exactly it reminds me of but definitely a calgon or bbw scent from back in the day. It's got a cleaner more simple scent profile but I still really enjoy it.

reviews.name: gory-rilmore
reviews.comment: This is freshly shampooed hair after a day of playing mermaids. It's an absolute delight but it's so juvenile and hyperfeminine it gives more body-spray-in-my-middle-school-locker vibes than signure-scent-at-30 vibes.

reviews.name: articia_4
reviews.comment: I LOVE this scent. It's fresh and sweet wihtout being to flowery or feminine. It's soft, but grounded by the cedarwood. Truly a unisex fragrance. The only downside is the sillage. I want it to be a BIT stronger, but it is quite intimate.

reviews.name: kitkat_69
reviews.comment: These perfumes never ever last for me, projection sucks too. I feel like this one will be no different

title: Citrusy Magnolia Angel Schlesser perfume - a fragrance for women 2024
description: Citrusy Magnolia by Angel Schlesser is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women. Citrusy Magnolia was launched in 2024. The nose behind this fragrance is Nathalie Lorson. Top notes are Italian Lemon, Cassis and Salt; middle notes are Magnolia, Orange Blossom and Helvetolide; base notes are Ambergris, Virginian Cedar and Sandalwood. Citrusy Magnolia tells the story of a determined and self-confident woman with a minimalist yet original style. There is a light in her eyes that reveals her free, creative, and independent soul. Her fragrance? Pleasantly unconventional, it is introduced by the vibrancy of cassis, the freshness of Italian Lemon, and the delicacy of Himalayan Salt. The rich heart notes include Grandiflora Magnolia and Orange Blossom, joined by Helvetolide. The latter, a guest star of the composition, is an odorous molecule of synthesis characterized by its particular persistence. Closing the circle of this unique composition is the roundness of Orientalgris and the sensuality of Sandalwood and Virginia Cedarwood.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo - Fico di Amalfi

reviews.name: toosimilar
reviews.comment: Such a beautiful scent, really! Anyone can pull it out! Light, girly, vibrant and bright! It resembles a lot of things yet is unique I'd personally wear it in the summer! :)

reviews.name: scythia
reviews.comment: I love this smell and it's a shame it doesn't last long on me. I get a very brief, tangy lemon in the opening. Outdoors, in a Mediterranean winter, this leans into simple fresh florals, which I find a bit boring. Indoors is where this scent really shines. Flower notes blend beautifully with salt and spice and make for a complex and dimensional smell. Some sweetness is present, but it is balanced and not overpowering. Too bad this only lasts 1-2h on me, and no travel size is available for easy reapplications.

title: Citrus Marine Dossier cologne - a fragrance for men 2023
description: Citrus Marine by Dossier is a Aromatic Aquatic fragrance for men. Citrus Marine was launched in 2023. Top notes are Grapefruit, Mandarin and Citrus; middle notes are Marine notes, Black Pepper and Juniper; base notes are Amberwood, Oakmoss and Incense. A genderfluid fragrance inspired by Dolce & Gabbana's Light Blue Masculine, capturing the essence of a Mediterranean summer with citrus top notes, marine and spicy heart accords, and a woody-ambery base. The composition emphasizes long-lasting freshness and energizing qualities, featuring zesty citrus paired with dry woody elements.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Light Blue Eau Intense Pour Homme

reviews.name: C.R. Aguilar
reviews.comment: Smells like bacon. I seriously have it a hard 24 full hour shot. No I had to return to Walmart. You get what you pay for. I returned all my Dossier. Im done with this brand.

reviews.name: mkpunk
reviews.comment: Dossier Citrus Marine is 100% a Light Blue Pour Homme clone. It is nearly one to one unlike other smell alike fragrance namely Aqua Frost and To Be Good Vibes. There are quite a few Light Blues this smells like this too. That said the appeal of original in light of the reformulation and release is enough to get this dupe. Citrus Marine opens with the citrus cocktail with marine undertones from the mid of Light Blue Pour Homme. The mid is marine and pepper. The base is amber, and some incense with a musk like smell. Citrus Marine works for similar situations to Light Blue Pour Homme which is casual and dates during spring and summer. It lasts in between Light Blue Pour Homme and Light Blue Pour Homme Eau Intense. Citrus Marine is just about Light Blue Pour Homme classic. If you want it and need to seek a dupe, this is worth a buy.

title: Citrus Grandis Chris Collins perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Citrus Grandis by Chris Collins is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Grandis was launched in 2022. The nose behind this fragrance is Nathalie Feisthauer. Top notes are Yuzu, Citron and Pomelo; middle notes are Verbena and Black Currant; base notes are Vetiver, Sandalwood, Musk, Incense, Cedar and elemi. Bright and radiant, pomelo and citrus notes accentuate the wearer’s natural charisma. Sharp, herbaceous verbena and earthy woods ground the scent and project confidence and maturity. This fragrance is as serious and as playful as you are.

reviews.name: lyma6
reviews.comment: I am generally not one for citrus-dominant fragrances, but wow, this is the elevated, grown up version of Gap Dream I did not know I was waiting for. Here, the scent is brighter, more photorealistic, less muddy, and less astringent. The notes are more distinct. I could tell from the opening — I got the sensation of being squirted by citrus when attempting to peel its rind. There is not freesia listed here, but I detect something like freesia. I paired this with Tropica by Maya Njie, and the effect was a tart tropical spectacle. Loved it!

reviews.name: Henchman21
reviews.comment: Like some people who reviewed this fragrance, I got it in the Chris Collins sample set from Sephora. I hadn't even heard of this one, so I looked at the notes and it sounded promising. I was anticipating a complex array of citrus with some green facets from the verbena, with a nice earthy backbone. But all I get is a generic citrus aroma and green tea. It's not bad by any means, just underwhelming. The performance, however, is what really bothers me. I get, at best, 3 hours with maybe a few inches of projection. Overall, I'd say I liked this the least out the sample set. Again, the scent itself is pretty nice, it's just not as nuanced as I hoped, and its performance isn't that good.

reviews.name: Liohila
reviews.comment: Got this in the Chris Collins Sephora sampler. For me most citrus scents end up smelling like Pinesol (Light Blue is screeching chemical cleaner on my skin) but this one surprised me. Initial spray was like jumping into a bowl of fresh cut citrus: bright and sunny. I got worried as it started to dry down going through a cleaning spray to baby powder phase. Finally I was left with clean linen/laundry detergent. It's giving "I just finished spring cleaning and now I'm outside gathering the sun-dried laundry from the line". It's been hours and I'm still catching whiffs but it's been exceptionally close to my skin the entire time. Inoffensive, spring office wear. Won't buy a bottle at the moment but will test again when the weather warms up to see if anything's changed.

reviews.name: goodchat
reviews.comment: Whoa, the first spray of this triggered a scent memory of Gap's So Pink, that I completely forgot about but used to wear as a kid. Unfortunately however, Citrus Grandis is not for me. I get a heavy neroli (or is that pomelo? I'm not sure tbh) which does not vibe with my skin chemistry. Immediate scrubber for me.

reviews.name: OTA Mom
reviews.comment: Mostly pomelo to me, softened by a bit of lemon blossom. Clean and mass appealing.

reviews.name: aweso10
reviews.comment: a super solar citrus- heavy on the pomelo and with a good dose of musk. not very long-lasting, maybe 1-3 hrs, but lovely as a spring-summer scent if you don't mind reapplying! the soft, sunny character makes it super wearable and melds into the skin, but the more zesty yuzu notes die out pretty quickly and transition into a creamy musk/sandalwood.

reviews.name: AMajeedQT
reviews.comment: This review will be harsh but bear in mind I like Citrus Grandis. I've tried about all of Chris Collins' offerings and there is one general conclusion to make: they are designer scents with niche packaging and pricing! Take Citrus Grandis (CG) for example. This is your classic 4711 cologne that was cloned and twisted numerous times. That same herbal-green, fresh, citrusy scent, with a touch of white flowers, reminiscent of barbershops. Here in CG, it is softer and sweeter, which I like. But with below-average performance. Just look at the performance and price ratings above. I prefer CG to the original. The neroli is usually too sharp and herbal in the other iteration of this scent. However, at $175 per 100ml bottle, I can not recommend CG. You are better off with Ferrari Bright Neroli, the original 4711, or Bvlgari Man Wood Neroli, or any other decently priced release. Nice scent, weak performance, severely overpriced. "OK".

reviews.name: twiztidladii
reviews.comment: Citrus & Verbena together are a no for me. Should’ve learned not to try any again after PureDKNY

reviews.name: bugsyiii
reviews.comment: Huge fan of lemon, in fact that is why I have a bottle of The Art of Shaving-Lemon that I absolutely love. Notes: pomelo, yuzu, cedrat, blackcurrant, verbena, cedarwood, vetiver, sandalwood, elemi, incense, & musk. What I get is Verbena, cedrat, elemi, and vetiver; this fragrance is a fresh lemon beauty. I don't get alot of woods, but I can see where that could be in the scent breakdown, the cedar that is. After the initial spray, you are left with a fresh, citrus, linen type fragrance that envelops the skin and invigorates the space around you. To me, there isn't a lot of movement in this fragrance, and that's not a bad thing. I love the fact that this fragrance is very linear which add an element of mystic to it. Performance is great, longevity is slightly above average, and sillage is decent. Is this a compliment getter, not sure as my wife liked it but it wasn't something she would swoon over. In fact, she referenced The Art of Shaving-Lemon right away when she smelled this one. Overall, not necessarily unique, but a nice fragrance, nonetheless.

reviews.name: Lakreutter
reviews.comment: I got this in the sample set and of the 4 I smelled this is the most beautiful and literally the only one that didn’t contain a divisive note such as patchouli or incense. The others were revolting to me and I don’t understand some of the glowing reviews. Danes Sauvage was a patchouli bomb that smelled like BO because of the mix of patchouli and spices, Harlem Nights smelled like what I imagine a barbershop quartet to smell like - old fashioned cologne and aftershave, and Long Kiss Goodnight was sour, bitter rose and smoky, mouldering wood- nothing like “a romantic embrace”- I’d rather embrace a corpse than someone wearing that. Citrus Grandis smells like a freshly brewed cup of expensive Earl Grey tea with a whisper of black currant. It’s not unique or innovative, but it’s light, fresh and pretty. If this was priced under $100 I’d buy a full bottle in a heartbeat. At $175 that’s ludicrous and not worth it, but this entire brand is ridiculously overpriced

reviews.name: KaliDurga
reviews.comment: This is an extremely lovely linear citrus fragrance that leans masculine but is unisex. I would love to smell this on my man. Unfortunately, it doesn't last and it a little stronger than a skin scent.

reviews.name: C.Francisque27
reviews.comment: Of the three fragrances in his Anima collection, this is my least favourite. It's not that it's bad, it's just nothing special. Lost in Paradise and Long Kiss Goodnight set the bar so high, and this one falls short. It's a very citrusy fragrance, as the name suggests however, it lacks a depth and a punch to make it stand out amongst the many citrus-based summertime fragrances out there. The citrus to me is very dull and leans to the sweet side, almost like smelling Tang beverage crystals. The projection, silage, and longevity with this fragrance are also lacking, whereas the other two excel in those areas. Of the three, this one got me no compliments or even commentary to ask what I was wearing. I will be purchasing a full bottle of the other two for next summer, however.

title: Citrus Garden Perfumérica perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Garden by Perfumérica is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Garden was launched in 2025. Top notes are Grapefruit, Mandarin, Bergamot and Ginger; middle notes are White Rose, Violet Leaf and Raspberry; base notes are Musk, Amber, Sandalwood and Moss.

reviews.name: Aldo_alo
reviews.comment: Tiene una salida bastante rica muy agradable a la nariz un limón bastante brillante y jugoso (entre ácido y dulce), después una rosa bastante notoria y atacada. Un sándalo muy suave. Perfecto para este calorcito. Estaría perfecto si durará mucho más tiempo. Unas 2 hrs si acaso, y hasta más de 4 al raz de la piel. 10/10.

title: Citrus and Mint Leaf Cremo perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2020
description: Citrus and Mint Leaf by Cremo is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus and Mint Leaf was launched in 2020. The fragrance features Citron, Mint, Cedar and Moss.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Gentleman Eau de Parfum Reserve Privée

reviews.name: Vic_has_a_nose
reviews.comment: This is the review for the shower gel: I decided to write this review in case it helps somebody. This shower gel EXCEEDED my expectations greatly! The best part is that it was a random purchase as well. I threw this one in with another shower gel that I was buying in an online store. And Cremo was pricy (15 eur but I got it for 12 with a discount), since it's an imported product from the States. But I watched many reviews on it and really wanted to try. How it smells and feels? Imagine it's a spring morning. You just finished your morning run in a forest. And now you're walking on a path lit by the sun. You can smell coniferous trees, moss, and green vegetation that is just starting to awake. Suddenly, you stumble upon a clear forest lake. You decide to jump in to cool off. The water is chilly and refreshing. Now you feel very clean, refreshed and energized. All the scents of the pine forest mix into a wonderful symphony. How it performs? The lather is very rich and the scent lingers all the way through your shower session and it sticks to your body. It feels luxurious. Personally I'm very picky with my body washes and I hate the feeling of products that are difficult to rinse off. I don't want to feel anything on my skin after I shower, yet I don't want it to be super dry either. This body wash does it perfectly! It leaves your skin clean, moisturized and doesn't leave any residue! And you don't need a lot for the scent to stick and be noticable. Conclusion. This is an amazing body wash! It is a perfect balance between being natural and perfumed. And trust me, I tried a lot of different products. The ones that claim to be natural smell like grass or vegetation - it's boring and gets old pretty fast. On the other hand, typical "men's" body washes smell very synthetic and use some super strong fragrances. For me this is probably my new favourite shower gel. Now I want to get the fragrance as well. I feel like it would definitely amplify your scent bubble and would make it last longer. Wow, I've never written such a long review for anything at all. It just shows how pleasantly surprised I was by this purchase!

reviews.name: timmyc.13
reviews.comment: For the price you should just buy a different fragrance, like 9pm for about 9 more dollars. This smells cheap and to me is just offensive. I get no mint notes, only this cheap citrus smell. Do not recommend.

reviews.name: ShadowsofLight
reviews.comment: This is ok, but I had higher hopes for it. My husband finally tested it tonight. It's a really pleasant, sweet citrus. Indistinct, but more on the orangey side. It's uplifiting, and would work best on hot days (no surprises there). The mint is ok, but quite frankly, I've smelled better mints from natural products at the Farmers' Market. I've also screwed around and made more interesting blends with merely essential oils. There's a slight woody undertone that gives this just a little more body than it would have otherwise, but not enough IMO. It smells thin, unfinished, and lacks depth. It's fine, it smells nice on him, but there's a market saturated with fresh cheapies that have more character. This is slightly more masculine, but not by much. It's kind of an "everybody" scent (I believe anything can be, but I'm generalizing for the sake of review).

reviews.name: MS10
reviews.comment: I think this fragrance is really just OK. I mean for 20 bucks it Is actually pretty good but I would not get it over any designer fragrances. And by the way, Cremo citrus and mint leaf and Cremo iced citron and driftwood are literally the same juice in a different bottle. Do NOT get both. Get one or the other. I tested 20 people about which one Is better and all 20 stayed the smelt the exact same.

reviews.name: Ben57
reviews.comment: I’ve had my fair share of cheap fresh sents. The go to in that category by many is (nautical voyage.) However this is 1000x better in my opinion if you need a cheap out of the shower gym sent for $20. This fragrance is extremely simple in nature yet it’s kind of unique. I’ve gotten multiple compliments when wearing this and for $20 it’s a fantastic grab and go gym sent or maybe a quick going out to get groceries sent were u don’t need to think about it. I’d also like to add it has the same “vibe” at Torino 21 by Xerjoff. Not saying it’s the same at all but it’s a non synthetic smelling herb sent.

reviews.name: MarkoPeeko
reviews.comment: Decent little cheapie for throwing on to walk the dogs or mooch about the house for an hour or two. That’s about the extent of the longevity. For the price, it’s not a bad wear. Good on a hot or humid day. You’ll need a good 10-15 sprays to get some projection and longevity. I ripped through a bottle in under 4 weeks.

reviews.name: Piggy41510
reviews.comment: I have been wearing this fragrance for a few years now and it's a decent go to fragrance that I use when I run errands on the weekends and especially when I go to work. I live in California so our weather is pretty nice all year long for the most part. I've layered this fragrance with Dior Sauvage and it's amazing to me, but don't get me wrong cremo is decent on its own! And I get an easy 6 to 8 hours of longevity on my skin. The price point is unbelievable for what your getting and I strongly recommend this for a everyday freshy fragrance .

reviews.name: Bear Claws
reviews.comment: The more I smelled this the more I hate it, it smells ok or at least tolerable for the first 2 minutes with initial burst but very quickly just turns into old school dads barber shop aftershave, its reeks of stuff that was made many decades ago. In general CREMO fragrances feel more like aftershaves at best that anything else, just lacks the basics you would expect in a fragrance, none of them are worth investment even at lower price point. I do however enjoy CREMO body washes.

reviews.name: JusttheFactsMan
reviews.comment: #82 in my "Tour de Fragrance" of 250 scents in 250 days, and another of the "30 under $30" that's a great scent at a bargain price. It's a bit reminiscent of Jimmy Choo Ice, also a very citrus freshie, but not as much toward the lemonade side as Jimmy Choo thanks to the mint, and less than half the price. You can't go wrong with this as a blind buy. This will probably be my go-to throughout the Summer.

reviews.name: JoeN12345
reviews.comment: actually really nice for the price. the first two minutes are very alcoholic which makes sense because this is a 20 dollar fragrance, but after that it becomes a clean, bitter sweet citron with a nice sum of mint, aswell as some moss. i find that this moss is a bit "weird" smelling. overall great value, good for spring, summer, and august. as Steve907 mentions, i aswell get an anisey/black licorecy note at the 15 minute mark, but its not overwhelming, rather i think that it is just a result of the bitter sweetness of the citron. definitely would recommend to a friend. also, light sillage for 2 hours, then it becomes a skin scent for another 4-5 hours. nice performance for $20! honestly, a better version of dior homme colognes imho.

reviews.name: Steve907
reviews.comment: To me this smells like Burberry Weekend, but on my skin, this actually last unlike Weekend which disappears within minutes. This has a very bright alcoholic opening immediately after spraying like all of the Cremo colognes I've tried, so don't think that's the smell. The actual opening is very citrusy until the mint is able to fight it's way forth. Then something very special happens to this cologne for me. I haven't seen anyone else mention it yet, but I get a black licorice note and it's gorgeous. For the price I'm really impressed by this fragrance. It does better in warmer weather, but I've worn it all year round.

reviews.name: benjamincampbell243
reviews.comment: Opening is a pretty strong shot of lemon with maybe a little bit of mossy weirdness. I personally am not huge on this opening (I do not enjoy lemony scents much, so if you do you might enjoy it more). Fortunately, it isn’t as “lemon candy-like” as other fragrances at this price point. That being said, the dry down is pleasant. I think they did a good job integrating the cedar and mint notes quite organically in its development. I would prefer this quite a bit more if it were just that mint, moss, and cedar, sans citron. A big note I get that others haven’t mentioned is that it is kind of suntanny. It smells like freshly applied suntan to my nose at times. I think the production quality is impressive, like most Cremo products, and I’m sure someone who enjoys lemon/citron scents would like this.

reviews.name: dR$anD37
reviews.comment: I had tried a couple of other Cremo fragrances (namely Blue Cedar and Cypress which I LOVE), so when I saw this one at TJ Maxx, I figured I'd give it a shot. Well, the reviews on this one make it seem a lot better than it was. At first it definitely reminds me of bug spray. I'm not a fan of the opening at all, but within 10 minutes, the mint leaf starts to become more prominent which makes it more pleasant overall. Once it's dried down, the citron still reminds me of bug spray, but the wafts of mint leaf that I get are rather pleasant. I put on tons of sprays with this one and after a couple of hours, you can't smell it anymore. I think it's important to note that this is the worst performing Cremo frag I've had, the rest are great for the price. All in all, I'll probably give this one away...

reviews.name: swellcat
reviews.comment: § Superbly sparkling, clean, fresh opening, drying down to pleasant, laid-back wood. (I'm having trouble keeping my nose away from the nozzle; the early goodness is that compelling.) Stays brighter, longer, than most other fragrances I've experienced: the citrus hangs in there, albeit a subtle skin scent, altogether. One of the best values, to date, in my modest collection. Longevity: greater than it would seem—say, over seven hours—but this is as an extremely subtle skin scent. Sillage: very minimal. A heavy hand here is not a vice. Could be thought of as an aftershave component—something subtle and kind of fleeting—rather than, "Hey, here's my 11-hour powerhouse." Fine fragrance; a keeper. Try along with the nice Citrus and Mint Leaf shampoo/conditioner, which I sometimes use additionally as a body wash and a shaving soap. It's tingly.

reviews.name: redhawkmillenium
reviews.comment: A solid cheap freshy from Cremo. I agree with the other reviewers that this smells similar to Cremo's other fragrance "Iced Citron & Driftwood", and that came first so not sure why they released this as an EDT. It's a bit redundant. Still, for what it is, you can't complain. A basic citrusy cedar fragrance with moderate performance for about 20 bucks. The easiest of "dumb reaches".

reviews.name: House Adams
reviews.comment: Lang2006 is right... If you have Citrus & Mint Leaf, no real need for Iced Citron & Driftwood and vice versa - Unless you are collecting them. As well as the $20 price tag... The Iced Citron & Driftwood does have slightly woody dry-down(as you could probably tell from the name), as opposed to Citrus & Mint Leaf... But nothing that creates any major differences. For the price - Not many come with the quality and performance that Cremo does. The Banana Republic Icon Line is probably the only other line of fragrances that are noticeably higher quality for the $20 price tag. But even those aren't technically "full retail" when being bought at a TJ Maxx, Marshall's, etc. Obviously some other designers that can compete, but considering bottle size and retail price... Cremo is hard to beat.

reviews.name: Lang2006
reviews.comment: This smells identical to Cremo Iced Citron and Driftwood. They both smell like iced lemonade. No need to have both.

reviews.name: DodgersLH714
reviews.comment: Very refreshing scent, you can get the mint and citrus. Unlike Jimmy Choo or Dior Cologne.....this one lasts!!

title: Citrus Amber Perfume Oil Being Frenshe perfume - a fragrance for women 2022
description: Citrus Amber Perfume Oil by Being Frenshe is a Citrus fragrance for women. Citrus Amber Perfume Oil was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Clementine, Amber, Orange Blossom and Lemon.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense

reviews.name: butterflybunny
reviews.comment: base of this leans more vanilla-y than amber, but I still like it even though I normally find vanilla overpowering. top note smells like the fainter, softer scent of mandarin oranges soaked in water, more so than the sharpness of the clementine you can get in the store (like the cuties). overall it's uplifting yet soft. i was looking for a fragrance that i could put on before doing chores or tasks that i normally would procrastinate on / avoid (like adhd aromatherapy lol) and this in the oil feels like the perfect thing, it's opening, centering, and hopeful - perfect for making dishes or paperwork more exciting :) edit: the lingering amber middle notes became too cocooning to me after a while.

reviews.name: LauGau
reviews.comment: This is a really pretty scent, to me it smells like a soapy grapefruit. It’s refreshing and easy to wear. As you’d expect from an oil, it sits close to the skin.

reviews.name: mamahousemouse
reviews.comment: Purchased the discovery set, so I'll be trying five of the six fragrances. This smells like an expensive citrusy shampoo or soap. All of the fragrance notes are there, but the amber is quite subtle. There is also a fresh/green fragrance that reminds me of cucumbers. The overall effect is fresh-from-the-shower clean, rather than "perfumed." After about 2 hours, all I smell is the amber. It's still soft and subtle, but all of the fresh citrus is gone. Pretty, but the amber alone is not for me.

reviews.name: HazardousEncyclopedia
reviews.comment: This has a nice, generically citrusy scent to it. After a while it becomes slightly plasticky on my skin, like a vinyl shower curtain right out of the package. Not a lot of projection or longevity, but it's a cheap Target product.

reviews.name: konitz
reviews.comment: I don't know about the fragrance but THE BOTTLE DESIGN ! is fantastic!

title: Citrus Coruscent Superfumista perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Coruscent by Superfumista is a fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Coruscent was launched in 2025. The nose behind this fragrance is Benjamin Sachs. Top notes are Yuzu, Lemon, Grapefruit, Lime, Bergamot and Green Mandarin; middle notes are Kiwi, Black Pepper and elemi; base notes are Musk, Sandalwood and Amberwood.

reviews.name: fragpixiephotography
reviews.comment: I was breaking my brain for a very long time on the fruity note in the middle when I blind-sampled it. Finally I was told it was kiwi and ever since that moment I call it my mystery kiwi scent. Super fun fragrance and perfect for sunny days. J'adore!

reviews.name: Natalie212
reviews.comment: This fragrance has surprised me immensely! A super refreshing unisex citrus fragrance. It opens with a sparkling array of citrus fruits, where bergamot and yuzu stand out. Suddenly, a mysterious note emerges (none other than a delicious kiwi), blending with these citrus notes. Also, black pepper appears adding a spicy touch. The combination is spectacular! Woody notes and musk then appear, softening the acidity of the citrus and enveloping a fragrance with such an original kiwi note that I haven't seen in any other fragrance before. Highly recommended to energize your day!

title: Citrus Lemon & Petitgrain COLABO perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Citrus Lemon & Petitgrain by COLABO is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Lemon & Petitgrain was launched in 2021. The fragrance features Petitgrain Paraguay, Italian Lemon, Virginia Cedar and Fir.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Narciso Rodriguez for Him Bleu Noir
Narciso Rodriguez for Him Bleu Noir Eau de Parfum
Sunrise On The Red Sand Dunes

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Les Creations de Monsieur Dior Forever and Ever

reviews.name: balasa_rebeca
reviews.comment: This was a gift with sentimental value. Oddly enough, I find myself reaching out for it on hot summer days. It is reliable, it lasts well on my skin and I do not find the ressemblance with DG Light Blue. It has a thing of its own going on. I recommend it, a great budget perfume.

reviews.name: meliecat
reviews.comment: This is an oddly refreshing mediterranean budget perf, it reminds me of room sprays, shower gels and everything in Spain and Italy. Not only lemon though, herbal and slightly grassy or basilic. It's probably more on the masculine side but I think in such summer heat we have now the key word is 'fresh'.. And this one is, indeed, fresh.. It is somewhat reminiscent of Light Blue, but somehow it reminded me also of Les Cascade de Rochas Songe d'Iris as well - maybe notthe same notes, but the same kind of vibe. Perfectly balanced, none of the notes overpower the other. Lasting power is average, the bottle design is lovely with the wooden cap. Happy to have it!

reviews.name: LadyIva
reviews.comment: This one was obviously 'inspired' by DG Light Blue and the likes. I have (re)learned to appreciate this type of simple, refreshing, summer-friendly fragrance since moving back from the UK to southern Europe several years ago. For example, this plain 'Citrus' wouldn't work at all in gloomy Manchester, where summer temperatures rarely exceed twenty-something C. But down here, when the mercury in the thermometer reaches 40 degrees, this is salvation.

reviews.name: eloinvoid
reviews.comment: Szukałam czegoś intensywnego, orzeźwiającego zapachu cytrusów. Rzeczywiście przy pierwszym niuchnięciu czuć ostrą cytrynę (trochę sztuczna, ale szczególnie mi to nie przeszkadzało). Niestety ta cytryna wietrzeje strasznie szybko (dosłownie w kilka minut?) i zostaje lekko wyczuwalny, bliskoskórny drzewny/ zielony zapach. Nie o to mi chodziło, więc będę używać jako odświeżacz albo zapach na przejście się do spożywczego. Miałam ochotę wypróbować inne zapachy tej marki, ale z obawy o trwałość raczej zrezygnuję.

reviews.name: odminey
reviews.comment: I have a story with this one. Long and dramatic. Scroll to the end for scent review. So I live in Ukraine, and as all of you know, at the beginning of 2022 russia invaded from all directions and started destroying our country. As I live near Kyiv, after about a week of this madness I decided to leave my home and stay with relatives in the west of the country. I only took the stuff that seemed most important (warm clothes, laptop, cats) but did not take any fragrances. Which I really regretted!!! Guys, if you ever face a situation where you have to flee your home in a rush with only a few things, make sure you take a fragrance. It might save your mental health. Anyway, so I stayed in this small town in the mountains, in an old house, in a weird smelling room, and I had no fragrance. During this time my dad joined the army and he was wounded in combat, so he needed a surgery and was transferred to a hospital in a city not too far from where I was. I took a train to visit him. It was a large city, and on my way from the train station to the hospital I decided to check out a cosmetics store, just because I missed shopping. And I'm like, I MUST get a perfume today! So I approached the perfume section, (I lost my job due to the war, so I was on a budget) and I noticed these really simple and cheap Colabo scents. They stood out with their simple design and simple titles. I tested a few and I really loved how minimalist the citrus was, so I bought it and it cheered me up for the next few months until I moved back into my home and got hold of all my stuff. I always carry a bottle of perfume with me since then. **** SCENT REVIEW Simple minimalist woody citrus scent. It's a punch of bitter lemon zest at the beginning, quite artificial, that then smooths out and becomes sweeter and woodier. Quite short-lived. I prefer it as a room scent, though it smells less sharp on my skin. Pros: simple, fresh, cheap; Cons: artificial lemon, poor performance, reminds of air freshener.

title: Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance 2009 L'Occitane en Provence perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2009
description: Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance 2009 by L'Occitane en Provence is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance 2009 was launched in 2009. The fragrance features Citruses, Lemon Verbena and Grapefruit. L`Occitane presents a new summer fragrance named Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance 2009, which will recuperate you during summer, as a joyful and luminous citrusy drink. A mixture of refreshing verbena bathing in the sun of Corsica is blended with accords of Italian grapefruit, which tingles with natural ingredients breezes – herbs and citruses. This fragrance will be available from August 2009 in L'Occitane shops. Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance (Eau Fraiche Verveine Agrumes) is composed of fruit zests of luminous citruses and verbena leaves warmed by the sun of Corsica. The assortment of Mediterranean freshness includes fragrant accompanying products: Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance Eau de Toilette in amounts of 20 ml and 150 ml (with atomizer) , Citrus Verbena Solid perfume - 10 grams, Citrus Verbena Revitalizing Mist - 125ml (bitterish fragrant spray composed of grapefruit and verbena, which cools and refreshes your skin; you can keep it in the fridge during summer months and spay it while it's cold), Citrus Verbena Refreshment Towels – 15 pieces in a package.

reviews.name: CobraCommander
reviews.comment: Doesn't last more than 10 minutes. I just use to conceal bad smells from hands after dinner.

reviews.name: Goktug
reviews.comment: it's very nice for summer daylight fragrance I really like it.

reviews.name: Englishrose77
reviews.comment: I bought this after my beloved Jo Malone Verbenas of Provence was discontinued last year. This got so many wonderful reviews I had to try it. It's a very clean, fresh lemon verbena scent, and very refreshing. I wish it had a little more of a soft floral note, but then I realize it's not really fair to keep comparing it to another fragrance. It's a very natural, true lemon verbena scent,not at all synthetic or chemical smelling, as so many other fragrances are. I find my other L'Occitane fragrances also have this natural , genuine quality. It's like sunshine in a bottle; a perfect summer fragrance to spray all over. I really like it.

reviews.name: evocative
reviews.comment: I'd never had a chance to sniff any L'Occitane fragrances until a couple of years ago, when I was Christmas shopping with my Mum. I fell in love with Lemon Verbena - which is what they had at the time. I made puppy dog eyes at Mum, she laughed at me and bought it for me for Christmas. I moved onto Citrus Verbena when Lemon Verbena disappeared. Oh! What an expensive love affair! No longevity, but a big price, and I was buying two bottles a month. We had to divorce, L'Occitane verbenas and I.

reviews.name: feelhot
reviews.comment: First I bought it by mistake :))LOL-I thought it would be EDT, so for the price of L'Occitane 150ml-5,1fl oz. it was quite affordable/vs other prices on L'Occitane website/ so as I love grapefruits, verbena and citruses it was truly me. A box with all my L'Occitane shopping arrived and I discover it is Eau Fraiche-and it is very fragile, delicate fragrance which doesn't last long-that's why it was quite cheap, but I do love it, as it is just perfect for summer time, not overwhelming bursting of freshness cocktail of citruses, verbena and my favourite grapefruit. It is sparkling mist of citruses with hints of verbena, great refreshing and quite long stay on skin, but it is not as strong like EDT, even less then EDC-truly Eau Fraiche :) I strongly recommend it to all fresh-citruses-verbena-grapefruit lovers, is it just ocean of delicate lemonade, not too strong, not sharp, just sparkling and fizzy-full of sunshine, leaves and flowers of grapefruit, verbena leafs. And ... the bottle -is just state of art-love it really:)-will keep for years as reminding of great London Summer, Summer full of Dreams, London tears od Happiness:)

reviews.name: DivotDiva
reviews.comment: I find this very refreshing on a hot day. I have the large bottle, which is good as I have to re-apply if I want it to last more than a couple of hours.

reviews.name: IsaIsabella
reviews.comment: I own the travel size (20ml). It costs me S$37(~US29.90)! Bought this today to qualify for a membership. Anyway, the initial spray introduces a blast of lemony freshness that makes you feel very fresh and happy. But then the smell dissipates into a muted, sweet lemony scent that reminds me of Crabtree & Evelyn's Citron, Honey & Coriander range. Heh. Sillage is soft, longevity needs some time before I comment on it :D EDIT: soft sillage, longevity lasts around 1-2 hours on skin but by the 1.5hour it has become very very faint. Well, for a citrus cent the longevity is decent.

reviews.name: polka
reviews.comment: I totally love verbena's smell. It's definitely one of the most refreshing scents in the world. Plus, it will always remind me of my trip to Crimea - a beautiful land, famous for its wines and aromatic oils. That's where I've smelled the best verbena oil ever. L'Occitane's Verbena smells so natural, uplifting and fresh! It's pure bliss when the temperature reaches the unbearable 30 centigrades. It's citrusy with just the slightest herbal note and free of those artificial, sweet notes, that I truly hate in the so called "summer fragrances", like Saharienne or Aqua di Gioia. There's only one "but"; it lasts so so short! It's nearly gone about an hour after application. Can't figure why - all other L'Occitane's frags I've tried seemed to be pretty long-lasting. Such a pity!

reviews.name: johngreenink
reviews.comment: If you love lemon verbena, then this totally worth the purchase. It smells exactly like the leaves from the plant if you had just picked them and rubbed them between your palms. Glorious green and sweet lemon scent. This is indeed light - not the kind of scent you'd wear out for a night on the town... this is freshening, revival of the senses-scent. It's great to spray on a jacket or pillow, just drink in the garden.

reviews.name: nora elia
reviews.comment: I just bought a travel size bottle and I love it but after 5min it fades too quickly. I was decided to buy a bigger bottle but not anymore even though I love the lemony smell Update: Like an old saying "It is wise to change your mind" :) So I changed my mind and I bought a huge bottle! I don´t care If it doesn last, I can´t spray myself all day long!! very refreshing smell.

reviews.name: rednut
reviews.comment: lovely light lemon smell. Perfect for a summers day. Uplifting and fresh when you don't want a very 'perfumy' smell

reviews.name: holly13
reviews.comment: I like this light uplifting smell. I want to buy the solid perfume version, since the liquid version is too light. They always say apply after you shower so the scent lasts longer. If you have a mall nearby you might find a L'Occitane store. I like Citrus Verbena Summer Fragrance. It is a lovely grapefruit smell. Some people say it smells like lemon lysol, but I think it smells happy and uplifting.

title: Citrus Amber Hope Dose Ibraheem AlQurashi perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2018
description: Citrus Amber Hope Dose by Ibraheem AlQurashi is a Oriental Fougere fragrance for women and men. Citrus Amber Hope Dose was launched in 2018. Top notes are Pepper, Lavender, Geranium and Citrus; middle notes are Incense, Amber and Patchouli; base notes are Amber, Tonka Bean, Raspberry and Vetiver. Citrus Amber Hope Dose evokes a lost world filled with tropical fruits and amber, enveloped by the scent of incense woods. The warm and humid air blends warm notes with the sweetness of raspberry and tonka bean to create an earthy and fruity scent. As the sun sets and the air cools, the fragrance reveals lavender and citrus mixed with a heart of patchouli, giving off a deep and smoky aroma. Vetiver adds a touch of warmth to this unique blend.

reviews.name: Abdul Hegazi
reviews.comment: Not what I expected. As someone who is not usually a big patchouli fan this does a great job blending that patchouli with the citrus and woodiness. I believe this works for any season and any time of day. I would reccomend this to people who don't care to be mass appealing, but still choose to smell clean. It's a crispy clean and spicy fragrance. I think layering this with something like a bleu de chanel would just enhance both profiles. I am surprised and impressed!

reviews.name: Vaporized
reviews.comment: Supposedly a clone of Nicolai Patchouli Intense. As patchouli scents go, this one is a winner! A fougere of sorts, starts off, fresh, spicy with the citrus, lavender, geranium and pepper notes. The heart and dry down is patchouli and vetiver heavy. It has a raspberry note, but was quite inconspicuous to my nose. The performance is stellar, lasts the whole day on skin and further on clothes. However found it to be quite similar to a Zara scent I used to have, Leather Jardin. This is an in-your-face green scent. All seasonal scent? Spring and fall IMO. Unisex? Masculine Blind buy worthy? For this price, can't complain, and if you're a fan of citrus/ patchouli, lead away! Performance? Longevity, around 9 to 10 on skin (and longer on clothes), with excellent projection and sillage. .

reviews.name: shild
reviews.comment: Fresh cut grass

title: Citrus Paradisi Farmacia SS. Annunziata perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Paradisi by Farmacia SS. Annunziata is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Paradisi was launched in 2023. Top notes are Lemon and Pink Grapefruit; middle notes are Fig Leaf, Cardamom, Magnolia and Cassis; base notes are Musk, Dew Drop and Cedar. A zesty breeze that ruffles your hair. The thrill of novelty, of unexpected adventures. The sweetness of fig blends with fresh notes of grapefruit and lemon, creating an unforgettable hymn to life and youth. HEAD: Pink Grapefruit, Lemon; HEART: Fig Leaf, Cardamom, Magnolia, Cassis; BASE: Musk, Cedarwood, Dew Accord;

reviews.name: Higuera
reviews.comment: the perfume is lovely, a bright juicy explosion opening followed by mouthwatering blend of kassis and fig. So summery and refreshing, I want to bathe myself in it all the time - the only downside being I stop smelling it almost right away but I think it's because I get anosmic to citruses very quickly, unfortunately.

title: Citrus & Yuzu Perito Moreno perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2024
description: Citrus & Yuzu by Perito Moreno is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus & Yuzu was launched in 2024. The nose behind this fragrance is Nitish Dixit. Top notes are Grapefruit, Yuzu, Kaffir Lime, Buddha's hand and Pink Pepper; middle notes are Incense and Patchouli; base notes are Sandalwood and Cedarwood. Citrus & Yuzu by Perito Moreno is a fragrance created by perfumer Nitish Dixit and released in 2024. The composition opens with bright and zesty notes of yuzu, Buddha's hand, grapefruit, kaffir lime, and pink pepper. The heart reveals earthy patchouli and an incense accord, while the base settles into creamy sandalwood and cedarwood. The scent is inspired by summer and features a blend of citrus, spice, and woody notes.

reviews.name: Pro_96
reviews.comment: Citrus & Yuzu is a fairly straightforward fragrance that does it says in its name - It’s a fragrance focused on the notes of various citruses. The highlight of the fragrance is undoubtedly the opening, which is a medley of yuzu, grapefruit and lime. The Grapefruit and yuzu are absolutely a delightful combination of citruses for anyone who likes photorealistic representation of citruses in fragrances. It smells very natural. However, once it dries down, the fragrance just doesn’t work for me. White the overall composition remains quite similar, it is supported by incense and something woody, which is what I assume to be sandalwood, but it doesn’t particularly standout as sandalwood to me. This is how the fragrance stays for the remainder of its life, and unfortunately, this is where the fragrance falls apart for me. It comes off like some kind of a dishwasher soap. Another friend of mine said it smelt like sweat/armpit, which is something some people pick up from grapefruit based fragrance. Suffice it to say, this is not a safe blind buy. Performance is another let down. When you first spray it on, it has moderate projection for about 30 minutes, beyond which it becomes a skin scent, and I really have to dig my note at the spot where I sprayed it to even notice it. This remains to be a skin scent beyond that, and it lasts for about 3 to 3.5 hours, at most. I’d say anyone at any age can pull this off and it’s best suited to the day time during warmer months, but if it doesn’t last, what’s the point? Maybe it doesn’t work on my skin, but again, this isn’t a fragrance one should blind buy. Try it before you decide to get a full bottle.

reviews.name: outlaw_2888
reviews.comment: fantastic citrus aspect, bright and radiant and juicy. background is woody green, slight spice with incense which has a dry resin character. A different kind of citrus that is suitable to wear all year round

reviews.name: Adhish Gupta
reviews.comment: absolutely amazing, Indian sandalwood with fresh citrus. Simple and beautiful.

title: Citrus Amber Being Frenshe perfume - a fragrance for women 2022
description: Citrus Amber by Being Frenshe is a Citrus fragrance for women. Citrus Amber was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Clementine, Amber, Orange Blossom and Lemon.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Valentino Donna Born in Roma Green Stravaganza

reviews.name: poolsoflaughter
reviews.comment: This smells like I’m on vacation in a fancy hotel. It’s truly an uplifting citrus fragrance that makes me feel at ease. I can see this being an easy reach all spring and summer. It’s totally inoffensive and unisex. If it’s a gloomy, rainy day, this would be an instant pick me up. I recommend spritzing your clothes for longer performance, since it’s a body mist (my skin usually eats up anything weaker than eau de parfum).

reviews.name: 40knight
reviews.comment: This smelled amazing IN the bottle. Tart, very citrusy, juicy, and fresh. However, moments after I sprayed it onto clothes, it turned into a strong, cloying, almost gourmand/lactonic sweetness. Personally not a fan, I wish it would stay fruity/citrusy the entire way through.

reviews.name: youstinkgood
reviews.comment: smells like wet hair fresh out the shower

reviews.name: maximol
reviews.comment: dude this is the most long lasting fragrance i have ever bought 😭 and i love it i swear lasts forever on clothes and my skin

reviews.name: kbot
reviews.comment: On me this is very similar to Chanel Chance Eau Fraiche. Great year-round citrussy amber that does not have cleaning product vibes and lasts reasonably well for a body mist.

reviews.name: nicole.3
reviews.comment: This is my favorite Being Frenshe scent by far! It's inoffensive and just smells like a bright, fresh citrus perfume with a touch of amber to round it out. It doesn't smell like candy nor cleaning products. IMO, there are a lot of mass-produced fragrances on the market today that are similar but waaaaay more expensive and not as well-balanced. Totally a safe blind-buy for anyone seeking a refreshing fragrance.

reviews.name: Mona708
reviews.comment: I mostly got a sweet, almost honey- like clementine note with a tiny hint of bitterly tangy lemon. It’s definitely a warm weather scent, but it doesn’t vanish as quickly in cooler weather as some other citrus-heavy scents do. I was also pleasantly surprised by how long this lasted with only a few sprays. I wouldn’t mind trying some of the other scents from this house sometime.

reviews.name: swedishmilk15
reviews.comment: Insanely good, I adore it! Acidic and tart and it stays that way until the very end, just how I like it.

reviews.name: fruity_iykwim
reviews.comment: I have the body oil, not the perfume or body mist. some people think this is really sweet and smell Creamsicles, I disagree. I smell a really sweet, really ripe orange. no creaminess or dessert notes. I can smell amber if I think about it, but really this is a sweet orange. if y'all are looking for a fruity vanilla routine for summer: tree hut vanilla body butter, frenshe citrus amber body oil, and bbw madagascar vanilla. sweet and delicious without being overbearing in the heat.

reviews.name: cstuff
reviews.comment: Doesn't last long at all but I love the scent! Body mists are great for the gym for me personally.

reviews.name: n8super
reviews.comment: initially totally creamsicle, a sticky sweet clementine and cream smell with a hint of clean amber and musk which come out more over time. it's not unpleasant, but it is too sweet for me and has a disappointingly short longevity, even for the price point i'm using the eau de parfum from the sample set

reviews.name: mitchyworld
reviews.comment: I actually bought this to use as a room fragrance. It has almost no longevity and little projection even using it that way. It's not a bad scent, but it dries down to a really single note that smells like musk to me. It's not even worth the small amount of money if it can't last. Maybe the oil performs better?

reviews.name: Reinanae
reviews.comment: I agree with previus reviews that this is the best scent from the line. I was trying to find the cashmere vanilla one and couldn't find it at any stores. I sniffed Citrus Amber and was mesmerized lol. Later on I was able to smell the vanilla one and I do not like it. The citrus amber scent smells warm and sweet, yet fresh and clean. Great for spring and fall in my opinion. Might be too sweet in the heat. Not really a winter scent, but could be layered with something else nicely. This scent reminded me a bit of Lolitaland without the peach note. It smells fresh and sweet when first sprayed and as it dries down on my skin, I get open windows on a cool sunny day and fresh linens in a clean kitchen with warm sugar cookies just out of the oven. It's not cloyingly sweet but warm and comforting. I went to visit my bestie during the summer and she fell in love with the scent so I bought her a bottle. Will definitely buy again.

reviews.name: Selenity
reviews.comment: Hands down, the best fragrance of the entire line. Don’t bother with the oil, it doesn’t last for 💩. Just get the body mist. Gonna level with you, that also doesn’t have great longevity but it’s a body mist, it’s cheap, and it’s delectable so I carry it around. It’s not exactly the most portable size, so it’s good for a day at work when I have my backpack. I hope the company comes out with an EDP or a more optimally-sized body mist to help remedy the pretty terrible endurance. It’s weird to say but it smells exactly like how Sunny D tastes without the citrusy burn in your throat. I sometimes layer this with Vince Camuto’s Illuminaire edp and you can’t tell me I don’t smell like a boujie ray of sunshine.

reviews.name: Vicky456
reviews.comment: Very citrusy and more like a cleaner type of citrus. For some reason the amber in this mixed with the citrus makes it smell a bit like vomit.

reviews.name: fragrance_girl
reviews.comment: My favorite scent from the brand. Nice, fresh, well-rounded, everyday citrus scent. Interesting bottle cap.

title: Citrus Breeze Ainash Parfums cologne - a fragrance for men 2023
description: Citrus Breeze by Ainash Parfums is a fragrance for men. Citrus Breeze was launched in 2023. Top notes are Green Apple, Calabrian bergamot and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Petitgrain, Cashmeran, Violet, Pomarose and Cedar; base notes are Oakmoss, Musk and Amberwood.

reviews.name: fjacosta
reviews.comment: Almost 1:1 to OG, the green apple is slightly sweeter. Spray more and on clothes for a longer duration. Behaves similarly to OG after 3 minutes. In a side-by-side comparison, OG has a very faint clove-like note in the background missing from the Ainash interpretation. Ainash feels slightly mentholated when smelling up close (it's not menthol, but a green sharpness feels almost cooling up close). Both the OG and this are linear; if you want a similar effect, over-spray and it will last more than 12 hours on clothes; on the skin, it lasts a lot less. IMO both Ainash and Rayhaan create fantastic citrus fragrances.

reviews.name: Pavely
reviews.comment: I just bought this perfume, and is awesome, I love it.

title: Citrus Musk Pinaud Clubman cologne - a fragrance for men
description: Citrus Musk by Pinaud Clubman is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Top notes are Lemon, Lemongrass, Lime and Bergamot; middle notes are Lily-of-the-Valley, Carnation and Jasmine; base notes are Musk, Woody Notes and Tonka Bean.

reviews.name: Whiskasfelix
reviews.comment: i use this on a 'day off' as it's refreshing and relatively long lasting and very good value for money. Yes, it's one dimensional (lime) but it's a smell of summer and great for hanging around the pool/beach.

reviews.name: FragChronic
reviews.comment: I bought this on a recommendation and it is fantastic!! Very limey, lemony....with underlying and complimenting musk and florals.....SO GOOD! I want to bathe in this

reviews.name: SPNKr
reviews.comment: Epic Journey Into the Bottled Yonder, 072 ------------------------------------------------------- Purchased January 2019 Excellent after shave because it combines Clubman Musk with Clubman Lime Sec. You'll love it.

reviews.name: Whiskasfelix
reviews.comment: i don't want to simply repeat what others have said. I think this scent is 'harmless' which is not meant to be a put down. It works away doing its job and i doubt it would ever cause anyone to recoil. I've started using it every day as it's cheap, lasts an hour or two and has arms length sileage. I think it's decent for what it is!

reviews.name: The Fiddling Dude
reviews.comment: Clubman Pinaud Citrus Musk, when splashed fairly liberally, lasts longer on me than most of my EDTs and projects plenty well. It also smells on the natural side and is a surprisingly smooth blend. It is a linear fragrance that stays smelling fresh, clean, and uplifting for an entire workday. It is not cheapy smelling at all. A classic that's much better than the modern scents that are designed to just smell good for a couple minites to make a quick sale. Citrus Musk has "musk" in the classic soapy sense, not animalic. My best description of this cologne would be if Jell-O came out with a scented soap intended to smell similar to Lime Jell-O. What you'll get is Lime Jell-O with significant soapiness thrown in.

reviews.name: Novoscentologist
reviews.comment: Pinaud Clubman Citrus Musk... ...is very similar to Pinaud Clubman Lime Sec after the initial application. After a short while the scent changes to a more succulent citrus scent with a soft musk and tonka support which makes a slightly less abbrasive than Pinaud Lime Sec. Citrus Musk is also missing that subtle woody undertone and the dryness of Lime Sec.. Overall a very nice cologne/ aftershave.

reviews.name: morphie
reviews.comment: Vibrant crispy lemongrass and a light almost white soapy musk, nothing in between, simple, cheap and uplifting cologne

reviews.name: mmaggi
reviews.comment: It's not as sweet as the LimeSec and not as powdery as the original Clubman. It truly is a nicer balance of lemon, lime and bergamot.

reviews.name: The Gent
reviews.comment: It smells just like its called: Citrus Musk. Out of the bottle I thought that it smelled identical to Lime Sec. Once you splash it on however, it smells like grapefruit and finishes off with a nice musk scent. I would probably not get this again. I like it but I am not in love with it. If you are looking for a scent that smells just like citrus this is for you. You get a good size bottle for $13 on amazon. Still this is a classic! The Gents Score 7.5/10 The Gents All Time Aftershave Rankings: 1:Original Clubman 2:Vi-Jon Spice Scent 3:Old Spice 4: Mennen Skin Bracer 5:Clubman Bay Rum 6:Ogallala Bay Rum 7:Clubman Vanilla 8:Clubman Special Reserve 9:Aqua Velva Musk 10:Clubman Musk 11.Clubman Citrus Musk 12: Aqua Velva Ice Blue 13:Clubman Lime Sec 14:Clubman Lilac Vegetal

reviews.name: CreepyKid
reviews.comment: Probably the best Clubman around along with the Special Reserve. Citrus Musk is all of the best parts from 4711 and Alvarez Gomez Agua de Colonia with a lime kick and some light floral musk on the dry down. It lasts longer than both as well and can on occassion last for hours in the right conditions. It's also cheap as can be and readily available all over the place. As with all cheap fragrances in plastic bottles transferring them into glass bottles greatly improves the scent and performance. The problem with Clubman is the cheap plastic bottles not only impart a nasty skunky odor, they also leach who knows what into the products, so again highly recommend moving them to glass asap. Smells a lot higher end than you'd imagine and I doubt anyone could tell it costs like $10 for a massive 12oz bottle just from smelling it on someone.

reviews.name: stevemancini
reviews.comment: My favorite of the clubman line. Love this citrusy musk.

reviews.name: lovetribe
reviews.comment: citrusy opening to the limit of acid, but soon disappears. energetic,refreshing, summery. the best for warm temperatures ... then slowly fades into floral notes and settled on a nice musky. great. 8/10

reviews.name: EarlofGrims
reviews.comment: Great great fragrance,this is the zest scent you want,fresh floral musk,this one should shine more from the selection of Pinaud scents.Fresh bouquets in a florist shop.

reviews.name: karlovonamesti
reviews.comment: Probably Pinaud’s best citrus fragrance, Citrus Musk has Lime Sec’s cheerful lime note mixed with an equally fun lemon, which creates a pleasant and unpretentious “7-Up” style cologne. It dries down to the soapy white musk of Lime Sec, but a touch stronger - this is more cologne than aftershave. Cheap, smells like it, but good stuff.

reviews.name: MNadz
reviews.comment: A beautiful citrus clean musk aftershave. This and Lime Sec are my go-to for Summer Time.

reviews.name: Br'eauDeCologne
reviews.comment: Wonderful in its simplicity. Energizing, fresh and uplifting in that clean lemongrass way already written about. I'm convinced that this juice was the primary inspiration for Artisan Pure by John Varvatos. Citrus Musk lasts about as long as you'd expect an aftershave to last: but what you get for that short duration is incredible. The low price is an extra bonus. As with any Pinaud fragrance (or others that come in a plastic container), decant to a glass bottle to preserve quality. A spray bottle is my preference but liberal splashes are all good with this juice. Unless someone can't stand lemon: this is highly recommended for anyone to try in any age group, either gender. 10/10

reviews.name: tayyabforyouth
reviews.comment: This is a really fantastic citrus eau de cologne. It smells just like it's titled: of citrus and musk - in this case lemon and lime and white musk. There is also tons of lemongrass in this - I've smelled lemongrass essential oil and this smells very similar (lemongrass basically smells like sweet lemon candy somewhat with a sort of green vibe, to my nose). It starts with the beautiful green-leaning citrus (due to a lot of lime note) and dries down to white musk with hint of white flowers like lily of the valley. Those are the only things I detect. This is probably better used as an aftershave than as a proper cologne though since projection and longevity are both weak. But they are stronger than regular aftershaves, but weaker than eau de colognes on the market. The citrus in this is the sweet kind, so it smells like candy sort of. This doesn't bother me however as I really like the scent anyway. If you want a ramped up version of this exact scent, try Anglia Spiced Limes. And a super ramped up version of this with beastmode projection and longevity is Mancera's Lemon Line. They both smell like Pinaud Citrus Musk but with maybe less of the musk (they also share the candy lemon and lime opening). Overall, this is my favourite from Pinaud's inexpensive cologne offerings, along with their Virgin Island Bay Rum. But this is for the summer while I think bay rum is a winter scent. I ended up mixing this with 4711 Eau de Cologne and putting it in a travel atomizer to spray on whenever I feel like it. 5/5

reviews.name: iwhiffwaft
reviews.comment: I'm not sure I get barbershop really from this fragrance, but I haven't spent too much time in them, so that may be why. I just get something like an eau de cologne of an eau de cologne type scent. Maybe a bit in the vein of Acqua di parma with a bit more citrus and a tad of lime. Nothing too flowery at the base, but some light body to it. Not musky, but full bodied citrus. Like an aftershave version of ADP with a bit of lime. It's actually a steal for the cost. Great Summer citrus aftershave that layers with any citrus edt or edp really that I have. Doesn't last long, but again at this price point it's really a great choice for a summer aftershave with citrus.

reviews.name: spartan
reviews.comment: Pinaud Citrus Musk is my personal favorite of all their Cologne and Aftershaves.. It is Truly that Barber Shop smell I was Searching For..,,, In my opinion it is the Strongest & Longest lasting Fragrance in their lineup...And I have them all.... This Juice Smells so Masculine its truly unbelievable!!....This is what men smell like after leaving the Barber Shop ...Incredible...Should be A staple in every mans lineup.. 10/10

reviews.name: NobleRoman
reviews.comment: Finally, Pinaud has been added to fragrantica. I enjoy the whole line and wear them on vacation. As for Citrus Musk, I get musk with a hint of lemon and lime. A pleasant scent that only goes 2 1/2 hours tops, on me. I wear Pinaud because it takes me back to barbershops in the 60's, when every barber had the whole line on display along with Jeris. Always makes me smile, so worth the $7 to me!

title: Citrus Wave Parfums Genty cologne - a fragrance for men 2023
description: Citrus Wave by Parfums Genty is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Citrus Wave was launched in 2023. Top notes are Bergamot, Grapefruit and Galbanum; middle notes are Jasmine, Pink Pepper, Green Apple and Rose; base notes are Vetiver, Benzoin, Musk and Leather. A vibrant citrus aromatic fragrance for men from Parfums Genty's Cristalaqua collection. The composition opens with sharp galbanum and bright citrus tones of grapefruit and bergamot, transitioning to a floral-spicy heart featuring jasmine, rose, and pink pepper accented by crisp apple. The base reveals masculine warmth through leather, vetiver, and musky-ambery accents with benzoin's resinous sweetness. Positioned as an everyday scent for confident men, it offers moderate longevity characteristic of its concentration.

reviews.name: semyonsemyoff
reviews.comment: Nose Note #205 This does not resemble any D&G Blue fragrances. This is a super bitter bergamot and galbanum summer mens freshy. Too bitter, just not pleasant in any way

title: Citrus Tonic Oriflame cologne - a fragrance for men 2014
description: Citrus Tonic by Oriflame is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Citrus Tonic was launched in 2014. The nose behind this fragrance is Nathalie Feisthauer. The fragrance features Lime, Sea Notes and mulberry.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Scent Mix Crispy Fresh For Him

reviews.name: namantha
reviews.comment: poor longevity and poor siilage in 25-30 C ...thats it sorry

reviews.name: kigyo
reviews.comment: Zero longevity and projection. Smells very similar to Missoni Wave and nearly identical to Ferre's Fougere Italiano. It is so cheap that you can shower in it. One needs many sprays to get some notice. I do love the presentation, beautiful bottle. Great beach side low budget fragrance after a long day soaking up the sun and water fun. I think it lasts longer and smells better on clothes. Great for travel.

reviews.name: sapeur1999
reviews.comment: An exquisite warm citrus scent, creamy and warm instead of transparent and fresh. It is a lineal skin scent for the 2-3hs it lasts, it goes for about 10-14 € online. 5-8% perfume concentration at best but so are most Oriflame's EDTs.

reviews.name: Saif Rafeek
reviews.comment: I bought this on a discounted Oriflame product package and that included the perfume, Moisturizer, deodorant, and an eye cream. I paid only 17 USD. Roughly the cost was 5 USD for the 75ml fragrance bottle and the original price will be 29USD. It was the cheapest fragrance, and I was so excited to try the beauty of this juice. I was unboxed and sprayed once on my wrist and two sprays in my neck, it was took around 30 seconds to get 3 compliments from my colleagues.One of the ladies comment was it so sexy and seductive, and two gents open their mouth with the WOW word. This fragrance so fresh and suitable for hot, humid weather. Absolutely a fresh summer bomb with a minimalist notes. Scent & Qualiy: 7/10 Longevity: 7/10 Silage: 7/10 Creativity & Uniqueness: 6/10 Affordability: 15/10 ----------- Overall: 8/10

reviews.name: Lalchhanchhuaha Jahau
reviews.comment: I have few bottles of designer perfumes, this fragrance deserves some respect, this thing is You get what you paid for staff.It last longer than the Superstar BDC EDT on my skin no kidding!!! I even got more complements than BDC😊😊. You can actually buy 10 bottles of this with the price you paid for BDC.Im not saying that they smell similar but talking about the price proposition.If someone find this offensive or unttractive i bet he needs an ENT doctor to check whether his noice works normal or not😊😊.Above all, nothing groundbreaking somehow really realy nice frag with a moderate longetivity(Last 4-5hrs with 1-2hr projection)

reviews.name: giuseppe98gp83
reviews.comment: I have been DECLARED. I was looking for something cheap, carefree. Something that knew of those moments where you have nothing to do when you are on the beach and INSTEAD ... This fragrance has nothing to do with the sea. There are times, where I repeat a fragrant that the declared notes are completely different from the original ones. This perfume is composed of: Citrus fruits, woody notes (Official site) Fragrantica reports: Lime, Marine notes and mulberry. I absolutely agree with the description of the official website. It is a fragrance that contains only citrus fruits and woods but Fragrantica thanks to its Expert "Nasi" Team the classification with "CONIFER" and "SALAD" agreements (Already two things that are neither in heaven nor on earth). Marine notes, mulberry... it makes me laugh.Sorry to all the outburst but if the producers of the fragrance give certain notes and these (at least to my nose) correspond, why does fragrantica sometimes modify and distort the notes and deceives the people? I had a crazy curiosity about this perfume, also considering that I bought a 75 ml at 10 euros on offer and then sprayed it and I only hear good citrus fruits and woods (especially guaiac and cedar). I like it but it wasn't what I was looking for. THANK YOU FRAGRANTICA! Fortunately, it was only 10 euros. P.S. Before you get curious about Fragrantica, go to the official websites of the producers (or on multiple sites and compare which are the rightly declared notes).

reviews.name: mshimoz
reviews.comment: I feel like I'm wearing water , no lasting power and not even noticable

reviews.name: ProtonN
reviews.comment: Citrus aromatic, inoffensive. Great for gym use(like previously stated), cause of the low strength for projection. Starts with sharp citruses and then fuses with the berries it gets slightly on the warm side, for balance, not overly sharp as the beginning. Pretty linear after.

reviews.name: freakygin
reviews.comment: It's a citrus, a bit generic smells I must say nothing special about the notes Longevity : 5 / 10 Projection : 3 / 10 Sillage : 3 / 10

reviews.name: ehsankasiri
reviews.comment: متوسط و کم جان ----------- Scent & Qualiy: 6/10 Longevity: 4/10 Sillage: 4/10 Creativity & Uniqueness: 5/10 Affordability: 10/10 ----------- Overall: 5.8/10

reviews.name: high_power
reviews.comment: in top notes its smell like cartier decleration but it too light

reviews.name: CB23
reviews.comment: Great gym scent, nice and fresh to keep you smelling good but won't project enough to disturb others

reviews.name: Kayia
reviews.comment: I love wearing this perfume. Good for everyday use.

reviews.name: Rockdj
reviews.comment: I just recently bought Citrus tonic, i didn't want to expect something extraordinary from this EDT, but its a simply and a nice cologne! I found it perfect for everyday use, summer time or a daytime date! It doesn't last to much but spraying it all over the body and clothes makes a more long lasting scent, it's like a skinscent. I like it pretty much indeed, i feel comfortable while i'm wearing it! ;) nice bottle and packaging.

reviews.name: Jennyjen
reviews.comment: Tonite i came home and found my dear mama wearing this scent. I thought where did she buy Blue de Chanel?? In our village she could not get it. She said it's Oriflame. I was shocked. It's longlasting now in cold autumn. I should stock it up for us both for sure.

reviews.name: tots_eminem
reviews.comment: very simple and little bit of boring :)

reviews.name: GallardoChipChip
reviews.comment: Very fresh and clean!!! Suitable for casual wearing or a sunny summer day. It doesn't last long but I think that's enough for the summer weather. Like it.

reviews.name: Deetron
reviews.comment: VogueBoy - BIG thank you for your reviews! They are really helpful.

reviews.name: VogueBoy
reviews.comment: Another surprisingly good fragrance from Oriflame! Fresh citruses combined with white woods provide a clean and refreshing fragrance suitable for every season or occasion. This Men's Collection clearly shows how simplicity wins over the deceptive marketing characteristic for most of the current fragrance launches.

title: Citrus Splash Birkholz perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2019
description: Citrus Splash by Birkholz is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Splash was launched in 2019. Top notes are Bergamot and Neroli; middle notes are Tea Rose and Freesia; base notes are Cedar and Musk. "Citrus Splash is a composition as lively, cool and excessive as an adventure on Mexico's white sandy beaches. Turquoise blue sea, the sun draws the shadow of the palm trees on the white sandy beach in Tulum. Cool music from well-known DJ`s on the Caribbean coast initiates the transition from day to night. Citrus Splash exudes the feeling of vitality in this magical place. A fragrance that invigorates and makes us dream of paradise." - a note from the brand.

reviews.name: Myrtillajus
reviews.comment: Citrus Spash is a real energy boost. A fragrance inspired by Tulum, a marvellous city in Mexico that is witness to the genius and beauty of Mayan architecture. Juicy lemon, squeezed and balanced by the gentle, in this case not bitter, notes of orange blossom, with a slightly subtle floral side that only enhances the citrus nuances of this delightful creation. A fragrance to be used always, refreshing, cheerful, to always see the sun, even in the darkest moments. Very good duration and sillage. ‘The Sun’ painted by Arthur Dove.

reviews.name: derby2169
reviews.comment: Opens up very similar to Chanel Eau de Cologne with a very realistic tart and slightly green bergamot, very close to pure bergamot extract but develops into a different direction with more round rosey florals and a clean musky base with a touch of leather on my skin in the very distant dry down. Very nice, unisex and subtle, but nothing ground breaking.

title: Citrus Tonic Oriflame cologne - a fragrance for men 2021
description: Citrus Tonic by Oriflame is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Citrus Tonic was launched in 2021. Top note is Lime; middle note is Tonic Water; base note is Woody Notes.

reviews.name: Asim_Asifoglu
reviews.comment: Qalıcılığı çox zəifdir.

title: Citrus' F Osma Perfumes perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus' F by Osma Perfumes is a fragrance for women and men. Top note is Citrus; middle note is Rose; base note is White Musk. Citrus F by Osma is characterized by refreshing citrus notes at the opening, followed by a delicate heart of rose that imparts a sense of happiness and romance. The fragrance is anchored by a base of white musk, adding depth and a soft, lingering finish. This composition evokes a connection with nature and aims to provide a balanced floral and fruity experience.

reviews.name: iyzola
reviews.comment: Not a fan of this, too feminine, rose smell is there, citrus! ? Maybe In my nose it somehow reminds me of a laundry detergent. I think it would work well with a female

reviews.name: Effortless616
reviews.comment: For whatever reason this smells very close to DBIR Extradose! Or maybe somewhere between the OG in Extradose! It’s good! She’s pretty!!

title: Citrus Tea Intense Atelier Rebul perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Tea Intense by Atelier Rebul is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Lemon, Bergamot and Mint; middle notes are Watery Notes, Petitgrain and Gardenia; base notes are Black Tea, Cedar and Musk. Citrus Tea Intense by Atelier Rebul is a unisex cologne that blends notes of green and black tea with vibrant citrus accords. The fragrance evokes the warmth of the sun and a sense of tranquility, featuring a refreshing combination of lemon, bergamot, and mint in the opening. The heart reveals watery notes, gardenia, and petitgrain, while the base is composed of black tea, cedar, and musk. This composition is designed to provide a relaxing and comforting sensation, suitable for both men and women.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Terre de Lumière L'eau Eau de Toilette

title: Citrus Woods Abercrombie & Fitch perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2024
description: Citrus Woods by Abercrombie & Fitch is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Woods was launched in 2024. The fragrance features Sandalwood, Vetiver and Black Tea. Citrus Woods by Abercrombie & Fitch is a unisex fragrance that combines the earthy notes of vetiver, the rich aroma of black tea, and the creamy scent of sandalwood. This balanced blend offers a versatile and sophisticated scent experience.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo - Fico di Amalfi

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: La Nuit de L'Homme Bleu Électrique
