title: Citrus Splash Lime perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Splash by Lime is a Aromatic Fougere fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Splash was launched in 2025. Top notes are Mandarin, Lemon, Neroli and Fig; middle notes are Tonka Bean, White Musk, Patchouli and Vetiver; base notes are Aquatic notes, Orange Blossom, Green Notes, Eucalyptus and Jasmine. Citrus Splash by Lime is described as a citrus-fougère composition introduced in 2025. It highlights bright citrus and neroli over fresh green nuances, evolving with musky, tonka, and earthy facets, and finishing with aquatic, floral, and eucalyptus tones.

title: Citrus Liqueur Woman Exuma Parfums perfume - a fragrance for women 2018
description: Citrus Liqueur Woman by Exuma Parfums is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women. Citrus Liqueur Woman was launched in 2018. Top notes are Bergamot, Mandarin Orange and Lavender; middle notes are Orange Blossom and Jasmine; base notes are Musk and Amber.

reviews.name: Polanco
reviews.comment: Icy lemon with a hint of plastic. Very bright, not feminine at all. I like the artificial notes. It fades into a nice, cool citrusy floral. I like the matte bottle with a wooden cap.

reviews.name: Jacquis
reviews.comment: Exuma Citrus Liqueur is a refreshing citrus forward perfume. There is some depth and warmth from the musk which anchors this fragrance and makes it last much longer than the typical citrus. The lavender might also add some weight and some cream but is not pronounced on my skin on this 92F evening. Some light florals and orange blossom are also perceptible in the drydown which adds even more interest making this more than an average summer citrus.

reviews.name: mapache
reviews.comment: With this one...I expected a D&G Light Blue type fragrance. I would put in in the "family" of types of scents like Light Blue,but it is different and not a clone of it. IMHO, this is like a sweeter Mon Guerlain "type" scent. Mandarin orange/lavender....orange blossom for sure and jasmine.....balanced by amber/musk. I find the lavender is the most pronounced...with a "liquor" or "liquer" vibe to boot. Maybe a "richer" CK BE style....???? I mostly am getting lavender/orange blossom with boozy undertones. The sillage/projection/longevity of this is pretty decent,IMO. I really am liking this one so far !!! EDIT: After a few wearings of this.....some days...I get a bigger orange blossom....???....So....I now say the orange blossom/citrus is the most prominent.

title: Citrus Moon After Blow perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Moon by After Blow is a fragrance for women and men. Citrus Moon was launched in 2023. Top notes are Mandarin, Orange Oil and Lemon; middle notes are Neroli, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are Cedarwood and Amber. Citrus Moon by After Blow is a refreshing citrus fragrance that combines the invigorating scents of orange, mandarin, and lemon oils. The heart of the perfume reveals notes of neroli, rose, and jasmine, while the base is composed of white musks, amber, and cedarwood. This fragrance offers a balanced blend of citrus and musk, creating a luxurious scent experience.

title: Citrus Symphony Monkoku perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Symphony by Monkoku is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Symphony was launched in 2025. Top notes are Mandarin Orange, Aquatic notes and Lemon; middle note is Spicy Notes; base notes are Precious Woods, Cedarwood, Vanilla, Amber and Musk. Citrus Symphony by Monkoku is a unisex fragrance released in 2025 as part of the Monkoku Collection. It opens with lemon and mandarin orange accented by aquatic nuances, moves into a heart that features exotic and spicy tones, and settles into a warm base of amber, cedarwood, musk, precious woods, and vanilla. The composition emphasizes a fruity-citrus profile with a clean, woody-amber drydown.

title: Citrus Reign The Dua Brand perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025

title: Citrus & Sun Kenooz perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus & Sun by Kenooz is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus & Sun was launched in 2025. The nose behind this fragrance is Vincent Furria. Top notes are Bergamot, Italian Lemon and Lavender; middle notes are Tarragon, Cardamom and Wormwood; base notes are White Musk, Haitian Vetiver and Moss. Citrus & Sun by Kenooz is a citrus-aromatic fragrance that contrasts bright citrus with herbal and woody nuances. The composition opens with sparkling Italian lemon and bergamot accented by aromatic lavender. A heart of wormwood, tarragon, and cardamom introduces a slightly bitter, green, and spicy dimension. In the base, Haitian vetiver, white musk, and moss lend an earthy, soft, and subtly woody finish. Conceived as a scent that reflects warm, sunlit afternoons, Citrus & Sun emphasizes freshness and clarity while maintaining a gentle, grounded drydown. It is presented as an uplifting, versatile fragrance suitable for a wide range of occasions.

reviews.name: Teshin
reviews.comment: Really great citrusy and aromatic fragrance, at first it opens up zesty Citrusy cooling and super refreshing, then the lavender plays a big part making it more balanced Projection : 8/10 Longevity 8/10

title: Citrus Blend Parfumane perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Citrus Blend by Parfumane is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Blend was launched in 2022. The nose behind this fragrance is Bekir Kantarcı. Top notes are Bergamot and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Cedar and Jasmine; base notes are Ambergris and Musk.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: The One for Men Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: Barisbaltax
reviews.comment: This is probably the only fragrance that exists that I don't regret paying for. I seriously can't get it out of my head, it's one of the most joyful and mesmerizing things you can smell from a bottle. It lasts 7-8 hours on my skin. Just when I think it's gone, it reappears. You know how a scent takes you back to a certain time you spent with a certain person? This scent is what I want people to remember me by. I think I found my signature scent!

title: Citrus & Green Tea Notebook perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2019
description: Citrus & Green Tea by Notebook is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus & Green Tea was launched in 2019. Top notes are Green Tea, Lemon, Ginger, Tamarind and Star Anise; middle notes are White Rose, Jasmine and Floral Notes; base notes are Vetiver, Ambergris, White Musk and Oakmoss.

reviews.name: Ariete76
reviews.comment: The ceramic packaging is beautiful and the idea of the box containing the perfume in the shape of a notebook is beautiful, the perfume itself is not bad, nothing original, a light cologne already smelled and resented, tea and citrus fruits, slightly spicy fresh and nothing else! I don't notice the flowers at all, I repeat, it's a unisex perfumed water that is fine for every day, especially in summer and at the price it is available.

reviews.name: daenrf
reviews.comment: This really does smell identical to Arden's Green Tea! I paid less than 8 euros for a 100ml and that puts it in the "absolute treasure" category in my books. It's a fabulous scent for the summer heat, and shouldn't put anyone off even in close quarters. I don't yet know about longevity, but I'm not that concerned about it to begin with. Green Tea never lasts long, and I still love it in summer. I can always refresh when needed. One thing to note: the sprayer is not great, and you need to spritz a few times to get the same amount as a generous sprayer would give. But that's the only drawback I can think of. (Edited to add: The sprayer started working better, so it may have been just a manufacturing thing. Perhaps the straw was empty or the sprayer needed priming?) I would call this a safe blind buy for lovers of Arden's Green Tea.

reviews.name: passionata20
reviews.comment: 07. November 2011 It is a drug store fragrance and it has a drug store quality to it. It is sold now here for 15 eur 100ml (a discount, otherwise normal price is around 25 eur), so i thought i would try it. It is a complete copy of classic Elizabeth Arden Green tea fragrance: it has citruses and green tea notes as most prominent. at first spray you can smell ginger and bit of floral, but they disappear very quickly and basically what you are left with is a faint citrus green tea combo. Sillage is low and lasting power is weak as well. Not much to say about it. I can buy EA Green tea for same amount basically. It is what it is....

title: Citrus Elixir Carolina Herrera perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2017
description: Citrus Elixir by Carolina Herrera is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Elixir was launched in 2017. The fragrance features Orange, Bergamot and Citruses.

Citrus Tonic by Parfums Genty is a citrus-focused fragrance for men released in 2025 within the Grande Cologne Collection. reviews.name: saho93
reviews.comment: This is very sophisticated fresh citrus perfume. Perfect for summer but will work well for spring and winter.

title: Citrus Forest Eau de Toilette Aqua Savon perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Forest Eau de Toilette by Aqua Savon is a fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Forest Eau de Toilette was launched in 2025. The fragrance features Bergamot, Soap, Citrus and Lemon. AQUA SAVON by アクアシャボン is a limited edition fragrance that combines fresh citrus notes with gentle floral and woody accords. The scent is designed to evoke a natural, clean impression reminiscent of soap, offering a soft and comforting aroma. The formula includes bergamot and lemon essential oils.

title: Citrus Spell Savour perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Citrus Spell by Savour is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Spell was launched in 2021. The nose behind this fragrance is Linda Landenberg. The fragrance features Neroli, Petitgrain Paraguay, Lemon, Rhubarb, Bitter Orange, Blood Orange, Artemisia, Orange Blossom, Balsam Fir, Ginger, Jasmine, Musk and Honeysuckle.

reviews.name: Vellocet
reviews.comment: Maybe i’m doomed to compare all citrus based perfumes because of Atelier Cologne who does them best of ALL. No other brand can compete with them in that area. This note list, which is impressing, didn’t really impress me. It’s a nice citrus scent without smelling like air fresheners that many do. That itself is a big plus. Perhaps i’m biased because of how Atelier Cologne makes absurdly photorealistic, juicy citrus scents that I can’t be an objective judge to any other citrus profiled perfumes. With that said, this is an uplifting and balanced freshie, an easy grab and non offensive. And the Savour bottles? Incredibly beautiful!

reviews.name: Gilsan
reviews.comment: It smells like vacation in a bottle. 🥰 Similar to one of the Aqua di Parma (can’t remember which one though) It’s a white floral and citrus, yes. But not sharp. The fruits and greens come through making it all very balanced!

reviews.name: i_am_just_a_beauty_lover
reviews.comment: Another mediteranean summer in a bottle created by the amazing perfumer Linda Landenberg.🥰 If you love the scent of neroli, you will love Citrus Spell too. This is a neroli-orange blossom forward, with a soft, slightly sweet ginger and rhubarb combo, that I sense a little soapy at first. Shortly after, Citrus Spell becomes more interesting, when a heady, nectary honeysuckle scent comes to the scene, which again gives me summer vibes. The scent of honeysuckle reminds me of my summers in childhood and I love it. My mom used to have a big bush of honeysuckle in front of our house and the shrubs were spreaded close to my bedroom's window. I loved sense it early in the morning or at night, when it's scent was the strongest. I love sensing it in Citrus Spell. Once it dries down is when the citrusy magic happen. At this point I can sense the scent of citruses tempering down the sweet floral scent with a refreshing touch, which makes Citrus Spell a great choice for warm weather. When you read the name, you would think that Citrus Spell is a refreshing fragrance with lots of citruses, but I would say that this is a beautiful, elegant floral fragrance with a fresh twist. If you love this scent profile, man or woman, you will love Citrus Spell.

reviews.name: toffelin
reviews.comment: It starts off with a beautiful white floral scent from mainly neroli and orange blossom (but it also has jasmine in it) mixed with fresh citruses (lemon and blood orange) and also a green and bitter scent (petitgrain, bitter orange, ginger, balsam fir and artemisia). I also get some tartness from rhubarb in there and all of this feels very luxurious, calming and spa-like. After a few minutes honeysuckle turns up in the mix and that makes it even more beautiful. It's very floral and thick, but the citruses really gives it a fresh touch and I also get a kind of soapy clean feeling that has to be coming from the musk. Later the thick white floral part calms down and it turns more musky and at this point it gives me a nice feeling of sun warmed skin. Like when you have been on the beach all day and the skin gets that summery scent of warm skin mixed with a little bit of suntan lotion. Wonderful! I really enjoy these kind of white floral, clean, citrusy fresh, musky, calming spa-ish fragrances, but for some reason I almost never wear them. So I don't think that I'm going to buy a bottle of it even though it's truly beautiful and I really enjoy wearing it. If this fragrance came as a bath oil, bath & shower gel or some other kind of bath product I think I would buy it though... or maybe even a scented candle to put in the bathroom while taking a nice, soothing bath, since it gives me such a luxurious and calming spa feeling.

title: Citrus Bomb YOU perfume - a new fragrance for women 2025
description: Citrus Bomb by YOU is a Aromatic Fougere fragrance for women. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Bomb was launched in 2025. Top notes are Verbena, Marine notes, Violet Leaf and Pineapple; middle notes are Osmanthus, Geranium, Cinnamon and Peach; base notes are Chocolate, Oakmoss, Vetiver and Tobacco. Citrus Bomb by YOU is an eau de parfum for women introduced in 2025. It presents a fougère-leaning structure where marine notes, verbena, pineapple, and violet leaf lead into a heart of cinnamon, geranium, osmanthus, and peach, settling on a base of chocolate, tobacco, vetiver, and oakmoss. The composition contrasts tart fruit and aromatic facets with warm spice and a cocoa-tobacco finish.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Q by Dolce & Gabbana Eau de Parfum Intense
Solo Loewe Ella Eau de Toilette

title: Citrus Effect The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Effect by The Dua Brand is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Effect was launched in 2023. The fragrance features Guaiac Wood, Black Tea, Citron, Lemon, Smoke and Lime. Citrus Effect by The Dua Brand is an inspired expression of the fragrance Citron Noir by Hermès. This fragrance is classified as a citrus fragrance and comes in a concentration of Extrait de Parfum. The 30ml (1 fl. oz) bottle is perfect for those who want to try this intriguing blend of citrus, tea, and smoke. The longevity of Citrus Effect is highly impressive, ensuring that you can enjoy the scent for an extended period of time. Claim your bottle today and discover a potential new favorite fragrance. The notes in Citrus Effect include lemon, lime, smoke, citron, guaiac wood, and black tea. This fragrance presents a dichotomy of smells, with a bright and flavorful opening contrasted by darker and smoky ingredients. The unconventional touch of smoke in a citrus dominant fragrance adds depth and complexity. The animalic tendencies in this composition are apparent as well, making it an intriguing choice for those who appreciate unique scents. Citrus Effect belongs to the olfactory group of 'Citrus Aromatic', perfectly capturing the essence of its contrasted ingredients.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: The One for Men Eau de Parfum
Beau De Jour Eau de Parfum
Mercedes Benz Club Black Eau de Toilette

reviews.name: Danielsan24
reviews.comment: Love this one. Opens up with a lemon candy that slowly turns to a dark citric fragrance which is lovely for summer nights or anytime of year really it’s amazing for what is it and what it’s cloning

reviews.name: Clone Drone
reviews.comment: The citrus and smoke combo works surprisingly well. It has a very creamy attribute to it that really fits summer nights or fall vibes.

reviews.name: Arber Cami
reviews.comment: Very pleasant smoky, woody citrus scent. I havent smelled Hermes Eau de Citron. Opens up very crisp from citruses, dries down to a crisp, citrusy, woody fragrance with some subtle smokiness in the back. Very nice and very versatile.

title: Citrus & Cedar Cologne Mist Bath & Body Works perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus & Cedar Cologne Mist by Bath & Body Works is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus & Cedar Cologne Mist was launched in 2023. The fragrance features Citruses and Cedar.

reviews.name: Stevendee
reviews.comment: Out of all of these neutral cologne mists that Bath & Body Works has put out, I was certain that this was the one I wouldn't like....however, it has become my absolute favorite scent out there and for one good reason, LAYERING!! I will apply the body cream before applying any of my citrusy/ woodsy fragrances, which just so happen to be a lot of the fragrances on the market, and then overlay a bit of the cologne mist to top it off. I'm always getting complimented when I do this.

title: Citrus Vanille Trudi Bleu London perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2018
description: Citrus Vanille by Trudi Bleu London is a Citrus Gourmand fragrance for women and men. Citrus Vanille was launched in 2018. Top notes are Citruses, Rum and Spices; middle notes are Sandalwood, Rose and Vetiver; base notes are Vanilla, Sandalwood and Musk. "An aromatic spicy fragrance that is caressed by the vibrancy of citrus notes and cradled into a soft embrace of Vanilla . The beautiful redolence is constituted with the most prime Indian essences of Sandalwood , Rose and Vetiver modernly crafted in Switzerland . The ambidextrous accords of the perfume exude the versatility of ones personality and also stands for the multifaceted and dynamic people of the society . Luxuriate in this exquisite blend." - a note from the brand.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Allure Homme Edition Blanche Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: Cannonball
reviews.comment: Both Trudi Bleu Citrus Vanille and Xerjoff Uden have been compared to Chanel Allure Homme Edition Blanche. I disagree. I find Edition Blanche to be more lemony and sharper. In my opinion, however, Citrus Vanille and Uden ARE very similar. I'm not particular fond of either. But if you're into this scent profile, I would recommend this over Uden for it's price and better longevity. You will get Citrus Vanille for around $70 (100ml) while Uden costs around $200+ (50ml).

reviews.name: Fragaddict1111
reviews.comment: This is the first trudi perfume I sniffed, it's very warm, clean and sexy. My husband got it for himself and it made me try their entire line. It’s so so good If you like rich citrus this is a must-try, It's unique and expensive-smelling,lasts forever and it leaves a nice, airy trail too. I think this would be a perfect signature; very loveable :)

reviews.name: metalmickey
reviews.comment: A slightly darker citrus with lovely vannile base offering a decent longeivity and projection...happy its from my home land....long way to go guys...

title: Citrus Bliss KŌDŌ perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Bliss by KŌDŌ is a fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Bliss was launched in 2025. The fragrance features Madagascar Vanilla, Sweet Orange, Black Pepper, Mandarin, Lemon and Sugar. A unique take on your classic Summer Citrus fragrance. Boozy, Fresh, Sweet. A spritz of this scent truly feels like Sunshine in a bottle!

reviews.name: RecoveringDiorAddict
reviews.comment: TRULY BLISS! Citrus Bliss is clean, uplifting--yet calming. The notes: lemon, sweet orange, mandarin, Madagascar vanilla, caramelized sugar, and black pepper are blended incredibly well! Each note harmonizes effortlessly with the others. Spraying my sofa, cushions (pillows) and curtains with this fragrance after daily cleaning is a reward. It positively changes how my home feels to guests--and how ~I~ feel being in my home. HIGHLY recommend!

title: Citrus Harmony Loris Parfum perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Harmony by Loris Parfum is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Harmony was launched in 2025. Top notes are Bergamot, Orange and Melon; middle notes are Neroli, Ginger and Cinnamon; base notes are Black Tea, Ambroxan and Olibanum. Citrus Harmony by Loris is a fragrance built around a bright citrus and aromatic profile. It opens with juicy melon, orange, and bergamot, leading into a spiced heart where ginger and cinnamon are softened by neroli. The base introduces a more resinous and modern character through black tea, olibanum, and ambroxan, giving the composition a gently smoky and slightly woody drydown.

title: Citrus Bliss La Fann perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Citrus Bliss by La Fann is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Bliss was launched in 2021. Top notes are Grapefruit, Caramel and Citruses; middle notes are Sage, Floral Notes and Iris; base notes are Ambrette, Musk and Woody Notes. The sage plant, which has many benefits throughout history, is blended with sea salt and the powdery scent of iris flower, providing a fresh touch to your soul. The delicate feeling of caramel and musk envelops you all day long.

title: Citrus & Lavender The Lab Fragrances perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2024
description: Citrus & Lavender by The Lab Fragrances is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus & Lavender was launched in 2024. Top notes are Bergamot, Lemon and Grapefruit; middle notes are Lavender, Iris and Rose; base notes are Musk, Sandalwood, Cedarwood and Amber.

title: Citrus Laundry Everyday perfume - a fragrance for women 2020
description: Citrus Laundry by Everyday is a Citrus fragrance for women. Citrus Laundry was launched in 2020. Top notes are Lemon, Citruses and Pomelo; middle notes are Jasmine, Bamboo and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Amber and Musk.

reviews.name: nescience
reviews.comment: Pretty accurate description by kindreddd, paired with the abyssmal performance, this just ain't it for me. Granted this is like 4-5 dollars tops, but I've tested local clones at the same price point that blow this one out of the water when it comes to longevity and sillage. Good thing a friend of mine loves this one, I'll just give this to her than let it collect dust in my drawer.

reviews.name: kindreddd
reviews.comment: wear this if you want to be a walking maxx honey lemon candy and joy lemon dishwashing liquid

title: Citrus Paradisi Cologne Czech & Speake perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2000
description: Citrus Paradisi Cologne by Czech & Speake is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Paradisi Cologne was launched in 2000. Top notes are Grapefruit, Green Notes and Spices; middle notes are Oakmoss, Coriander and Pepper; base notes are Patchouli and Amber. The Citrus Paradisi is an unusual and striking fresh fragrance. It is inspired by the vibrancy of youth and the challenge of creating a fragrance that would provide a long lasting aroma with the grapefruit oil. Grapefruit is renowned for its volatile form and fast evaporation. Therefore, by blending it with Oak Moss, Patchouli and Orientalgris, Mr. Sawkins produced a fragrance that was as fruity as it was long lasting. Available in 100 ml Cologne. Introduced in 2000.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Comme des Garcons Series 3 Incense: Avignon

reviews.name: another leon
reviews.comment: This is disguising! It smells exactly like cat piss! 🤢

reviews.name: Chrisandra
reviews.comment: To me, it seems heavily-inspired by Monsieur Balmain, both in the notes and the bottle shape, but Balmain's seems way better.

reviews.name: kishka
reviews.comment: This is beautiful, anyone who smells cat pee is a philistine and wouldn’t know class if it landed on their head! It’s quiet, doesn’t last a huge amount of time but citrus colognes never do, but it’s gorgeous. Opens grapefruit, bergamot and later an underlying spicy clove accord comes through. I love it and I’ll buy a full bottle for summer!

reviews.name: cho-ku-rei
reviews.comment: Initial application: I smell like a peculiarly citrusy mulled wine – and I like it! 20 minutes later, the (synthetic) civet and coriander emerge during the early stage dry down. Still enjoying it very much. The listed notes are all clearly apparent, though I do still have a very faint lingering "mulled wine" note, which may well be from the interaction with my skin, as I can't immediately attribute this to the listed ingredients or blend, per se. A well-balanced scent; zesty and clean-smelling, but with enough with just enough complexity and depth to elevate what could have been a generic citrusy EDC experience. The synthetic civet adds a kind of "hormonal" vibe, for want of a better word. I don't mind that at all, at least on this occasion, as I think it adds interest here. But this is what possibly other reviewers are identifying as the "sour" or "urinal" note? I wouldn't buy this, but would enjoy it on somebody else, and think it would suit a variety of people, without being limited to any particular demographic or season really, though possibly better suited to summer or early autumn. I think it is a little pricy, though.

reviews.name: Q80
reviews.comment: i really like this fragrance allot as i sense a nice citrus in away that it is not overdone and not repetitive! and honestly i really wonder why do people smell bad things in it! i mean just like my friend, when he sniff it he said it's like the smell of a male organ! it's a mix of grapefruit, oak moss, cedar, spices and pepper with a dark background of patchouli and amber. kind of dark a bit and very pleasant. but maybe it's because those guys works in bathroom manufacturing so they use bleaching like note in their fragrances that gives the impression of making an imaginative thoughts over it that it smells unpleasant! just a thought but it remains a good fragrance.

reviews.name: Ouch!
reviews.comment: This simplicity of naming your fragrance the botanical name for grapefruit! HA! Not my cup of tea at all. While I love grapefruit in fragrances, this went beyond the realms of citrus into almost...erm...pissy. Sorry! Striking as a gentlemanly cologne, but way beyond sharp and indolic. It felt slightly unpleasant to me. The balance of citrus, oakmoss and spice made this feel like a fougere on crack. The combination of citrus in spices clashes majorly and to me, it makes for an unpleasant experience. I know this house has much more to offer and I have many more samples to try out so, for a first foray into this brand? I'm giving this one a miss!

reviews.name: ParfumFetiche
reviews.comment: This review is based on their sample. I get a short-lived grapefruit on top with a stale cat pee accord. After a few minutes, it's just the stale cat pee in all its glory. Moderate projection and longevity on my skin.

reviews.name: Blu Garcon
reviews.comment: I got this as a blind buy and this will be my first negative review: Dry Grapefruit Juice and Cat Litter Box Piss on my shirt; on the skin, freshly lathered Vicks Vapor Rub with sharp grapefruit pith and rind and then horny cat spray or urine soaked diapers. I'm washing my shirt then taking a shower. VERY DISAPPOINTED!!!

reviews.name: shirl
reviews.comment: I don't get Citrus or cats pee from this. It simply smells masculine, it's nice and inoffensive. I would not pay £65, to me it's a drugstore scent.

reviews.name: Shanester66
reviews.comment: My 7 year old son said..."that smells like a fart". Nuff said! lol

reviews.name: PlunketNurse
reviews.comment: I recieved a fresh sample of this direct from the company themselve, quite simply the best scent in the 'cologne' genre i have ever had the pleasure to come across, open up with a generic citrus smell, but there is a constant mouthwatering green fruity tone just lingering below the effervescent grapefruit and spice. The oakmoss gives it depth, something many cologne lack, i detect no patchoulli at work nor any cat urine note. I suspect that is should be a combination of grapegruit and sweat at work or perhaps just unfortunate chemistry. i do wish to have a bottle if it wasnt so overpriced, nevertheless high quality ingredients that do not come of synthetic at all, it is quite simply citrus paradisi to me :)

reviews.name: sherapop
reviews.comment: Although others have blamed civet for the "cat pee" and "urinal" cast of Czech & Speake CITRUS PARADISI, it seems from the manufacturer's card that the source of the dirtiness is actually ambergris, also derived from animals (concretized excretions from the intestines of sperm whales--or synthetic facsimiles featuring ambrein, etc.), hence animalic. I think that the oakmoss is contributing as well, casting a grayish shadow of sorts over an otherwise clarion citrus cologne featuring grapefruit. The main problem, for me, is that this cologne smells characteristically masculine. It does not smell feminine at all and pushes the limits of unisex, it seems to me. There are plenty of citrus colognes around with which I am smitten, so I can safely skip this Czech & Speake creation, leaving more for those who love it. You are most welcome. Happy to oblige. (-;

reviews.name: Gorgon71
reviews.comment: As a Citrus lover I was expecting to adore this... But I find it so intensely sour and indeed there are hints of the urinal! Infact its the aroma of a mens urinal (Urine and those fragrant cubes the pop in them) This is a fragrance that had so much promise but I find it down right horrid- and at a high cost.

reviews.name: Krickard
reviews.comment: Smells like someone who has not washed for 3 days trying to mask their funky B.O. with grapefruit juice. Interesting, but ultimately not something I would wear.

reviews.name: alfarom
reviews.comment: Grease your wet hairs with a citrus flavored ointment when you're freshly shaved and while wearing a classic fougere and you'll get an idea of what Citrus Paradisi is all about. Animalic (boatloads of civet) and dirty/fresh. Challening, compelling and anusually classic. Try it if you dare... Rating: 7/10

reviews.name: karlovonamesti
reviews.comment: Overrated AND misunderstood - what a combo. First, it's overrated, and that's saying it kindly. So many here and on other forums feel this is a very interesting and subversive citrus fragrance. Yeah, the grapefruit is tangy and sour, maybe not the first choice for more conventional citrus perfumes. But really, beyond its basic profile, Citrus Paradisi does nothing but display the grapefruit accord with total clarity. Quality ingredients are at work here, and the fruit is fresh and vibrant. Still, the scent is often misinterpreted. The citrus is not the offending factor to so many noses - it's the impeccably blended civet that underlies everything. This animalic element gives the fragrance a pungency it might otherwise lack. Everything here is well-composed, but not very compelling. You have a sour, funky citrus that dries down to a pissy ghost of its former self, tinged with a stale suggestion of cigarette tobacco. I just don't know why I'd spent the major dollars on this. Sample and give it some careful consideration, but I wouldn't stress if you feel it's not for you - it's not a compliment getter, and not much fun to wear.

reviews.name: ceekay
reviews.comment: I mostly get cat pee. I can't imagine anyone wearing this. The bottle even looks like it's full of urine sample. What the hell is going on here?

reviews.name: sky76sky
reviews.comment: "Unusual & striking" it speaks no lies....although I had not thought that an old, outdoor privy would be the scent-concept for this "citrus paradise"! Oh, I know you are all falling over yourselves to try this now...so for all you wee-fanatics out there I shall delve further into this lavatorial liquor for a fuller fragrance description. "But is it possible to grade & classify your pee?" I hear you cry! Why, of course! Silly you if you have never sampled the intoxicating aromas of asparagus-wee, the depth of morning "water" or those tangy fish-piss notes. Oh, you’re missing out on so much olfactory fun! Here is old, stale urine in all its glory! Sweet with a sickly undertone that you can't help but re-sniff even though it turns your stomach. I’m gunning for male-wee here….more substance, more balls. What's more it has a delightful stable feel to it – herby hay, mouldy moss, citrus saddle soap & earthy, grimy, unclean bodies of both human & horse. To further spice it up: ancient, greasy suede chaps & well-used leather trousers all marinated in a trickle of the golden liquor for years & years…this wasn’t created from a one-wee whim! This took dedication. Urine! Pee! Piss! & Wee! Finally, here is a substantial male flanker to Anglomania if you want to go for that all-important his n’ hers down-there theme. One to whip out when you want to pull off that "has she or hasn't she?" wet-pant smell when you're not blessed with a full bladder or you've already filled your Tena-lady. Perhaps a more fitting name would be "Golden Shower" or "Urolagnia" – I was becoming quite a perfume bore before I smelled this offering, so thank you, C&S, thank you for creating this great olfactory joke! It almost made me pee my leather pants with laughter ;p

title: Citrus Blossom Sabon perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2019
description: Citrus Blossom by Sabon is a Floral Woody Musk fragrance for women and men. Citrus Blossom was launched in 2019. Top notes are Bergamot, Mandarin Orange and Petitgrain; middle notes are Orange Blossom and Jasmine; base notes are Patchouli, Vanilla and Musk. "Celebrate every moment of pure joy with Citrus Blossom, when you feel like dancing in the street and embracing everyone who shares this jubilant mood. Vivaciously cheerful, the festive combination of harmonious citrus orange and bergamot seems to leap out of the bottle, filling the air with its bright, brilliant fragrance. The deeper orange blossom tonality, lauded for its vibrant notes, brings a rich, reassuring depth lightened by creamy vanilla and sensual musk. An ideal fragrance for all the times you can’t stop smiling and want to share this elated sensation with the whole world." -Brand Info.

reviews.name: smmegst
reviews.comment: Soapy (to be expected) and very accurate to the other body products I own in this sent range. That being said it does not project nor last very long, I now primarily spray this on my sheets before reading in bed or snuggling with my cat and I do not plan on repurchasing

title: Citrus Bloom Qhue perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Citrus Bloom by Qhue is a fragrance for women and men. Citrus Bloom was launched in 2021. The nose behind this fragrance is Quentin Hernandez. The fragrance features Lavender, Bergamot, Eucalyptus and Lemon. Introducing our vibrant Citrus Bloom Parfum D'ambiance, a fragrance that invigorates both your home and your personal space. Immerse yourself in the uplifting fusion of zesty citrus notes and delicate floral blooms. The refreshing burst of citrus awakens your senses while the soft floral undertones add a touch of elegance. This versatile fragrance can be used as a personal scent, allowing you to carry the essence of a blooming garden wherever you go. Transform your surroundings with the enticing and invigorating aroma of our Citrus Bloom Parfum D'ambiance, bringing a burst of freshness and vitality to any environment.

title: Citrus Zest + Spiced Lavender Tuoksu perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Zest + Spiced Lavender by Tuoksu is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Zest + Spiced Lavender was launched in 2023. Top notes are Orange Blossom, Bergamot and Mandarin; middle notes are Lavender, Cloves and Lilac; base notes are Orris Root, Cinnamon and Black Amber. The beating heart of all perfume traditions is the citrus note. Calabrian Bergamot, sweet orange concrete, and delicate mandarin are expertly blended with Spanish Jasmine and sun-soaked lavender. Every spray is a slice of sunshine.

title: Citrus Of Italy The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Of Italy by The Dua Brand is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Of Italy was launched in 2023. The fragrance features Musk Mallow, Ambrette, Bitter Orange, Musk, Green Notes, Blood Orange, Mandarin Orange and Amalfi Lemon. Citrus Of Italy by The Dua Brand is a unisex fragrance that belongs to the Citrus olfactory group. This fragrance is classified as an Extrait de Parfum, ensuring a longer-lasting scent experience throughout the day. With a concentration of 36 ML (1.2 FL.OZ), it offers a generous amount of product to enjoy. The Dua Brand is known for providing exceptional longevity in their fragrances, and Citrus Of Italy is no exception. It captures the essence of summer with its vibrant and luminous composition, featuring notes such as blood orange, bitter orange, mandarin orange, lemon from Amalfi, and more. The heart and base notes of ambrette and musk create a smooth and velvety tone, adding sophistication to this captivating fragrance. The notes in Citrus Of Italy include blood orange, assorted citrus ingredients, ambrette, bitter orange, Amalfi lemon, musk mallow, mandarin orange, green notes, and musk. This combination creates a bright and refreshing scent that will leave you enamored with its aura. The diverse citrus flavors blend harmoniously to provide a luminous and invigorating experience. The opening notes will entice you with their irresistible allure, while the heart and base notes establish a smooth and velvety tone. This fragrance evokes the essence of Italy's citrus groves, allowing you to indulge in the delightful scent without having to travel. Citrus Of Italy can be enjoyed by both men and women, making it a versatile choice for those who appreciate the invigorating and uplifting qualities of citrus fragrances.

reviews.name: esteban747
reviews.comment: This is marketed by Dua Brand as a copy of Italian Citrus, which is basically a traditional cologne in the form of a perfume. Citrus of Italy is not refreshing. It’s not bright and happy. It doesn’t bring images of a carefree day in Amalfi. First, I got a blast of something synthetic, and it wasn’t pretty. And then it’s a mash of honeyed bitter rind and dirty musk. I’m not offended or upset by the scent but mostly because of the false description of the fragrance.

title: Citrusy Blossom Monotheme Venezia perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2019
description: Citrusy Blossom by Monotheme Venezia is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrusy Blossom was launched in 2019. Top notes are Citruses and Green Notes; middle note is Citrus Blossom; base notes are Woodsy Notes and Musk.

reviews.name: Florind
reviews.comment: It's not middle sex. It smells manly and womanly at the same time. It's nice for men, and wearable for women. I can figure out 3 stages of piramid(proportion and sillage) respectively. the bottom, main - warm wood (manly) middle - sweet citrus the smallest - citrus blossom (womanly)

title: Citrus Sea Party The Dua Brand perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Sea Party by The Dua Brand is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Sea Party was launched in 2025. Top notes are Mandarin Orange and Bergamot; middle notes are Frankincense, Fig Leaf and Cardamom; base notes are Sandalwood, Ambroxan and Ambrette.

title: CITRUS BLEND LANSY cologne - a fragrance for men 2023
description: CITRUS BLEND by LANSY is a Aromatic Fruity fragrance for men. CITRUS BLEND was launched in 2023. Top notes are Grapefruit, Lemon and Pineapple; middle notes are Thyme, French orange flower and Jasmine; base notes are Tonka, Musk, Birch, Moss and Patchouli.

title: Citrus Peony Dossier perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Peony by Dossier is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Blackcurrant, Bergamot and Mandarin; middle notes are Apricot, Peony and Rose; base notes are Raspberry and Peach. Citrus Peony by Dossier is a floral fruity fragrance with a bright and soft character. The composition opens with mandarin, bergamot, and blackcurrant, followed by a heart of rose, peony, and apricot. Musk, peach, and raspberry in the base give the scent a smooth, lightly fruity finish.

reviews.name: Eriksen
reviews.comment: This is very nice. Citrus floral, and soapy. This is NOT a copy/dupe of Miss Dior Blooming Bouquet 2014, nor the new formulation. At the very best, it has a 40% similarities to the 2014, and even less to the new version. That said, it is a very very nice, safe, office friendly scent ⭐

title: Citrus Aurea The Today Project perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Aurea by The Today Project is a fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Aurea was launched in 2025. The nose behind this fragrance is Sebastien Lacouture. Top notes are Calabrian bergamot, Cardamom and Green Leaves; middle notes are Aquatic notes, Violet Leaf and Fig; base notes are Guaiac Wood, Patchouli and Musk.

title: Citrus and Amber Taif Al Emarat perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus and Amber by Taif Al Emarat is a Oriental fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Violet and Citrus; middle note is Coconut; base note is Amber. Citrus and Amber by Taif Al Emarat is a fragrance from the brand's Violet Collection. It opens with a combination of bright citrus notes and violet, moves into a soft, creamy heart of coconut, and settles on a warm amber base. The composition focuses on the contrast between fresh, airy facets and a gentle, resinous warmth.

title: Citrus Vetiver C.O.Bigelow perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2016
description: Citrus Vetiver by C.O.Bigelow is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Vetiver was launched in 2016. Top notes are Yuzu and Bergamot; middle notes are Cedar and Iris; base notes are Vetiver, Musk, Vanilla and Benzoin.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto di Calabria

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: L'Envol de Cartier Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: JardinHomme
reviews.comment: The bergamot and yuzu blend together with the vetiver to smell similar to verbena, with musk, cedar, and iris rounding out a pleasant unisex fragrance. With its low to moderate sillage and good longeivity in EdT form, this would be perfect for summer days at the office. Citrus Vetiver has a citrus sparkle on its surface and just enough depth to distinguish itself from other citrus fragrances. Vetiver lovers may want to look elsewhere, but this bottle deserves a sniff from even the nichiest fragrance snob wanting to refresh their olfactic palette.

reviews.name: Allen-at-home
reviews.comment: Okay, this review is for the LOTION, NOT the cologne. LEMON, LEMON, LEMON, that's all I smell. What more can I say?

title: Citrus Vault Monkoku cologne - a new fragrance for men 2026
description: Citrus Vault by Monkoku is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Vault was launched in 2026. Top notes are Grapefruit, Pineapple and Bergamot; middle notes are Patchouli, Cedarwood and Jasmine; base notes are Oakmoss and Dry Wood.

title: Citrus Musk Agua perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Musk by Agua is a Citrus Gourmand fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Musk was launched in 2025. Top notes are Calabrian bergamot, Sicilian Orange and Lemon; middle note is Fruits; base notes are Madagascar Vanilla, White Musk and Amber. Citrus Musk by Agua is a unisex fragrance built around bright citrus notes and a soft musky drydown. The composition opens with a vivid blend of Sicilian orange, lemon, and Calabrian bergamot, creating a fresh, zesty impression. A heart of Mediterranean fruits adds a nuanced fruity layer, bridging the initial sparkle with the warmer base. In the drydown, white musk is combined with Madagascar vanilla and amber, lending a smooth, slightly sweet and comforting character that contrasts with the crisp citrus opening. The result is a fragrance that moves from luminous and refreshing to gently warm and musky, suitable for a variety of occasions and seasons.

title: Citrus Citta 明净之水 Lapot Studio 窄門 perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Citrus Citta 明净之水 by Lapot Studio 窄門 is a fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Citta 明净之水 was launched in 2025. The nose behind this fragrance is Antoine Lie. Top notes are Calabrian bergamot, Clover and Peppermint; middle notes are Jasmine, Geranium, Clary Sage, Chamomile and Lavender; base notes are Amber, Oakmoss and Patchouli. Inhale the essence of a sun-drenched Italian grove, where the air is alive with whispers of citrus and the gentle caress of nature’s breath. citrus citta invites you on a fragrant journey through the heart of Calabria, where the luminous bergamot dances under the golden sun, painting the air with its vibrant spirit. This is not merely a fragrance; it is a symphony of aromas, a poetic ode to the beauty of the natural world. As the first light of dawn breaks, fresh peppermint springs forth, crisp and invigorating, a refreshing breeze that awakens the senses and stirs the soul. A delicate embrace of clary sage follows, its herbaceous warmth weaving a tapestry of tranquility that envelops you in a serene embrace. And then, like a lullaby carried on the wind, lavender blooms, its soothing notes cascading softly, inviting peace and calmness into your heart. But the story does not end there. Beneath this fragrant canopy, the earth reveals its secrets. Rich patchouli unfurls in a dance of depth and mystery, its earthy embrace grounding the spirit, while the lush, smoky undertones of vetiver weave through like ancient roots, connecting you to the very earth beneath your feet. Citrus Citta is a fragrant poem, each note a verse that tells the tale of nature’s harmony—a reminder to find beauty in every moment and to breathe deeply of life’s rich offerings. Embrace the essence of serenity and sophistication; let this fragrance be your guide to an exquisite journey of the senses.

title: Citrus Dream Victoria's Secret perfume - a fragrance for women 2013
description: Citrus Dream by Victoria's Secret is a Citrus fragrance for women. Citrus Dream was launched in 2013. The fragrance features Grapefruit and Red Lily. Citrus Dream of Sparkling Citrus collection is a lively and sparkling scent of grapefruit and red lilies. Available as 250 ml Fragrance Mist.

reviews.name: ThisIsOurBlanket
reviews.comment: I love this. It's simple...and smells like gummy bears..haha. smells great in summer layered with coconut body lotion :)

reviews.name: Luminan
reviews.comment: I have it as a body mist. It's ok, but a rather boring scent. This And lemon escape were blind buys :)

reviews.name: Cw830
reviews.comment: It's as sweet as a watermelon jolly rancher, and I appreciate how the floral and citrus mix. I think the floral dampens the sour to salty after-note usually interpreted from citruses. The sillage is tight and longevity around 2 hours for me. I intend to use this as a car fragrance because it is fresh and clean, but I do believe it's wearable. I was worried it was too sweet when summer rolled around - but this gives a clean sweetness that is not sticky.

reviews.name: caitrun
reviews.comment: This is a delicious gummy bear scent! Seriously smells like gummy bears, not excellent lasting power, but very tasty :).

title: Citrus River The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Citrus River by The Dua Brand is a Oriental fragrance for women and men. Citrus River was launched in 2021. The fragrance features Bitter Orange, Tolu Balsam, Bergamot, Tarragon, Cardamom, Cognac, Amber, Lemon and Mint. Citrus River by The Dua Brand is an oriental fragrance that is sure to captivate your senses. Inspired by the renowned designer brand Tom Ford, this fragrance is a fresh, warm, herbal, and resinous blend that is perfect for both men and women. With a concentration of Extrait de Parfum, you can expect a long-lasting and intense scent experience. This fragrance comes in a 30 ML (1 FL.OZ) bottle, making it convenient for on-the-go use. The notes in Citrus River include bitter orange, amber, bergamot, cognac, lemon, mint, tarragon, tolu balsam, and cardamom. Upon wearing this fragrance, you will be greeted with a burst of citrusy goodness from the bitter orange and lemon notes. The bergamot adds a touch of freshness while the mint and tarragon lend an herbal twist. As the fragrance develops, the warm and resinous base notes of amber and tolu balsam create a comforting and inviting aroma. Overall, Citrus River is a delightful blend of citrus, herbs, and resin that is sure to leave a lasting impression.

title: Citrus Blossom Perfume 45 Incense Parfums perfume - a fragrance for women
description: Citrus Blossom Perfume 45 by Incense Parfums is a fragrance for women. Top notes are Bergamot and Orange; middle notes are Orange Blossom, Aquatic notes and Jasmine; base notes are Guaiac Wood, Patchouli and Amber. Citrus Blossom Perfume 45 by Incense Parfums is a floral fragrance designed for women. It offers a harmonious blend of citrus, floral, and woody notes, resulting in a complex and distinctive scent suitable for everyday wear.

title: Citrus Sunrise La Fleur by Livvy perfume - a fragrance for women 2016
description: Citrus Sunrise by La Fleur by Livvy is a Citrus fragrance for women. Citrus Sunrise was launched in 2016. The nose behind this fragrance is Olivia Larson. Top notes are Grapefruit, Tangerine, Bergamot and Orange; middle notes are Geranium, Rose and Ylang-Ylang; base notes are Vanilla and Agarwood (Oud). "La Fleur by Livvy introduces “Scent O’ Clock,” a new collection consisting of four all-natural fragrances with a base note of Oud (Agarwood). All four fragrances in the collection can be worn singly or together. We can start off our fabulous day with refreshing citrusy notes by wearing Fragrance #1, Citrus Sunrise, followed by an afternoon with Fragrance #2, Spicy Surrender, worn to lunch or perhaps an afternoon tea. As we move into the evening, Fragrance #3, Flirty Florals, is perfect for a fun night out. Last but not least, Fragrance #4, Midnight Mortals, as the name suggests, will bringing us back to rest while its earthy notes play on. Citrus Sunrise (morning) by La Fleur By Livvy is a citrus fragrance. It is a surprising blend of citrus and oud that is wholly glorious. The usual sharp tang of citrus is tempered by rose, geranium, ylang-ylang, vanilla, and of course the oud. It is incidentally floral, lacking much of the usual sweetness of fruit, so coupled with the oud, it makes for a rather unisex scent. Citrus Sunrise is a warmer, cozier citrus; like a bowl of oranges and grapefruits resting on an weathered wooden country farm table. It is a powerful morning pick-me-up not to be missed out on - a very unique and complex perfume! Top notes are grapefruit, tangerine, bergamot and orange; middle notes are rose, geranium and ylang-ylang; base notes are vanilla, benzoin and agarwood (oud)." - a note from the brand.

reviews.name: hinghamkate
reviews.comment: I have the new reformulated release of this perfume which I think might be a little different that what Fragrantica is listing. But anyway what you can get now is..... The dry down on this is AMAZING! I also really like the citrusy top notes - they are bright and fun - but I am a sucker for the benzoin, vanilla, oud base notes. So if you are looking for a super light, zesty, fresh citrus this may not be your cup of tea. However I say try it anyway; step outside your comfort zone and try something different. It is like a bowl of citrus fruit sitting on an old wooden country farm table, worn down through hundreds of years of use. The combination of notes, with some prominent geranium thrown in, is utterly sublime. What I love most about Citrus Sunrise - even more than the dry down - is its utter uniqueness. Olivia Larson is a master of creativity!

title: Citrus Oud Odecla perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Citrus Oud by Odecla is a Oriental Woody fragrance for women and men. Citrus Oud was launched in 2022. The nose behind this fragrance is Paul Guerlain. Top notes are Bergamot, Orange Blossom and Orange; middle notes are Cedar, Jasmine and Amber; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Patchouli and Musk.

reviews.name: kerolos
reviews.comment: So i am the first review for the perfume. It has similarity to Jo Malone Oud and Bergamot but the citrus here is much crisper and the perfume last much much longer than Jo Malone but the projection is a bit on the softer side. Good perfume for the asking price and a better over all value than Jo Malone. 26-JAN-2023

title: Citrus Hesperida Parfums Berdoues perfume - a fragrance for women and men 1902
description: Citrus Hesperida by Parfums Berdoues is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Hesperida was launched in 1902. Top notes are Citruses, Orange and Lemon; middle notes are African Orange Flower and Vetiver; base notes are Sandalwood and Musk. This refreshing fragrance from the premium collection 1902 opens with notes of citrus and orange, followed by the heart of orange blossom and the base of musk and sandalwood. Available as 200 ml eau de cologne.

reviews.name: sherapop
reviews.comment: I love how these Berdoues 1902 colognes come in big bottles topped with the same shaker disk as the one found on bottles of malt vinegar for fish and chips. LOL The shaker method isn't my preferred mode of perfume application, so I ordered a bunch of 1oz atomizers to decant these into, and I am enjoying spritzing them on in the sweltering heat in Boston this summer. They really do smell natural and do not morph into some unwanted and nausea-inducing synthetic monster in the heat. Yes, they are very simple, but they are also natural and sometimes what one wants is something simple and natural to beat the heat. This one combines orange blossom with orange fruit in a nice way. It's neither very sweet nor overly astringent. It has enough punch to be energizing but without being obnoxious or strident. I am happier with these 1902 colognes than with the Berdoues Contes Bucoliques line, which features equally simple but less refreshing floral fragrances. Probably I prefer the 1902 line because the compositions seem less aquatic. CITRUS HESPERIDA is a nice orange blossom and citrus cologne. It does not smell exactly like any of the other citrus colognes or orange blossom creations familiar to me, so I'm happy to have a bottle. I disagree with the reviewer who reports that this smells like cleaning fluid. This smells very natural to me. This actually smells better to me than the latest version of Guerlain EAU DE COLOGNE IMPERIALE. Of course that's comparing oranges and limes, but in terms of the smoothness, this one seems nicer to me. Please excuse me now while I go spritz some more on!

reviews.name: BooRad0859
reviews.comment: The longevity is next to nothing, but it makes a refreshing pick-me-up for a hot day.

title: Citrus & Musk Unique Art Parfum cologne - a new fragrance for men 2025
description: Citrus & Musk by Unique Art Parfum is a Aromatic Aquatic fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus & Musk was launched in 2025. The fragrance features White Musk, Lotus, Cedar, Lemon, Mint, Yuzu, Green Bell Pepper, Aquatic notes and Green Notes. Citrus & Musk by Unique Art Parfum is a fresh, citrusy fragrance for men with a pronounced aquatic character. The composition combines bright yuzu and lemon with airy aquatic notes, creating a clean and refreshing opening. Green pepper, lotus, green notes, and mint add a cool, leafy and slightly aromatic facet, while white musk and white cedar provide a soft, woody-musky base that keeps the scent light yet present on the skin.

title: Citrus Homme Nile Official cologne - a fragrance for men 2023
description: Citrus Homme by Nile Official is a Citrus fragrance for men. Citrus Homme was launched in 2023. Top notes are Bergamot, Jasmine and Juniper; middle notes are Neroli, Rosemary and Powdery Notes; base notes are Vetiver, Amber, Musk and Moss.

title: Citrus Of The Sea The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Of The Sea by The Dua Brand is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Of The Sea was launched in 2023. The fragrance features Woody Notes, Sea Notes, Bergamot, Lavender, Galbanum, Vanilla, Vetiver, Nutmeg, Lemon and Musk. Citrus Of The Sea by The Dua Brand is an exquisite fragrance that embodies the essence of freshness and rejuvenation. Manufactured by Fragrance du Bois, a renowned brand in the industry known for its exceptional creations such as Producer Michael (PM), Solstis, and New York Intense, this fragrance is a true masterpiece. With a concentration of Extrait de Parfum, it ensures a long-lasting scent experience that captivates the senses. The fragrance opens with a delightful blend of lemon and bergamot, reminiscent of the currents of the ocean. As it develops, nutmeg and lavender intertwine in the heart, creating a harmonious bouquet akin to neighboring flowers gently swaying in the wind. The base notes are characterized by a gentle sweetness of vanilla, leaving a lingering effect that lasts for hours. Citrus Of The Sea is a unisex fragrance that offers a refreshing and invigorating experience to anyone who wears it.

title: Citrus Saturation The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2020
description: Citrus Saturation by The Dua Brand is a Oriental fragrance for women and men. Citrus Saturation was launched in 2020. The fragrance features Mandarin Orange, Bitter Orange, Sandalwood, Dried Plum, Orange and Amber. Citrus Saturation by The Dua Brand is a fragrance inspired by Jo Malone's Orange Bitters. This vibrant and energetic fragrance has been concentrated at extrait de parfum strength to ensure long-lasting performance, making it suitable for year-round wear. Citrus Saturation is an overdose of orange notes that create a refreshing and unapologetic aroma. It opens with a burst of various citrus fruits that dominate the composition before giving way to a heart note of dried plum. The sweetness from the ripe fruit note eventually merges with the enduring sweetness of amber in the base. A subtle hint of vanilla can be detected in the background, while the lingering citrus scent reminds us of its delightful opening. Citrus Saturation comes in a 30 ML (1 FL.OZ) bottle and is classified as a Citrus Aromatic fragrance. Notes in Citrus Saturation include Citrus Accord, Orange, Mandarin Orange, Bitter Orange, Dried Plum, Sandalwood, and Oriental Accord. The fragrance opens with a bold and invigorating blend of citrus fruits, dominated by orange. This juicy and zesty opening lasts for quite some time before transitioning into a heart note of dried plum, adding a touch of sweetness to the composition. As the fragrance dries down, it settles into a warm and comforting base of amber, providing an enduring sweetness. There is also a faint presence of vanilla in the background which adds a subtle creaminess to the overall aroma. Citrus Saturation belongs to the Citrus Aromatic olfactory group.

reviews.name: Smellycheetrapit77$
reviews.comment: I never tried original so I cannot say how close it is. It's rare that I do not like citrus scents but this is reminds me of some cleaning product orange scented for wood furniture polishing. Something like pledge with orange.

title: Citrus Sundae Fila perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2018
description: Citrus Sundae by Fila is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Sundae was launched in 2018. Top notes are Pink Grapefruit, Pear, Green Notes, Passionfruit, Black Currant and Sea Notes; middle notes are Jasmine, Rose, Mandarin Orange, Lily-of-the-Valley, Freesia, Peony and Peach; base notes are Cedar, Orange Blossom, Sandalwood, Musk, Iris and Amber.

title: Citrus Cedre The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Citrus Cedre by The Dua Brand is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Citrus Cedre was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Orange, Cedar, Mint, Mandarin Orange, Patchouli, Ambrette, Basil, Musk and Pear. Citrus Cedre is a unisex fragrance from the brand Dua, presented in an Extrait de Parfum concentration of 30 ml (1 fl.oz). As the name implies, this fragrance features prominent citrus notes, making it a perfect choice for warm weather. Citrus Cedre is an original blend created by Dua and promises a unique composition that evokes a journey through a citrus grove. The notes of Citrus Cedre include Mandarin Orange, Salty Sea Orange Accord, Mint, Pear, Basil, Cedar, Patchouli, Ambrette, and Musk. The fragrance opens with a burst of citrusy notes that are bright and refreshing, awakening the senses. As it settles on the skin, the mint and basil lend a cooling effect that adds to the freshness of the fragrance. The base notes of cedar and patchouli provide a woody aspect that balances out the sweetness of the fruit notes. Overall, Citrus Cedre is a delightful scent that captures the essence of summer in a bottle.

title: Citrus Incense The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2020
description: Citrus Incense by The Dua Brand is a Woody Chypre fragrance for women and men. Citrus Incense was launched in 2020. The fragrance features Frankincense, Elemi resin, Sicilian Lemon, Benzoin, Pepper and Labdanum. The Citrus Incense fragrance by The Dua Brand is a versatile and enduring perfume that showcases the brand's ability to curate a wide range of olfactive options. The manufacturer, Jo Malone, is known for their bright and rejuvenating fragrances, but with Citrus Incense, they have created a long-lasting scent that combines resinous elements with exotic flair. This fragrance is classified as Oriental Woody and comes in a concentration of Extrait de Parfum. With autumn quickly approaching, now is the perfect time to experience this magnificent composition. The notes of Citrus Incense include Sicilian Lemon, Pepper, Elemi Resin, Frankincense, Labdanum, and Benzoin. When combined, these notes create an olfactory experience that is richly resinous with a smoky touch. The lemon brings an exuberant and bright element to the fragrance while the gums add depth and complexity. The tug of war between sweet and serene is evident with the interplay of frankincense and labdanum. Overall, Citrus Incense is a complex composition that showcases the brand's versatility in creating enduring and captivating fragrances.

reviews.name: Dawnyallah
reviews.comment: Resinous and light. Nice layering attributes. Moderate longevity and sillage

title: Citrus Explosion The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Citrus Explosion by The Dua Brand is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Explosion was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Black Pepper, Petitgrain, Geranium, Cinnamon, Galbanum, Vanilla, Orange, Lemon, Clove, Musk and Lime. Citrus Explosion by The Dua Brand is an exquisite fragrance that showcases the use of superb raw materials by the lesser-known brand, Le Jardin Retrouve. This unisex fragrance comes in a concentration of Extrait de Parfum and is presented in a 30ml (1 fl. oz) bottle. The fragrance is a perfect choice for those who appreciate high-quality citrus scents and want to add a touch of freshness to their collection. Citrus Explosion opens with an explosion of citrus notes, including lemon, lime, petitgrain, and orange. These vibrant citric elements create a bouquet of freshness that perfectly suits warmer climates or when you need a refreshing boost. To balance out the brightness, darker ingredients such as galbanum and vanilla are introduced, giving the fragrance depth and grounding it. A touch of cinnamon spice adds a playful twist that cannot be ignored. This fragrance is an inspired expression of Citron Boboli by Le Jardin Retrouve, offering a new citrus experience for fans of the genre.

title: Citrus Spa Aqua Savon perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Spa by Aqua Savon is a fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Blood Orange, Lemon, Basil and Lime; middle notes are Lily of the Valley, Black Currant, Green Apple and Jasmine; base notes are Amber and Musk. Citrus Spa by AQUA SAVON is a clean and refreshing fragrance designed to evoke the sensation of a brisk, invigorating breeze. The scent opens with a fresh blend of citrus and herbs, transitions to a softly sweet and fruity heart with floral nuances, and settles into a gentle base of amber and musk.

title: Citrus Fruits Rudy Profumi perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Fruits by Rudy Profumi is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Grapefruit and Bergamot; middle notes are Grapefruit blossom and Orange Blossom; base notes are White Musk and Vetiver.

title: Citrus Bigarrade Creed perfume - a fragrance for women and men 1901
description: Citrus Bigarrade by Creed is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Bigarrade was launched in 1901. The nose behind this fragrance is Henry Creed Fourth Generation. Top notes are Citruses and Bergamot; middle note is Neroli; base note is Ambergris. Citrus Bigarrade is a unisex fragrance that was made for an extraordinary couple—a former king of England who sacrificed his crown to marry the stylish divorcée who had captured his heart. The name of this perfume translates to “bitter citrus”—perhaps an allusion to the difficulties of romance. This zesty fragrance opens with bergamot and citrus notes. The heart follows with neroli flower, and the base consists of ambergris.

reviews.name: landshark321
reviews.comment: Creed Citrus Bigarrade is a nice semi-fresh, semi-bitter, musky/woody offering that I’d certainly classify among the more accessible discontinued freshies from that era. I’d describe it as not quite as sharp as Bois de Cedrat, not quite as green as Selection Verte, and not quite as orangey as Orange Spice. It’s more of a semi-bitter lemon freshie with some woody undertones. The note listing by some sources is deceptively simple: bergamot, citrus notes, neroli flower, and ambergris. Its performance is sadly lacking, as even with a fairly robust application from a decant sprayer, the scent is barely present after a couple of hours, so I wouldn’t advocate tracking down a bottle at an exorbitant cost, though I’m glad I’ve a decant to enjoy on occasion. 7 out of 10

reviews.name: esteban747
reviews.comment: "It was made for a extraordinary couple." In 1901 Edward was 7 years old.

reviews.name: Redbeard
reviews.comment: I'm finally reviewing this after several retestings. As remarked elsewhere, I meant to replace it with Neroli Sauvage because it was weak (how ironic!) but I soon learned the error of my ways. It's basically just a run-of-the-mill EdC, pretty intermediate on the scale of sharp vs. flowery citrus. The very top notes are a good rendition of the rind of a freshly-squeezed lemon slice. It gets weak fairly soon (though not unusually so for this genre) but manages to stay natural and unambiguously masculine. Even in the end, when it's gotten very weak, it still maintains more of the original zing than you typically find with these. It's perfectly decent stuff, but there's no need to pay Creed prices for a standard Eau de Cologne.

reviews.name: LadyRogue
reviews.comment: Oh my goodness is this a pretty citrus neroli mix with a stunning amber dry down! The opening is sweet, sexy and fresh with a zesty bite. (a love bite ;) Citrus with neroli in equally wonderful proportions..Sweet but not cloying, crisp but not too cologne-esque. It's elegant and smooth despite that it's a fruit based scent. The amber is a shadow note, it is always slightly noticeable and gains strength in the dry down where it warms and softens. It's a wonderful mood lifter and perfect for warm days or relax days. It's such a pretty darling and should be sniffed by all citrus/neroli fans...I am in love...and I want to sleep on a bed of citrus neroli amber this summer! Silage is: yes, the garden of Eden had not just apples! - longevity is: on me a deliciously juicy 5+ hours in which it becomes an amber syrup neroli balm. *YUM* *FunFact* This darling was a favourite with both Edward & Wallis, the infamous couple who's love affair caused the abdication of Edward VIII in 1936 as King of England. A kingdom for a woman - a His & Hers Creed for both. I recommend.

reviews.name: sotiriosc
reviews.comment: It's true, the opening really is the most beautiful citrus opening. Very sweet, tart and a little spicy its so real. the Neroli middle is just a good with a gallant ambergris base. Has a very earthy feel to it and from a distance you can smell the unique marriage the ingredients create. PM me if your interested in getting your hands on a sample I have a few on hand.

reviews.name: Alexandrarae
reviews.comment: So, Edward and Wallis smelled the same! Can imagine this one suiting her to a "T"!

reviews.name: jaa456
reviews.comment: Beautiful opening of tart citrus, like gin and lemonade, but then the drydown becomes a citrus whisper on a light amber base. It ends too soon and very close to the skin on me.

title: Citrus Oud 1667 perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Citrus Oud by 1667 is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Oud was launched in 2021. Top note is Citruses; middle note is Neroli; base note is Agarwood (Oud). A delicate journey from a fresh citrusy top, to a warm enveloping base.

reviews.name: magp1e
reviews.comment: This fragrance opens with a very classic masculine scent, but dries down into something that feels like it could be a Lush bath bomb, in the best possible way. It's a fizzy kind of citrus, that has a gentle sweetness and a very subtle (barely detectable even) oud undertone. On first spray I didn't like it, I tend to veer more towards true unisex or feminine fragrances as well as preferring spicy over fresh. But when it started to smell like a Lush bath bomb it really grew on me. The cleanness that I usually don't like in fragrances reminded me of a hot bath and became immediately comforting. If you're a fan of Lush products, citrus, and fresh fragrances that lean towards masculine, give this one a try!

title: Citrus Blossom AMD Perfumes perfume - a fragrance for women 2022
description: Citrus Blossom by AMD Perfumes is a Floral Fruity Gourmand fragrance for women. Citrus Blossom was launched in 2022. Top notes are Red Litchi, Quince and Kiwi; middle notes are White Chocolate, Jasmine, Cupcake and Orchid; base notes are Woody Notes, Orris and Musk.

title: Citrus Oud Ahmed Mahsoub KARIZMA perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Citrus Oud by Ahmed Mahsoub KARIZMA is a fragrance for women and men. Citrus Oud was launched in 2022. The nose behind this fragrance is Ahmed Mahsoub. Top notes are Pineapple, Orange, Lemon and Bergamot; middle notes are Geranium, Violet, Cinnamon and Cardamom; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Amber, Labdanum and Cedar.

title: Citrus Perfume Oil Kelly & Jones perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2016
description: Citrus Perfume Oil by Kelly & Jones is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Perfume Oil was launched in 2016. The nose behind this fragrance is Kelly Jones. The fragrance features Tea, Herbal Notes, Hay, Lemon and Grapefruit. "Pure fragrance oils that can be worn individually or combined and layered in your own custom way to create your signature scent. Each individual Blend is inspired by the notes of the wine aroma wheel - Citrus, Fruit, Floral, Earth and Oak. Collect them all." - a note from the brand. Citrus Perfume Oil by Kelly & Jones is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Citrus Perfume Oil was launched in 2016. The nose behind this fragrance is Kelly Jones. The fragrance features tea, herbal notes, grapefruit, hay and lemon.

reviews.name: Sirenialure
reviews.comment: Feeling a bit sick and needing a quick pick me up I grabbed this perfume oil - Citrus. You immediately get the lemon and the tea notes as well as a grassy note. It is uplifting and not for everyone because you have to love a good strong citrus.

title: Citrus Jasmine Chaque Jour perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2023
description: Citrus Jasmine by Chaque Jour is a Chypre Fruity fragrance for women and men. Citrus Jasmine was launched in 2023. Top notes are Blackcurrant, Pineapple, Bergamot and Apple; middle notes are Moroccan Jasmine, Patchouli, Birch and Rose; base notes are Vanilla, Oakmoss, Amber and Musk.

title: Citrus Dream Jalaine perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Dream by Jalaine is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. The nose behind this fragrance is Jalaine Sommers. The fragrance features Grapefruit, Orange and Musk. This luxurious, intensely concentrated perfume oil contains sweet orange, grapefruit and musk. The bottle itself is also luxurious – made of hand cut Italian glass. It is available in a 6 ml bottle that can be refilled.

reviews.name: 9154mf
reviews.comment: The grapefruit is ultra dominant in this, although I can smell the sweet orange too. This Is a big fresh powerful burst of luscious citrus. Citrus, on it's own at least, is definitely my least favorite note category when it comes to perfume, as I just don't get the idea of smelling like a lemon/lime/orange, or how this could possibly be attractive... However this smooth concoction would be a pleasure for a citrus lover, and being an oil it has great staying power. Not for me though.

title: Citrus Soleil M&S Provenance perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Soleil by M&S Provenance is a fragrance for women and men. Citrus Soleil was launched during the 2020's. Top notes are Mandarin and Lemon; middle notes are Orange Blossom, Jasmine and Neroli; base note is Musk. Citrus Soleil by M&S is a fresh citrus-floral fragrance from the Provenance collection. It opens with mandarin and lemon, develops into a heart of orange blossom, jasmine, and neroli, and settles into a soft musky base.

title: Citrus Verbena Elizabeth W perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Verbena by Elizabeth W is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Citrus Verbena was launched during the 2000's. The fragrance features Lemon, Verbena, Mandarin Orange, Grapefruit and Green Notes. Citrus Verbena is a refreshing and invigorating scent of grapefruit, mandarin, lemon, verbena leaf and green notes. It is available as 60 ml EDP.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Narciso Rodriguez for Her Musc Eau de Parfum Intense
Narciso Rodriguez for Her in Color

reviews.name: AveParfum
reviews.comment: A fresh and clean verbena scent. It's extremely simple, light, yet lasts and lasts! The citrus is not too heavy, it's mostly the scent of green verbena leaves. A very casual, timeless, unisex cologne.

title: Citrus Garden CN Perfumes perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Garden by CN Perfumes is a fragrance for women and men. The nose behind this fragrance is Cathleen Newsham. Top notes are Grapefruit and Black Pepper; middle notes are Tiare Flower and Coconut; base notes are Gardenia and Lotus. A crisp citrus fragrance, this one has a retro 70's vibe! I wanted to create a fragrance that felt like I was dancing to Jimi Hendrix in a pair of hip hugger bell bottoms with a sprig of fresh tiare flower tucked in my hair. A sweet coconut note blends beautifully with black pepper and watery florals weave throughout the background to make a very wearable unisex perfume.

reviews.name: Lorax
reviews.comment: Very pleasant, watery but gently warm floral. Nicely blended and smooth. Enough coconut and citrus to round out the floral part and keep it three dimensional. Only lasts about 2 hours. Hard to dislike, but doesn’t have a lot of distinct personality. Would be a very easy reach scent. Might be a bit young feeling for me. Still I cannot fault this for being almost exactly as advertised, and quite nice.

title: Citrus Sorbet Anthousa perfume - a fragrance for women
description: Citrus Sorbet by Anthousa is a Citrus fragrance for women. Citrus Sorbet was launched during the 2000's. Top notes are Amalfi Lemon, Bergamot and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Jasmine, Basil, Neroli and Mint; base notes are Musk and Tonka Bean. Citrus Sorbet is a sparkling and fresh fragrance, opening with bergamot, Argentina lemon and Sicilian mandarin. Basil, mint, jasmine and neroli are at the heart, while the base features velvety musk and tonka bean. It is available as 50 ml EDP.

reviews.name: Doc Elly
reviews.comment: The initial impression is of a very light pinch of lime peel and bitter herbs with no hint of sweetness, and seems fairly promising. However, the clean beginning quickly gives way to an odd, slightly sour note reminiscent of a wet, dirty rag that’s been sitting around for a while. There’s a bit of woodiness underneath it all, but it’s more like the pithiness of a weed stem or some ground coriander that is way beyond its expiration date than any conventional woody note. I was expecting a bright, cool, clean citrus scent, but instead found something that might be lurking in the kitchen after a week out of town. The best thing I can say for Citrus Sorbet is that it is not strong, although it is fairly tenacious. I finally ended up covering it up with some TDC Bergamote. This is the first Anthousa scent that I have tried, and I have to say that so far I am underwhelmed.

reviews.name: NebraskaLovesScent
reviews.comment: I have a trio of Anthousa perfume oils (Citrus Sorbet, Fig and Vetiver, and White Tuberose). Of the trio, the Citrus Sorbet is the only one I don't like. It's a harsh, discordant mixture of citrus and herbs with a hint of something odd and sweet that I could never identify until now. I 'm guessing it's the Tonka bean. The fragrance is more herbal than citrus on my skin, and has an overall "synthetic" and chemical aroma that smells sharp and unpleasant to my nose. The other two scents in the trio are wonderful and I have reviewed them separately.

title: Citrus Intense Jean Rish cologne - a fragrance for men 2016
description: Citrus Intense by Jean Rish is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Citrus Intense was launched in 2016. Top notes are Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Lemon and Mint; middle notes are Jasmine, Nutmeg and Ginger; base notes are Sandalwood, Patchouli, Cedar and Amber. Citrus Intense by Jean Rish is a men's fragrance released in 2016.
