description: Smoky Citrus by Amouroud is a fragrance for women and men. Smoky Citrus was launched in 2022. Top notes are Italian Lemon, Bergamot and Petitgrain; middle notes are Mineral notes, Lavender and Eucalyptus; base notes are Oakmoss, Leather, Woodsy Notes and Patchouli.

reviews.name: fjacosta
reviews.comment: This is an eucalyptus forward fragrance. Here, the eucalyptus smells very strongly and become harsher by the mineral note's push. The opening is quite beautiful until that eucalyptus (used to simulate the smoke) comes through. Not for me.

reviews.name: mlke
reviews.comment: Tried this in search of....something like Search by Amouage. I've tried a few other Amouroud perfumes and they have all been interesting and fairly decent, not afraid to lean into more challenging materials aspects, but sometimes feeling a bit rough around the edges because of it. This is one which, unfotunately, I grew to really hate. I like smokey things a lot but this has a really unusual sweet and salty meat aroma. It ends up like some kind of bbq drippings cut with lemon juice, and given a more chemical leather treatment. This part of it is subtle- it doesn't scream meat or sausage or anything like I can pick up in some guiacwood notes, but it's nonetheless there in some weird form. My mind just interprets it as something really off and unnatural. I'm guessing it could be the lavender fighting with the other elements as I typically have troubles with it sometimes. That medicinal licorice nuance must underpin some of that weirdness. Anyways, not for me, only like Search by way of being a smoky citrus, but lacking any of the charm and thrill. Had to take off my shirt just to get away from it 2 hours in.

reviews.name: thenakedchicken
reviews.comment: Smells exactly like the label says: smoky citrus. Really interesting and artistic aromatic charred-citrus evocation, it's just not a fragrance that I would reach for. I'm happy to pan the sample, but won't buy this again. Projection and sillage are high-moderate. Longevity is surprisingly good for a citrus fragrance at 7h+.

reviews.name: Alescweb
reviews.comment: Smoky Citrus by Amouroud is definitely one of my all-time favorites. It’s a citrus fragrance like no other—bright and fresh but with this intriguing smoky twist that adds so much character. The smoky note grounds the zesty citrus in a way that feels both modern and sophisticated. Projection is moderate, perfect for daily wear without being overpowering, and longevity impresses, lasting well over 7 hours on my skin. It’s easily one of the best citrus scents I’ve ever tried—unique, refreshing, and effortlessly cool.

reviews.name: robert19
reviews.comment: I would change the name to metallic citrus. Into heart and dry down the lemon and metallic notes dominate the whole composition. Excellent performance for this unique freshie.

reviews.name: Adhish Gupta
reviews.comment: Honestly, besides the inspiration, this and amouage search have nothing in common. Amouage search is a strong, lemon flavoured whiskey mixer. It has the exact profile as that. A little harsh, smokey and sharp. Imagine the cocktail mix, and a lemon as a whole. Smokey citrus, on the other hand... It's more of a rotten lemon. Or perhaps a part of the lemon. Imagine that the pulp which has been separated and drained of fluid, is now rotting on the counter. It's the metalic tinge that ruins it for me. I do like a few fragrances of this house, but this is not it. Any comparisons to amouage are redundant.

reviews.name: MettlerMatt
reviews.comment: EnjOyer below / / / I completely agree! I've always wanted a 'Dark Citrus' perfume. Eau Sauvage 2012 & 2017 are also somewhat great in this regard but 2017 is brighter. Annnnnddddd 2012, well I ran out 😔 This is an unusual type of composition. Usually anything darkish the citrus is gone in a few minutes but this it stays the way through the journey. I've tried Search by Amouage thinking it would be finally what im looking for but it's way to juxtaposed! Im glad I didn't blind buy it like I was about to do.. This however strikes it perfectly down the middle and is a year round perfume for me... go a little lighter in Summer and heavier in winter. It just works, the only thing that I'd knock it on would be the eucalyptus but that's just a personal preference. It is by in no way standing out but detectable, I don't dislike that part just wish something else could've been used however, it definitely makes this unique. Worth a sniff!!

reviews.name: Joalo
reviews.comment: This fragrance smells just great in summer and longevity is good 👍

reviews.name: L'égyptienne
reviews.comment: Fresh and uplifting citrus note all over the year, just don’t overspray to avoid the harsh metallic notes

reviews.name: Enj0yer
reviews.comment: Wow, instantly bought after smell it. It's uncommon freshness: smoky, citrusy and cold in a same time and it stay fresh till the end. Strong longevity. Guess it's my favorite choice for warm weather now

reviews.name: huismanbrm
reviews.comment: I’m a woman and I also like it very much☺️ The most long lasting citrus frag I ever tried. Wonderful, but so pricy in the Netherlands

reviews.name: testrluv
reviews.comment: Strong smoky citrus opening here. Right off the bat. some will fall in love, others will hate it. I fall into the category of… meh. I do like that smoky opening- quite a bit actually. Unfortunately, it dries into a DNA that is a close cousin to Aventus. Sort of to be expected based on the note breakdown. A fun wear for the first hour or so, after that, it’s just O.K. Sold my bottle because I got bored of it. 6 out of 10 for me.

reviews.name: jacked 24/7
reviews.comment: This is mesmerizingly beautiful. Has almost a zen-like quality to it. Take one of those smooth stones in a zen garden and make it piping hot, throw some oranges and lemons on it to let them release their aromatics and this is what you get…definitely a signature scent Also this is not mature smelling, any age male can rock this easily

reviews.name: CoachSignature88
reviews.comment: Okay I’ve had this about two months and wore many times and it’s time for my review. When I first got this and sprayed it I was hit with a very unexpected bandaid sort of scent… wasn’t my favorite off the bat. I honestly didn’t enjoy it much. But I went back and back to it and my nose has matured and I now get the different notes. It’s like a super Smokey lemon that’s been sitting in a smoker for days.. once dried down I do pick up a good amount of leather. Has a sort of sweaty animalic smell to it in background that I really enjoy.. it’s extremely well blended. This fragrance I would say is not blind buy worthy unless you get it one sale. And it’s moreso for seasoned noses to appreciate. It’s not your mass pleasing mall fragrance. Take your time with her and she will be very rewarding. It Would make a great signature scent. The quality of oils is astounding! Next I am going to try Lunar Vetiver. Great niche house. I’m happy with this at a 8.5/10. Very unique and nothing like aventus or anything else I’ve ever smelt. You will smell unique! One thing I would change is I would make the top notes more pronounced and bright. It’s almost too well blended lmao 🤣. Very dark for a citrus scent.

reviews.name: dirtyaim
reviews.comment: 10/10 fragrance

reviews.name: Volume-Dealer
reviews.comment: This is very nice…Canadian discounter has this.. imo a very nice spring and summer offering.. not overly smoky but it does have a nice mix to enhance the citrus.

reviews.name: Vince540
reviews.comment: This was a total blind buy and you definitely get what's in the name.💨🍊🍋 I love it! 💛 It's nice to have something different in my collection. It starts off smoke heavy mixed in with the citrus. As you reach the mid and drydown the smokiness dies down a bit and the oakmoss and citrus stays to the end. I had sampled Amouage's new fragrance coming out called Search which has a similar vibe with its citrus/incense combo. It's good but I like this one much better, it has a bit more character. I can see myself wearing this a lot during the warmer months and also now. I am all hyped up about this one, so take my thoughts on this with a grain of salt. There's always a new one around the corner 😂. If you like smoky, then there is a good chance you might like this one. Sample it if you can. 😁

title: Citrus Allegro Le Prince Jardinier perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus Allegro by Le Prince Jardinier is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Grapefruit, Lemon, Petitgrain and Basil; middle notes are Jasmine and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Moss, Musk and Ambergris.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Comme des Garcons Series 3 Incense: Zagorsk

reviews.name: SweetSoul
reviews.comment: Yes, I love this too! Very very lovely. Gorgeous citrus, with very interesting fresh herby smells, very gorgeous sweet jasmine and lotv, and a beautiful musky/oakmoss/ambergris dry-down. I love the effect of the sea, and warmth of the sun from the ambergris. Very fresh and scintillating. Really enjoyable perfume.

reviews.name: tige60
reviews.comment: I've been on a bit of a citrus frag run recently and I will say that this one is in the top 5 for sure. The basil/petitgrain/grapefruit top notes are really quite pleasing together. The light florals in the mid-notes are quite lovely also. Overall, the blending of all the notes is exceptionally well done and results in a fabulous journey from start to finish. The musk base note is definitely more of a clean white musk -- not at all animalic. Definitely a blind-buy gem. Longevity: 6-8 hrs Sillage: mod-heavy (3-6 ft)

title: Salty Citrus Rirana Parfume perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Salty Citrus by Rirana Parfume is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. The fragrance features Lime, Bergamot, Sage, Grapefruit, Basil, Iris and Vetiver.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Le Sel D'Issey Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: gtishko
reviews.comment: An absolute gem -- simply put: a happy fragrance. Perfection.

reviews.name: safarii
reviews.comment: Before buying this, i was expecting the citrus to come out more. After sniffing for the first time, the opening smell reminds of a lemon room freshener, the citrus notes only stays for 5 mins. As it dries down, the smell was dominated by iris and sage with a little hint of lime, which i prefer over the opening smell that reminds me of room freshener so much

reviews.name: K420
reviews.comment: Not as nuclear or beast mode as others have claimed (sillage sucks abit for me), but this is reasonably great as a freshie/hot weather fragrance. Since I can get this for dirt cheap where I'm from, it's a justifiable dumb grab for every day use. Spammable. Smell wise, I would say it literally smells similar to Jo Malone Lime Basil & Mandarin, but less bitter and less 'mature'. Overall decent freshie, would recommend! 3.2/5

reviews.name: sukayo
reviews.comment: After religiously testing the cologne, i started to appreciate the art behind it. While it does smells like lemonade made from sea water. The iris and other herbs gives a good layer to it

reviews.name: Chicago Tony T
reviews.comment: For those looking for a reasonably priced beast mode Summer scent then look no further. 5 sprays and this will project all day. Hell. you can go to a BBQ and this will get noticed easily. Vert surprised that salt is not an ingredient listed but that's exactly what this is. A playful salty and citrus scent. This will get added to the collection once warmer weather starts.

reviews.name: Bredyman
reviews.comment: @greekbasil i believe the gentlemen below is from malaysia where this perfume house is housed and a full bottle of this only costs us 110 myr which is about 20-25 usd

reviews.name: Forever Neil
reviews.comment: When you first spray this, you'll say it smells like a salty citrus, but what does salt smell like? Does salt even have a scent? I see it's been compared to Atelier colognes which are citrus forward scents, and Salty Citrus pops with a burst of citrus (lots of lime). There is a softness about Salty Citrus in the drydown, and I know some say it may be due to the powderiness of the iris. The powderiness is really hard to describe, and it really isn't very powdery. The drydown is a soft citrus. You'll understand once you smell it. Overall, I don't like the iris in this summer fragrance, and is why I traded away my Dior Homme Sport 2012.

reviews.name: greekbasil
reviews.comment: can someone explain to me how the gentelman below got .50 cents per ml for this?!! this is a 130 dollar fragrance ....anywho ..its not bad ....very very salty ..its different

reviews.name: Bubbles1964
reviews.comment: A nuclear salted citrus scent with very good performance. Dries down more medicinal and herbal, but still the citrus dominated with lime and grapefruit. This scent made my mouth water, I would love to test this in warmer weather. My first outing with this new to me brand is a hit.

reviews.name: Ksj_
reviews.comment: Smells similar to bottega veneta pour homme. With the salty citrus combo in here. However, It reminds me of a car freshly cleaned after you get it detailed or the soaps and suds of a car wash. This fragrance has good performance and is pleasant smelling. Maybe it will be one that grows on me, if I can get over the freshly cleaned car comparison.

reviews.name: alanwake
reviews.comment: Sharp, citrusy, and salty. Just like the name describes. The dry down is dominated by a lovely combination of iris and sage. It lasts a long time and projects really well for a citrus. This will shine nicely in the heat. Fine quality, as expected from Rirana.

reviews.name: Sanrift
reviews.comment: The opening is quite sharp with the use of lime and salty notes. Dries down to a nice combination of iris (little to non powdery iris), vetiver, and sage. For me it's a nice fragrance for casual days. Garner me lots of compliments. Funny story, someone told me that i smells like a new book wearing this which is quite unique. made me smile since i love the smell of books.

reviews.name: Adritz
reviews.comment: I'm really into citrus frags, since its hot from where I live. Just love the opening, a bit sharp and fresh. This does it for me.

reviews.name: jcbnsa1
reviews.comment: My first Rirana and it got me hooked on this house. I think it’s a quintessential summer scent, and garners tons of positive attention.

reviews.name: cua_alvin_ross
reviews.comment: The opening 15 minutes reminds me of lemon car air freshener(ambipur) with a huge dose of salt, but is not too strong to be disliked. Then after you get past that, you get this aromatic citrus blend with a slight touch of spices to balance the citruses. Very easy to wear summer scent. Kinda reminds me of Foconero by Tiziana Terenzi with the saltiness and somewhat lemonadey smell. This is perfect for summer casual. I think this would last a long time but projection on me is just in the middle of soft and moderate. Will update about the performance on this one. Edit: Longevity on this is 7 to 8 hours on skin. Projection is soft. Its like a personal scent. But still full bottle worthy because of the price $0.5 per ml. You can overspray all you want

title: Verbena Citrus L'Occitane en Provence perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2024
description: Verbena Citrus by L'Occitane en Provence is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. Verbena Citrus was launched in 2024. Top notes are Grapefruit, Lemon and Orange; middle notes are Verbena, Rosemary and Rose; base notes are Amberwood and Musk.

reviews.name: voxceleste
reviews.comment: oh, to smell like a lemon Ricola for two hours. its lack of strength is not compensated for by delicacy or nuance; rather than drying down, it trails off in a sour fade. a pity, i was hoping for an unobtrusive, androgynous citrus cologne for summer but there are too few days in this life to waste.

title: Citrus & Ginger Bachs perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrus & Ginger by Bachs is a fragrance for women and men. Top notes are Lemon, Ginger and Pomelo; middle notes are Freesia and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are White Musk and Cedar. "Fragrance for her and for him with sophisticated citrus notes and the vibrant touch of ginger. Excellent combination of fresh, clean notes and genuine Mediterranean character with a halo of intriguing personality. Without a doubt our most original and energizing Ampersand, destined to become a must for all seasons of the year." - a note from the brand.

title: 404 - Page Not Found | Fragrantica
Lakeside Citrus Bath & Body Works perfume - a fragrance for women 2021
description: Lakeside Citrus by Bath & Body Works is a Aromatic Aquatic fragrance for women. Lakeside Citrus was launched in 2021. The fragrance features Citruses, Mountain Air and Watery Notes.

reviews.name: doctorshenanigans
reviews.comment: its ok. this was an impulse buy to be honest because it was advertised as a forest after a hard long rain if im remembering correctly- a very misty, watery smell. i honestly shouldve just done more research on it but it wasnt that expensive so i dont regret it or anything. its very strong, but mostly citrus-y, like a bitter lemonade. i feel like when i put it on i have to force myself to imagine a rainy scene so i could enjoy it more, but honestly doesnt give me that vibe at all. i can tell they tried, there are water notes in here, but it feels more like an algae covered lake layered with a very feminine citrus. not really my thing or my go to, but usually covers up my bo when i dont have time to shower or wash my clothes. im sure its appealing to other women but not my thing personally- i dont hate it though

reviews.name: Bob'saslouth
reviews.comment: It's alright. It doesn't smell bad or amazing. But for some reason, I can smell a hint of melon in the fragrance.

reviews.name: sassa7
reviews.comment: Armani Code Turquoise all the way without the obnoxiously intense salty pear-orange blossom of that, but I do smell the signature citrusy salty vibe here too, just more toned down and smoother. Beautiful scent.

reviews.name: Chech85
reviews.comment: Smells like the early 2000’s Cool Water perfume.

reviews.name: Orchids55
reviews.comment: It’s ok, nothing special. I bought it on sale . It’s good for layering only. Smells a little like salt water breeze from BBB but not as salty. I wouldn’t buy it again.

reviews.name: Elwira_0
reviews.comment: For me this is a little disappointing.. i think 'saltwater breeze' a heaven scent instead.. it's a heaven sent fragrance. Instead, lakeside citrus reminds me of tory birch's bel azur .

title: Gin & Citrus Woods Bespoke London cologne - a new fragrance for men 2024
description: Gin & Citrus Woods by Bespoke London is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance. Gin & Citrus Woods was launched in 2024. Top notes are Citrus, Gin and Galbanum; middle notes are Iris, Cedar, Floral Notes, Sandalwood and oak moss; base notes are Cashmere Musk, Woody Notes and Amber.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: The One for Men Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: AnguBeef
reviews.comment: I love it. Opens with a wood note, dries into almost a lemon tree branch. the best way i can describe it is opening a bottle of extra floral gin.

reviews.name: Sauceda 9600
reviews.comment: Tiene una buena salida, con un olor muy fresco y agradable La única pega es que la estela y duración es cortita, pero por el precio que pagué 8,50€ es una buena compra.

reviews.name: RHizzle365
reviews.comment: It’s The Game, by Davidoff. The end

reviews.name: julio84
reviews.comment: A lovely opening of freshly cut citrus fruits , with the spicy juniper alcoholic note of gin (think a slice of lemon placed on a drink in a bar). After about half an hour an iris note shines through. Floral but not overly feminine balanced by woody notes. A stroll through a forest during the cool beginning of spring. It eventually lands (after a couple of hours) into an ambery woody background. (To be honest, the final dry down is not amazingly interesting). It last for around 3 hours, after which it becomes a skin scent at best (could still smell some after 5 hours). Not the best longevity, but this smells above its price point. The addition of iris in a masculine fragrance makes it very interesting. For less than a tenner, a definite good buy for a post gym refresh or even a short night out (dinner, but maybe not drinks afterwards)

title: Original Citrus + Eucalyptus Huron cologne - a fragrance for men 2022
description: Original Citrus + Eucalyptus by Huron is a fragrance for men. Original Citrus + Eucalyptus was launched in 2022. Top notes are Citruses, Grapefruit Leaf, Juniper and Peppermint; middle notes are Ozonic notes, Geranium, Lime, Oakmoss, Santolina and Eucalyptus; base notes are Woody Notes, Patchouli, Driftwood and Musk. Original Citrus + Eucalyptus: Our clean, fresh and invigorating scent opens with sparkling notes of lemony cedrat and grapefruit leaves with aromatic juniper and a hint of blue peppermint. Touches of spicy geranium and lime blossom blend with herbaceous rock-cap moss, santolina shrubs and a crisp, salty sea- air accord for an outdoorsy and sunny freshness. Notes of driftwood, warm patchouli and clean, watery musk creates a subtle woody quality that is both crisp and energizing. Huron Eau de Parfum is a bolder form of fine fragrance that maximizes the scent’s unique character and complexity with a stronger presence that lasts longer on your skin.

reviews.name: KithofRedCloth
reviews.comment: I was more than a little disappointed in this. It does smell like their soap but it’s almost like they just turned the fragrance up to 11 and didn’t bother to balance it for a parfum. From the first spray to the dry down this entire scent is some screechy amalgamation of the worst parts of citrus scents and Vicks vapor rub. I really wanted to like this because I love the way their soap smells it’s gentle and polite almost everything this parfum is not.

reviews.name: -Specs-
reviews.comment: This is a great fragrance. I got it mainly out of curiosity as it sounded very light and office friendly. Initially I just tried the soap, just to be safe. I was right. Very light and very clean smelling. I would say this is a very nice and safe fragrance to wear. If you’re into citrus and fresh scents, this will probably work well for you. Again I like that it’s office safe and not intense.

title: Tommy Citrus Brights Tommy Hilfiger cologne - a fragrance for men 2016
description: Tommy Citrus Brights by Tommy Hilfiger is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Tommy Citrus Brights was launched in 2016. Top notes are Lemon, Lime, Bergamot, Pine Tree Needles and Orange; middle notes are Lavender, Ginger and Mint; base notes are Haitian Vetiver, Incense and Pink Pepper. Right after holidays Tommy Hilfiger launches new duo CITRUS BRIGHTS evoking warm, sunny days and providing two dynamic compositions based on citruses. Men's edition was announced as 'energizing, spontaneous and vibrant', while the version for women was characterized as 'exciting, spontaneous and flirtatious'. The new fragrant duoTommy Citrus Brights for men and Tommy Girl Citrus Brights for women arrives in characteristic flacon forms, repeating the shape of its antecedents, fragrances Tommy and Tommy Girl. Men’s edition TOMMY CITRUS BRIGHTS offers lime, orange, lemon and bergamot in top notes, opening the composition in energizing and optimistic way. Pine needles provide a delicate masculine aspect to the citrusy notes in the opening. The heart encompasses French lavender, Moroccan mint, purple ginger, which, when blended, evoke the warmth of sunset and relaxation during summer months, whereas base notes exude freshness and fine spicy shades. Pink pepper, Haiti vetiver and incense linger in drydown. Men’s fragrance adds up to the editions Tommy Brights from 2014 and Tommy Neon Brights from 2015. New fragrances of the Tommy Hilfiger Citrus Brights collection can be obtained as 100ml Eau de Toilette.

reviews.name: Housebliss
reviews.comment: This smells much more mature than the name would suggest. My first thought was that this smelled like a distant cousin of Boucheron Pour Homme. It has that classic cologne vibe, but manages to smell fresh and youthful at the same time. I sprayed my wrist 7 hours ago, and I can still smell it. It doesn't project like crazy as far as I can tell, but too much of this would probably be cloying anyway due to the "density" of the smell. If you like the old school cologne style, be sure to try this one.

reviews.name: CGV
reviews.comment: Got this one today. The initial smell is very nice, you are greeted with a delicious combo of citruses while ginger, pine, lavender and even incense are immediately jumping out of the closet to make their voice heard. The result is an uplifting aromatic blend that sets itself apart from the "usual" citrus summer releases! The dry down leans towards the smell of a fizzy orange drink like Fanta for example. In regards to its performance I will have to test drive this in the next 24h.

reviews.name: CGV
reviews.comment: Ordered this blind. As I do really like several of the Tommy line (Athletics, Tommy 10 & the original Tommy) and the fact that pine needles and incense are listed here, make this an interesting composition for me to try. Of course I don't expect this fragrance to rock my world, but a nice fresh aromatic juice with a modern piney edge would be very welcome, so I am looking forward to receive this. A second post will follow accordingly.

reviews.name: Einarr
reviews.comment: It's actually not that bad. originally I thought that's it is a flanker from the 90's that I've missed. I has a bit of a medicinal quality to it, but then again that's not a dealbreaker as it's somehow put together nicely. I believe it will make for an alright, unpretentious office citrus scent for the summer. Btw, it's already on a heavy discount here in the UK (how did they manage so quickly I don't know) so one might as well buy a piece on the cheap. 6.5/10

reviews.name: spcmiller
reviews.comment: Now hold on...they lost me until I read the 'pine needles' note. Hmmm...that might be interesting if it's in there in a great enough concentration to: 1) last and 2) smell it. The most recent scent I've smelled with pine needles is MMM By the Fireplace, and perhaps it's not an entirely fair comparison because BtF's pine notes are burnt, and very acrid. I'm gonna check it out for that one note alone. Otherwise, I'll be waiting for it at TJ Maxx this upcoming Christmas.

reviews.name: dozza14
reviews.comment: oh come on! you sell out out out!

title: Sage & Citrus Oud Habibi NY perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2021
description: Sage & Citrus Oud by Habibi NY is a Oriental Fougere fragrance for women and men. Sage & Citrus Oud was launched in 2021. The nose behind this fragrance is Santosh Shinde. Top notes are Wormwood, Cumin, Lemon and Orange; middle notes are Black Pepper, Lavender, Geranium and Sage; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Patchouli, Vetiver and Virginia Cedar.

reviews.name: Crusader-wingman
reviews.comment: Not my favorite of the house, it is a slightly sweet and uplifting fragrance. I'm not going to try to go into the detail of what it smells similar to or what it's like but the disappointment with this and this is also my disappointment with spice bergamot and Oris is that the projection is just simply not there. I also have the same disappointment with Urban oud and I actually really like that one. The projection is just not there. However the projection on white Moroccan leather, desert oud (by far the best), and royal saffron oud is great! Also santal journey has impressive projection. Just letting you all know.

reviews.name: SalManhattan
reviews.comment: Super easy to wear, day or night formal or informal. Clever take on an Italian Colonia with a more prominent woody base. Love it

reviews.name: lostnose2
reviews.comment: This a a good fragrance. Nice spicy citrus opening. I think very well balanced and matches the name, sage and citrus. The oud is very subtle. I see this as one of my favorites from the house. If it projected a little more, it would be awesome. I like it enough for daily wear in most environments.

reviews.name: KerriZ
reviews.comment: This immediately reminded me of an old school lemony/spicy mens cologne topped by oud. They felt like two indie's put together in one package vs. blended..if that makes sense. Still - as Ouds go it is nice mellow not in your face like some ouds. I've gone down the Oud rabbit hole so I am all about those strong Oud punches in the face so this one came across a bit too genteel for me. My BF liked it though and he's not into fragrance at all...so perhaps a starter oud??? its nice!

reviews.name: jfourni3
reviews.comment: One of the fresher offerings from the house of Habibi, and it's a darn good one. A clean, woody, and fresh fougere with a touch of soapiness is the best way to describe it. It opens with a fresh, bright, citrus back by refreshing lavender. There is an interesting twist to it all though and that is the cumin and the black pepper. It is noticeable if you go looking for it but nothing that sits at the front of the composition. Nothing about this is this is "oud-y" or animalic. This would be a great spring/summer casual fragrance

reviews.name: RayCashhhh
reviews.comment: First impressions: this smells really good! Was not expecting this to be among my favorites from the discovery set, but so far it is. I'll have to spend more time with it, but this is very well blended, and the components compliment each other well!

title: White Citrus Bath & Body Works perfume - a fragrance for women 2009
description: White Citrus by Bath & Body Works is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women. White Citrus was launched in 2009. Top notes are Lemon, Grapefruit and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Ginger, Freesia, Lily-of-the-Valley, Apricot and Rose Water; base notes are Musk and Woody Notes.

reviews.name: satabar
reviews.comment: It must be my body chemistry but this smells like stale popcorn on me. The mist, the lotions, even the body gel. It smells amazing in the bottle, but bizarre on my skin. I’ve never had such bad body chemistry with a product before. I’d advise someone to try this scent out before buying it.

reviews.name: Viper365
reviews.comment: This reminds me of driving past the orange groves with my mom as a child. The refreshing floral scent brings a more airy spring time feel to it, but the lemon and ginger definitely give it a refreshing summer scent.

reviews.name: MetallicSquink
reviews.comment: LOVE this scent. It's a very zesty grapefruit. At first it's bright and refreshing with a tiny hint of bitter, like a citrus rind. I try to avoid over spraying because that citrus can be sharp at first. As it dries down the citrus mellows and reveals a subtle ginger. These blend perfectly and convey a beautiful skin scent that is unisex but not marine, salty, aquatic or cologne-y. This scent is perfect on hot, humid days. It seems to cut through heavy muggy air and feels like a cold refreshing grapefruit in seltzer beverage.

reviews.name: ShadowsofLight
reviews.comment: White Citrus is quite simplistic to my nose, and I'm surprised that there are so many notes listed here. I don't detect half of these at all. I do think this befits it's name, as it does smell quite "white". It's never been orangey to me, but simply a clear (but not bitter) grapefruit, leading into clean white florals, and ending with a laundry musk scent. It only has the faintest hints of spice, but it has never struck me as gingery. It's exceedingly clean, but still has a touch of B&BW's signature sweetness throughout the wear experience. It evokes moods of 4 star hotels/spas, but *specifically* 4 stars and not 3, nor 5...because this is undoubtedly nice, but it isn't expensive smelling. Yet, it's not cheap or junky either. It's refreshing and definitely one for a relieving experience during high heat. It's also a one of those fragrances where I puzzle how anyone could have a strong negative response to, it's just so mass appealing (and unisex) that I feel that it's safe for anything from bedtime to the office 🌞 (Cross posted to other entries.)

reviews.name: Fatima1219
reviews.comment: I have a vintage body mist--still half-way full! What a treasure! I revisited this mist a couple days ago--and wow! If you love citrus, musk, and white flowers...this is a great addition to any collection.

reviews.name: spritzspritz
reviews.comment: I love citrusy fragrances but they all seem to have a longevity problem, except this one! It's by far the longest-lasting femme citrus I have, besides being a fav. The lily of the valley, ginger, and musk keep me coming back.

reviews.name: thegplegacy
reviews.comment: Well, this one smells like BBW Snowy Morning (it has a little sweeter note). This smells citrusy and fresh & calming.

reviews.name: Redolence Cove
reviews.comment: This one is good: tangy, bright citrus. Exceptionally fresh smelling. As someone who isn’t the biggest fan of citrus, I can say that this one is good after getting out the shower and you want to smell squeaky clean.

reviews.name: fragrances-fanatic
reviews.comment: I just discovered that Elizabeth Arden Green Tea Bamboo smells VERY much like Bath & Body Works White Citrus! If you can't find White Citrus, give it a try.

reviews.name: Cloverstone
reviews.comment: I really enjoy the spicy element to this strong citrus freshness of a scent. It adds a depth and a sharpness to it without making it harsh; it is soothing and somehow invigorating at the same time...and even has a slight hint of sexy playfulness to it in my opinion. The longevity is surprising, it really sticks around to a more subtle dry down with just the right amount of sillage as well. I am always asked and complimented when wearing this lovely fragrance. Edit/Update: If you enjoy layering, this is an excellent choice to use if you are a citrus fan with its potent but inoffensive scent. One of my absolute favourite "heavier" EDPs is Armoni Code for her (the purple and black ombre bottle, formerly with black lace flowers embossed on a deep blue and black ombre bottle), where it has a tangy blood orange note in it. Combining just a touch of White Citrus turns it into a lighter, more flirty feeling while bringing the stronger citrus out in it making it easily night or day appropriate. This really goes for virtually any perfume or mist I have found, whether citrus exists or not, it very much can be layered with pretty much anything in my collection and adds a lasting punch to it too, I've added the rollerball version for just this purpose. If you haven't used it to layer, I would strongly recommend giving it a try if you are a fan of White Citrus.

reviews.name: imoore
reviews.comment: It smells like a dupe for Eau Jeune Senteurs Fraiches, which is not a bad thing. Try it with the lotion to last and enjoy the citrus blast from the seventies!

reviews.name: jackiek4
reviews.comment: I was in need of an uplifting fragrance for the dreary weather we’re having. White Citrus is a cheerful lemon/ grapefruit and ginger fragrance that has had done the trick! Aromatherapy for me!

reviews.name: relativelystoic
reviews.comment: This smells good during cold season. It is fresh and clean. But when it gets hot, the citrus can be a little loud and screechy.

reviews.name: dsmercoco
reviews.comment: Great hot weather scent. After it settles in, I find myself saying, "something smells good" and realize it's me. The dry down is a powdery white musk to my nose. It has a longevity of about 6 hrs and it's a moderate sillage. So disappointed to know its been discontinued but that's BBW M.O.

reviews.name: Cloverstone
reviews.comment: I really enjoy the spicy element to this strong citrus freshness of a scent. ☺ It adds a depth and a sharpness to it without making it harsh; it is soothing and some how invigorating at the same time...and even has a slight hint of sexy playfulness to it in my opinion. The longevity is surprising, it really sticks around to a more subtle dry down with just the right amount of sillage as well. I am always asked and complimented when wearing this lovely fragrance.

reviews.name: odie
reviews.comment: "White Citrus" by Bath and Body Works (BBW) has an energizing and natural grapefruit note and I enjoy that citrus working in accordance with the clean clear musk and the green notes of the lily of the valley and spicy freesia. But my oh my do I miss those rose and ginger nuances. Perhaps I'll give it a spritz again in the morning to try and discern these two scents, since I am wearing heavy hitter "Dune" at the moment by Christian Dior, so I don't want to say BBW is missing elements mentioned in the tier. It is bright hot today in my Caribbean world and "White Citrus" just made it a more refreshing place to be.

reviews.name: JSRbeatles
reviews.comment: The best word to describe this fragrance is "refreshing." I think that if it were just a pure citrus scent, it might smell a bit sour or overly tart, but the ginger and floral notes enter subtly enough to make this quite lovely and keep it from smelling like a household cleaner. Side note: this is the fragrance I always wear if I'm going to spend a whole day outside in the heat, like at a theme park - I carry it in my bag and spritz it on when I get sweaty, so that I don't stink. :)

reviews.name: kristamb
reviews.comment: This is one of a handful of scents I like from BBW. I really like this scent for spring or summer. I tend to like lemon or citrus scents, as long as they don't smell like a cleaning agent! This one is great...it is pretty basic and makes me happy!

reviews.name: chanelnumerocinq
reviews.comment: I hope White Citrus is never discontinued from Bath & Body Works. It’s my favorite plain citrus kind of scent. It’s not too chemical and sharp so that it smells like cleaning product. It smells like lemon juice, but less tart which is a refreshing and clean way to smell. White Citrus isn’t bitter or sour. It feels casual and relaxing. Citrus notes don’t last well, but on its own White Citrus last up to three hours in eau de toilette concentration, which isn’t good lasting power in comparison to many perfumes, but is good lasting power for such a predominantly citrus scent, and it can be layered with matching lotion as all Bath & Body Works perfumes can be. I think White Citrus is unisex and can work for all ages. I’m sure a good, maybe even better lemon scent can also be found at a niche price point but White Citrus is approximately 30-40 USD.

reviews.name: Deirdre1969
reviews.comment: I love citrus and am longing for a fresh, light scent for spring. And one of my best friends in the world -- we call each other sisters -- wears this. She's always been way smarter and more mature than I am (LOL) so I was very keen to try this fragrance. Unfortunately, on me it quite sharp and a little more masculine than I like. My bff may like unisex fragrances -- I haven't seen her in years but she's very witty and practical. However, I'm much more girly so I was looking for something sweeter. Citrus and ginger are probably her style, but I was craving a bit of pear or maybe honey. Anyway, I tried the body spray on my arm and it started very lemon-zesty, quickly turning to a sharpish men's cologne. It faded fast, which in this case was a good thing. It would be excellent as a room spray.

reviews.name: Museumgal
reviews.comment: Good citrus mix, particularly well done grapefruit note. Refreshing, easily unisex -- the floral isn't really overwhelming. The citrus notes are really the stars of the fragrance. Good for office or casual day time wear. Lasts pretty well for a primarily citrus scent 3-4 hours.

reviews.name: Miss.Tara
reviews.comment: The freesia is a little strong for me personally, but I still enjoy this energizing scent. It's simple, clean, and pleasant.

reviews.name: karlovonamesti
reviews.comment: Arguably the current most popular unisex fragrance from B&BW, White Citrus is surprisingly crisp, juicy, and lucid for an inexpensive mall scent. It's mostly grapefruit and freesia, with a very vague and faint ginger note tucked into those white-musky greens. The grapefruit is accented with lemon, but here the two notes are so similar that it's nigh impossible to discern them separately. Think of it as one big "fresh" citrus accord that someone threw together. It doesn't smell like there was a ton of work put into it, but White Citrus smells good as a year-round safe scent. If you're serious about citrus though, you're better off looking into the works of Roudnitska and Ellena, where the true depth and beauty of citrus is explored, not just the basic premise.

title: Cool Citrus Basil Bath & Body Works perfume - a fragrance for women 2000
description: Cool Citrus Basil by Bath & Body Works is a Aromatic fragrance for women. Cool Citrus Basil was launched in 2000. Top notes are Sicilian Bergamot, Basil, California Orange and Lemon; middle notes are Damask Rose, Ylang-Ylang and Clove; base notes are Musk and Precious Woods.

reviews.name: esteban747
reviews.comment: I still have half a bottle of Cool Citrus Basil, it’s unbeatable. Fabulous. I think B&BW quality has dropped in the last 10 years in general. This is an uplifting, bright yet warm and slightly sweet scent. Wonderful. I wish they bring it back.

reviews.name: RB2002
reviews.comment: I loved Cool Citrus Basil from the very beginning of the 00s, which was my favorite era for this store (mid-late 90s- early 00s). This was part of a collection that included this one, which was a unisex, refreshing citrusy scent with some herbal notes. Lemongrass Sage- which was a beachy, grassy, lemony scent (not like lemongrass or lemongrass eo). Water Blossom Ivy- a biting, herbal, green ivy scent. Fresh Ginger Lime- a refreshing lime with hint of ginger, but there was a creaminess to it too, so it wasn’t too sharp (without resorting to overwhelming sweet notes like today’s products from this store tend to have, which was commented on below). Other scents that I liked from this era were Herbal Mist, Flowering Herbs, Lavender Flowers and Orange Blossom. This was such a great era for this store and I wish the company would bring things like this back, if even temporarily.

reviews.name: lgrayer
reviews.comment: Cool Citrus Basil is by far, my most favorite scent of the BBW line. Even today, I hate that it was discontinued. I do have a lot of lotions and sprays that I purchased before it was no longer available. I love it refreshing, clean, and lingering head turning smell. The scent naturally smelled good with anyone's chemistry. I just love it!

reviews.name: Jrkd70
reviews.comment: Way back in the 'olden' days when BBW actually had some decent body lotion/splash scents. It is all absolute rubbish now - rubbish that has been dipped in (cheap imitation) vanilla, rolled in toasted coconut, then cooled by a 'Magical Breeze'. Absolutely ridiculous. I am with you, Countrygurl. Flowering Herbs was my favorite but I liked this as well. The original Juniper Breeze, Green Clover & Aloe, Pearberry, etc. - nearly everything in the store smelled great back then. I never considered it anything more than great bath supplies & casual body sprays but, damn.. I miss all of them. The funniest thing I have read on that site was recently when they re-released Juniper Breeze and of course all of the people that know what it is supposed to smell like were wailing in discontent. Many people offered up the reason for the reformulation being that 'they probably can't get those same materials now due to expense or the new rules' ... AS IF Bath and Body Works has ever used any truly quality ingredients, hahaha... I'm sure they were #1 on IFRA's shitlist.

reviews.name: Countrygurl
reviews.comment: Very green and spicy! This is a bbw oldie. I enjoyed this herbal mist which was strong and spicy. I enjoy the BBW original green scents like these. Or herbal mist that are green spicy like Rainkissed leaves or Green clover aloe What this and Still no Flowering Herbs or Seaspray??? Lol Only OG bath body works fans understand

title: Spiced Citrus The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Spiced Citrus by The Dua Brand is a Oriental fragrance for women and men. Spiced Citrus was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Mandarin Orange, Black Currant, Cashmere Wood, Bitter Orange, Ozonic notes, Green Notes, Spicy Notes, Sandalwood, Strawberry, Grapefruit, Immortelle, Pineapple, Patchouli, Raspberry, Sea Notes, Cyclamen, Cardamom, Vanilla, Saffron, Jasmine, Coconut, Vetiver, Violet, Ginger, Cherry, Cedar, Amber, Lemon, Apple, Lotus, Rose, Musk, Lime, Iris, Plum, Fir and Oud. Spiced Citrus by The Dua Brand is a fragrance that is part of The Spirit of Dubai collection, known for its unique and high-quality fragrances. This particular fragrance, released in 2015, showcases the brand's commitment to originality and complexity. With standout ingredients such as lime, orange, spices, and vanilla, Spiced Citrus offers a captivating aroma that combines freshness with exotic spice. The fragrance also features notes of sea accord and ozonic accord, adding a refreshing overtone. As an Extrait de Parfum with a concentration of 30 ML (1 FL.OZ), Spiced Citrus is designed to provide a long-lasting scent experience that will make you stand out in any room. Spiced Citrus boasts an extensive range of notes that contribute to its enticing scent profile. Among the notes are lime, pineapple, bitter orange, grapefruit, plum, cherry, strawberry, raspberry, coconut, apple, and lemon, creating a fruity sensation that delights throughout the day. The fragrance also incorporates spicy elements with cardamom and ginger, while the addition of vanilla and amber adds a touch of sweetness. These notes come together to create an interesting duality between citrus and spice, setting Spiced Citrus apart from your typical citrus scents. With its complex blend of ingredients, this fragrance falls under the olfactory group of 'Oriental Woody', embodying warmth and depth while maintaining a citrusy freshness.

title: Snowy Citrus Swirl Bath & Body Works perfume - a fragrance for women 2019
description: Snowy Citrus Swirl by Bath & Body Works is a Citrus Gourmand fragrance for women. Snowy Citrus Swirl was launched in 2019. The fragrance features Tangerine, Vanilla, Tonka Bean and Marshmallow.

reviews.name: swedishmilk15
reviews.comment: love it. i smell a hint of patchouli in addition to the juicy orange and fluffy vanilla. tonka is a hint woody-ambery.

reviews.name: Amelie999
reviews.comment: I was so excited to get this one after reading and watching a lot of reviews. I love satsumas at Christmas time and I thought this would be a bright citrus with a creamy background to wear for winter months~but it’s all sweet sugar and amber to me! There I S orange in there but it’s way heavier on the tonka/vanilla side. More perfume like, less realistic fruit. Not tart enough for me but still a good one for what it is! (Lasts about 3hrs on my skin. Longer on fabric)

reviews.name: ThatGothBBW
reviews.comment: Smells like a delecious orange cream sickle!

reviews.name: MAKSTR
reviews.comment: It should've been more citrusy and soury but it's more like vanilla chocolate type sweet scent. I do not get the tangerine note but vanilla and tonka bean are more prominent. Scent 7/10 (there are quite a few same type scents nothing unique here.) Sillage 4/10 (more of an intimate scent after 20 min.) Longevity 6/10 (stays for less than 3 hrs on skin.) Value 7/10

reviews.name: aldinatic
reviews.comment: i love this more in late spring and summer time ..i like the vanilla undertone mmm...

title: Fresh Citrus Avon cologne - a fragrance for men 2019
description: Fresh Citrus by Avon is a Citrus fragrance for men. Fresh Citrus was launched in 2019. Top notes are Lemon, Bergamot and Tangerine; middle notes are Cardamom, Rosemary and Clary Sage; base notes are Cedar, Ambroxan and Amberwood. "Avon Scent for Men Fresh Citrus Eau de Toilette is an irresistible fragrance with a unique scent to accompany you all day long." - a note from the brand.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Acqua di Giò Profondo Eau de Toilette
Comme Une Evidence Green for Men

reviews.name: mercury80n
reviews.comment: First ever fragrance very fresh amazing smelling but doesnt last long. Smells like versace eau fraiche or blue seduction

reviews.name: fisken23
reviews.comment: Very fresh, impossible to dislike, dirt cheap. Similar to Versace Man Eau Fraiche and Azzaro Chrome Sport. It doesn’t last that long but if you like citrus scents this is a good buy.

reviews.name: Tom Frag
reviews.comment: its citrus, its fresh, its cheap, but it dont last long.....at all

title: Fresh Citrus & Moss Marks & Spencer perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Fresh Citrus & Moss by Marks & Spencer is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Top note is Lemon; middle notes are Lavender and Sage; base note is Moss.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Beau De Jour Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: Sloth
reviews.comment: Smells nice, very similar to Dior Eau Sauvage EDT. Nice lemon opening and the dry down is nice too. Last ok for the price, I get wafts of it throughout the working day. Anyone claiming only 30 minutes or an hour etc is talking out their niche. Check your nose. Oh, and it doesn’t smell like washing up liquid/cleaning products, they smell like this, there’s a difference. Cleaning products are perfumed to smell nice, like fragrances, but the fragrances came first FFS.

reviews.name: toothdecade
reviews.comment: This is my favourite perfume of all time (so far), super upset they discontinued it. Unlike my other fragrances (bought Monotheme Verbena as an attempt at finding something similar, almost does the trick). I think the mossy undertones pair so elegantly with the fresh spicy lemon. Such a chic fragrance I get compliments whenever I wear it.

reviews.name: bekir1
reviews.comment: The scent is amazing, but just like other Marks & Spencer perfumes, the longevity is almost nonexistent.

reviews.name: omniwhiff
reviews.comment: I use this as a nighttime after-shower scent. The citrus is nice, I wish it had more of a lavender hit, and the moss is too much for me, smells damp.

reviews.name: SpiderMarc
reviews.comment: It’s a HIT!! This really does come close to ADP’s Colonia. Only the performance is poor. For this price though, just spray the hell out of it!! Ha ha ha

reviews.name: Zanerkand
reviews.comment: Another excellent fragrance from M&S. You get a massive lemon wave in the opening which is very pleasant followed by a lavender and oakmoss combo that perfumers know is a winner. Classy and sophisticated; this feels like a classic fragrance. Doesn't last long sadly and there's nothing complicated or new. But you can overspray - no one is going to dislike this or be overwhelmed. Leans masculine but again, anyone can wear anything. Excellent stuff.

reviews.name: A. Fawzy
reviews.comment: Almost identical to Eau Sauvage. Remarkable! Smelled this at M&S here in the UAE and was shocked by the resemblance to Eau Sauvage. I paid only AED 75 for this (about $20). Of course the longevity won’t be good, but I have ES ($135) and the longevity isn’t great either. I hope they don’t discontinue this any time soon.

reviews.name: Jareth
reviews.comment: Exactly like Dior Eau Sauvage, the original not the modern Jonny Depp one. Exceptional oakmoss note. And only £10! Sadly the whole thing is mostly gone within a few hours but so what, as @easterncrescent says, buy ten bottles.

reviews.name: vk0
reviews.comment: I got this as a cheap perfume to take to Crete in the summer when I turned 18, and it was possibly the best trip of my life, so despite this perfume being just above-average I am quite fond of it. It smells like the name would suggest - lots of citrus with an underlying green-ness to it. The first spritz is very refreshing (as expected) and pleasant. I'm currently using it in India to help me feel a bit better in this heat, however it doesn't seem to last more than 15 minutes. Another note on this a few months after initially writing out my thoughts on this perfume: Fresh Citrus and Moss is my personal perfect example of the ability of a perfume to transport you to a specific time and place in your life. I cannot get even the slightest scent of this without instantly being reminded of my days in Crete. It simultaneously reminds me of the stuffiness of the hotel rooms, packed in with 11 friends, and the freedom of open coastal air and the cove off the Kalypso beach in which I'd swim almost daily. Despite using it in India while in Gujurat, my mind still cannot shake this association. There are many other fresh summer perfumes that I believe would be amazing to wear on a holiday similar to this one, but I have a feeling that nostalgia means nothing will ever compare.

reviews.name: Thatbwoy
reviews.comment: This smells like washing up liquid. A basic supermarket brand washing up liquid. Oddly not a Marks ‘n’ Sparks washing up liquid; maybe a Sainsbury’s or Tesco own brand. Cheaply pleasant, affordably pleasant. A simple citrus that you can’t hate and struggle to really like. I don’t think if you wear this you’ll care about this at all

reviews.name: easterncrescent
reviews.comment: This is just an absolutely wonderful clone of the OG fragrance that stands as a pinnacle for all... THE Dior Eau Sauvage. This one is somewhat fleeting (a few hours longevity) and of course cannot quite match this stupendous splendor of the original but it is an admirable attempt and certainly provides significant satisfaction to those of us whe rate Eau Sauvage so highly. The price from Marks and Spencer's is insane so why not by ten bottles if the Dior is your signature.

reviews.name: Finesselemon
reviews.comment: Amazing juicy lemon that lasts 4 hours on cotton clothing with plenty of projection for the first hour. On skin it lasts much shorter, maybe an hour before the heart becomes prominent without any projection at all beyond an intimate circle. Great if you share an office. After that the lavender comes through which is very realistic and exactly like the several bushes of lavender growing in my garden. Pity the oakmoss doesn't compete harder in the final phase. At the current price I will buy a second bottle as you never know with m&s how long this will stay in production.

reviews.name: JasKiew
reviews.comment: Bought a bottle. Smells so much like Dior Eau Sauvage. Very nice very fresh. I thought I also get Abit of Drakkar Noir Vibe.

reviews.name: crazyoney2k
reviews.comment: Has the eau sauvage lemon smell

reviews.name: flosviktoria
reviews.comment: Absolutely agree with klix27a. But to me this fragrance has some kind of vintage vibes, reminds me of Grey Flannel. Also smells like men’s shaving foam a little bit. It doesn’t smell cheap but definitely leans to masculine side.

reviews.name: klix27
reviews.comment: Smells like AdP colonia. To me though it is cheap, it smells expensive. Very lasting with moderate sillage. Unisex but leans masculine. Really a worthy discovery.

reviews.name: prancingponytail
reviews.comment: It's lemon at first for like ten minutes straight. And then it develops into this mossy scent that I was looking for. Doesn't stay that long but for this price it's a steal.

reviews.name: slaeyran
reviews.comment: Smells almost like lemonade and a lush store with a green undertone. Its nice :)

title: Vanilla Citrus Cream The Dua Brand perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Vanilla Citrus Cream by The Dua Brand is a Citrus Gourmand fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Vanilla Citrus Cream was launched in 2025. The fragrance features Chantilly Cream, Vanilla, Caramel, Butter, Sugar, Musk, Milk and Bergamot. Vanilla Citrus Cream by The Dua Brand is a citrus gourmand fragrance built around the contrast between bright bergamot and a rich creamy sweetness. Notes of chantilly cream, caramel, milk, butter, vanilla, musk, and sugar give the composition a soft, dessert-like character with a smooth musky finish.

reviews.name: medeous
reviews.comment: This opens strong with corn chips, followed closely by fruit loops, then whipped cream. Not a fan.

title: Patchouli Citrus The 7 Virtues perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2018
description: Patchouli Citrus by The 7 Virtues is a Chypre Floral fragrance for women and men. Patchouli Citrus was launched in 2018. The nose behind this fragrance is Julie Pluchet. Top notes are Bergamot, Mandarin Orange, Peach, Cassis and Black Pepper; middle notes are Rose Geranium, Peony and Jasmine; base notes are Moss, Patchouli, Cedar, Amber and Sandalwood.

peopleWhoLikeThisAlsoLike.title: Lovefest Burning Cherry | 48 Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: SwampFairy256
reviews.comment: Definitely agree with other reviewers, this is an old-fashioned floral without a lot of citrus. The patchouli, though, is definitely there, and I find it quite unpleasant. It also LINGERS. I scrubbed with soap and water and then used alcohol, and that patchouli is still clinging to me.

reviews.name: peacedeli
reviews.comment: Not a fan on my skin. Very clean/uplifting for the first 20 minutes, but that lovely freshness is quickly overtaken by a bitter herbiness that clashes nauseatingly, rather than harmonizing, with the uplifting citrus notes.

reviews.name: lightresolution
reviews.comment: There's something delightfully old fashioned about this perfume. It's citrusy but heavy with florals after the dry down. I can really smell the jasmine after a while but I am also particularly sensitive to jasmine. If I smell this for too long it does give me a bit of a headache though.

reviews.name: vwgirl123
reviews.comment: They've recently discontinued this, so go grab it from the 7 Virtues site at a discount before its gone. Between this and Blackberry Lily being taken away and them adding another cherry tom ford flanker, I'm really not liking the direction the brand is taking.

reviews.name: Thykes10
reviews.comment: I definitely get the citrus in the opening- don't really get peach. For some reason, peach never sticks out on my skin when testing fragrances though. As it starts to settle, the Peony and Rose/Geranium comes out more. To my nose, this leans feminine and might be slightly unisex. Overall, this is citrus fresh peony but the longevity isn't great on me. I only got 2-3 hours before it became barely detectable as a skin scent.

reviews.name: Thesubtleimpact
reviews.comment: There’s something in here that leaves me so energized. The name does not do justice to this perfume at all. I thought it would be in the same vein as a German cologne— sharp, lemony, and alcohol-esque, but no! After it settles for a few minutes, it becomes the most enriching experience for the human nose. It takes me right out of my melancholy and uplifts my mood! I did not sleep until 4 at night because of the waves of energy this gave me. Sadness no longer! I will be buying a full bottle of this very, very soon. {It smells like a sweet summer peach} Thanks Julie.

reviews.name: DiscoPolga
reviews.comment: I like this - although I can't imagine wearing it myself. It's a nondescript floral with a spicy patchouli edge. Nothing breakthrough, but it's pleasant enough to be enjoyed by many. I wouldn't call it citrus, as I'd say bergamot is the only note that I could detect in the opening - and I'd call it herbal / spicy more than juicy. Worth a try.

reviews.name: Snt_Gulab
reviews.comment: I saw the reviews below and I’m glad I’m not the only one who thinks this has some Chanel Coco mademoiselle DNA in it. It’s definitely the combination of the citrus, rose, and the patchouli. For the record, Chanel uses non fair trade labour, paying pennies for their ingredients. It costs them around $3 to make a bottle. And it’s not economies of scale. It’s exploitation. I have a very strong dislike for Coco mademoiselle but this is the most tolerant same DNA of it that I can handle. I hate… like HATE citruses in perfume. In my culture, we don’t have them at all. It’s something I didn’t grow up with. So the Western fragrances with high citrus content always make me gag. This is the only citrus I’ve ever been able to tolerate with the exception of Musk Therapy from Initio. Probably cause it’s not synthetic. This is still not FBW to me. But if others want a clean and socially conscious brand alternative to the Chanel DNA, this would definitely be your favourite out of the discovery set.

reviews.name: vwgirl123
reviews.comment: I quite like this one. I got the 7 virtues discovery set from sephora and this and Blackberry Lily were my favorites. I'm such a huge fan of the old something citrus with something floral and Patchouli combos. This is a bright "fruit-chouli" that opens with bright bergamont and quickly goes in smelling strongly of Peony and Geranium and Jasmine with the a strong dose of spicy of Patchouli in the background. Peony is my favorite note and if you like Peony perfumes like miss dior edt or chloe but want a more citrusy/summer scent you'll like this. It smells expensive, lasts the whole day, and I'd put it predominately in the refreshing floral scent category. One of my favorite scents of all time. There's a DNA here that reminds me of very classic perfumes like coco mademoiselle. This smells expensive

reviews.name: Lykopa
reviews.comment: The opening smells like something Chanel would make, like old lady expensive. It dries down into a soft fresh geranium with a solid patchouli base. I don’t get too much citrus. It’s just……not appealing to me at all. The floral notes here make me recoil for some reason. And something in my brain is just screaming “musty old lady”.

reviews.name: theonlyht
reviews.comment: The name suggests all - opening is a very fresh citrus scent, and yet not bitter nor synthetic. I'm not typically a big fan of citrus notes, but the geranium and peony notes here really combine well with the citrus, even giving an exotic feel like I'm in a tropical country sipping a glass of mojito. It's very suitable for spring and summer season, and quite a refreshing scent especially during the lockdown.

reviews.name: fyetan
reviews.comment: I didn't read the notes before I sprayed this, and the first whiff I immediately thought "Rose, Geranium". It reminded me of Aerin Wild Geranium... I don't really get the "patchouli" or the "citrus". It reads more floral to me. Longevity and sillage on this are very soft.

reviews.name: Beadvised
reviews.comment: I think this can be worn any season, smells expensive. It smells like something you'd get at Macy's but not as overpowering.

reviews.name: RedLipsReview
reviews.comment: This is a soft patchouli mixed with floral notes. If you are an ANGEL fan, you are not going to like this. The patchouli in ANGEL seems harsh to me. I prefer the stronger, harsher patchouli in male fragrances and in general I am not a big fan of Mugler fragrances. This on the other hand is sweet. Although the perfume is marketed as unisex, I find it feminine. The patchouli starts to turn into rose water in the dry down. I like it.

reviews.name: bigkrl
reviews.comment: Oh my but I have stumbled on my favorite perfume of all time - second, only to their Vetiver Elemi. I can't get enough of this! While I really love patchouli, I feel like it's an undertone of this fragrance and am perfectly happy with the blend. However, the clean, green smells of citrus and amber seem prevalent and I love it!

reviews.name: chance25
reviews.comment: This is a very strong fragrance on and it wears very well. I'm smelling earthy wet moss and a very red thick smelling rose. The citrus and patchouli are nowhere to be found. I've worn it hiking also sitting around the house, grocery shopping and I like it all the same. I'm drawn to it, but at the same time it is a little heavy and that's what is steering me away from a full bottle. I have scents in my collection like Tom Ford White Patchouli that are similar to this. Who knows, I may add it someday, but the one I really like is Vetiver Elemi .

title: Green Citrus Esentu perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Green Citrus by Esentu is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Green Citrus was launched in 2025. Top notes are Lemon Verbena and Bergamot; middle notes are Hedione and Fennel; base notes are Matcha Tea, Woody Notes and Musk. Green Citrus radiates the vibrant freshness and serenity of nature. This creation balances energy and calm, ideal for those seeking an authentic connection with what is essential. Top notes: Lemon Verbena and Bergamot. Heart: Fennel and Hedione. Base: Matcha Tea, Musk and Woody Notes.

title: Scentini Citrus Chill Avon perfume - a fragrance for women 2011
description: Scentini Citrus Chill by Avon is a Citrus fragrance for women. Scentini Citrus Chill was launched in 2011. Top notes are Blood Orange and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Guava, Passion Flower and Apple Blossom; base notes are Musk and Amber. Avon launches Scentini summer cocktails fragrance collection in 2011. Scentini Citrus Chill contains notes of mandarin, red orange, guava leaf, passionflower, apple blossom, amber and transparent musk. The fragrance should be shaken before use, because it is designed as a cocktail of different fragrant layers. Available as 30 ml EDT.

reviews.name: Minted
reviews.comment: I am not a fan of strong citrus perfumes. It was just too much for me.

reviews.name: Moonwalk Memorie
reviews.comment: Blood orange-guava that's also a bit floral. Dries into bright mandarin orange. [I have a mini trio. They're so much fun, but no lasting power at all]

reviews.name: Aina Harryna
reviews.comment: Very refreshing! I love it but not lasting!

reviews.name: kelly.locke.79
reviews.comment: Fun and fruity. Very citrus. Just not for me. Which was surprising as I usually love fruity scents. More blood orange with a musky dry down. Didn't last long

reviews.name: melz.don
reviews.comment: very refreshing.............goes on with an oily feel and then dries down with a semi citrus sweet scent

reviews.name: 4mermaid
reviews.comment: This is the only scentini I dont have. I first smelt them all on the pages. This one reminded me of the airwick airfresher with the oranges on the bottle.

reviews.name: Radchick
reviews.comment: This is mostly bitter orange with the slightest hint of musk. It smells unisex to me. It has no staying power at all on my skin. Within an hour, I can't smell a thing. It's my least favorite of the three in the Scentini line, but it's still subtle and wearable.

reviews.name: Liina
reviews.comment: I love all three Sentini scents and Citrus Chill is the easiest one to wear. It's mostly about sweet citruses but something gives it a soapy feeling. Citrus Chill is suitable for all kind of occations in summer, refreshment in the morning, beach in the daytime and going out in the evening. I like to wear it the most at home in the summer. Somewhat it gives me very homy feeling. I don't know how this works because no citruses grow here where I live. But it works!

reviews.name: mandashell
reviews.comment: Hey CK One Summer 2010, is that you...? O.o If you happen to be familiar with the perfume I just mentioned then you know what to expect of Citrus CHill. They are nearly identical. Anway, I expected Citrus Chill to open with a burst of citrus that is just that...chilling, refreshing, invigorating....? But no, the citrus here is heavy and sweet reminding me an orange that has been left to rot in the sun but covered in sugar. This one also gets an addition of a standard men's cologne. It's kind of funky and masculine so I don't like it. But if you are a fan of the Ck One Summer 2010 then you've found a budget version of it. The CK is superior but I'm not a fan of either one so there you have it. Lasting power is 4hrs+. Fyi, the compostion of this fragrance is extremely oily so I'd advise you not to get it on your clothes!!!

reviews.name: Miss Dior Cherie
reviews.comment: No sera mas de lo mismo como Ice Sheers??????? Parecen casi iguales las 2 colecciones perfectas para el verano

reviews.name: nicolette09
reviews.comment: It's perfect for summertime. When it's really hot outside I just want something fresh and airy, that will make me feel clean. This does that and I love it! It's slightly juicy but in a subtle soapy way and the citrusy part is absolutely yummy and not at all overwhelming. I can smell it for about 3-4 hours, but it's so cheap it's worth it!

title: Grilled Citrus Margarita The Dua Brand perfume - a fragrance for women and men 2022
description: Grilled Citrus Margarita by The Dua Brand is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Grilled Citrus Margarita was launched in 2022. The fragrance features Smoke, Sugar, White Musk, Margarita, Ambroxan, Lemon, Lime and Salt. Grilled Citrus Margarita is an original blend from Dua, presented in an Extrait de Parfum concentration. The fragrance is classified as Citrus and is a unisex scent. The brand has blended the refreshing aroma of citrus fruits with the sophisticated touch of smoke to create this exotic fragrance. The margarita accord adds an addictive quality to the scent, reminiscent of summertime cocktails. This fragrance is a dark and smoky take on the classic cocktail, making it perfect for those looking for a unique and intriguing scent. The notes in Grilled Citrus Margarita include Grilled Lime, Grilled Lemon, Sugar, Salt, Citrus Margarita, Smoke, White Musk, and Ambroxan. The fragrance opens with the effervescent scent of grilled citrus fruits, followed by the sweet notes of sugar and salt. The margarita accord adds a unique twist to the scent, while the smoky accord adds depth and sophistication. The base notes of white musk and ambroxan add a warm and comforting quality to the fragrance. Overall, Grilled Citrus Margarita is an intriguing scent that combines fresh citrus with smoky undertones for a unique olfactory experience.

title: Pura Citrus Areej perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Pura Citrus by Areej is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Pura Citrus was launched in 2025. Top note is Citruses; middle note is Jasmine; base note is Amber.

reviews.name: Lovi Варвара
reviews.comment: Парфюм на любителя. Очень похож на Erba Pura Xerjoff Кто любит арабику и очень стойкий сильный запах- это здесь. Мне нравится, даже очень, только на зиму, обожаю такие сильные душащие парфюмы,что на километр был шлейф. Потрясающий зимний, но не для всех. Может убить все живое вокруг, с осторожностью

title: Linen Citrus Sennok perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Linen Citrus by Sennok is a Floral Fruity fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Linen Citrus was launched in 2025. Top notes are Tangerine, Orange and Lemon; middle notes are Magnolia, Freesia, Rose and Orchid; base notes are Musk and Amber. Linen Citrus is a fresh fragrance combining citrus top notes with floral heart notes and a soft musk base. The composition features zesty citrus elements in the opening, followed by a floral bouquet of freesia, magnolia, orchid, and rose in the middle, with amber and musk providing a subtle, clean finish.

title: Citrusy Kleins Perfumery perfume - a fragrance for women and men
description: Citrusy by Kleins Perfumery is a Citrus fragrance for women and men. The fragrance features Tangerine, Jasmine and Vetiver.

title: Fireside Citrus Wyld Notes perfume - a new fragrance for women and men 2025
description: Fireside Citrus by Wyld Notes is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Fireside Citrus was launched in 2025. Top notes are Mandarin and Bergamot; middle notes are Rosemary and Neroli; base notes are Palo Santo and Sandalwood. Fireside Citrus by Wyld Notes is a unisex fragrance featuring an invigorating blend of citrus and woody elements. The composition opens with bright bergamot and mandarin top notes, transitioning into a heart of neroli and aromatic rosemary. Sandalwood and palo santo form the earthy base accord. As part of Wyld Notes' inaugural collection launched in 2025 through Young Living's sister company, this fragrance emphasizes 100% natural ingredients and sustainability practices including organic alcohol and regenerative farming sources.

reviews.name: Rocky929
reviews.comment: Smells like sipping an old fashioned in a wood-paneled jazz lounge, lounging on a leather chaise. It opens bright and citrusy, with a spicy herbal edge, dry woods, and a subtle smoky, leathery undertone—likely from the styrax. There’s also a soft monastery incense vibe, lifted by the citrus to keep it from feeling too heavy. It’s for the guys who take their whiskey neat while smoking cigars, or the girls who throw a leather moto jacket over a silk charmeuse slip dress. It reminds me of slowly sipping a warm hot toddy while curled up on a velvet couch, writing in a fresh leather-bound journal. Longevity is decent, though not quite as long-lasting as some other Wyld Note scents. Sillage and projection are solid—noticeable but not overpowering. Overall, it’s a well-balanced, sophisticated scent with just the right amount of grit. Definitely one of my favorites from Wyld Notes.

reviews.name: wannabeconnoisseur
reviews.comment: When I first discovered Wyld Notes, this was the fragrance that most intrigued me. Sadly, like most of the offerings, the gorgeously bright opening quickly shifts into muskier, heavier tones that evoke a mature fragrance jive. I do love that opening. Spicy sweet. Crisp. Citrus. Earthy. Stone. Resinous. Rich and deep, but relaxed and casual. A bit rugged. Green, and something about it leans more classically masculine. Slightly floral, softly refreshing. High desert after the rain. But the citruses disappear rapidly, leaving more herbs and earth on my skin. It becomes an offensive and spicy rosemary bomb.

title: White Citrus Bath & Body Works perfume - a fragrance for women 2009
description: White Citrus by Bath & Body Works is a Citrus fragrance for women. White Citrus was launched in 2009. The fragrance features Citruses and Water Lily.

thisPerfumeRemindsMeOf.title: Chance Eau Fraiche Eau de Parfum

reviews.name: sugarplumsophie
reviews.comment: my bf's aunt was so sweet to gift this to me. my bf said I smell like Sprite when I wore this 😅😂

reviews.name: wafflesandsyrup
reviews.comment: It smells like lemon juice. The natural kind. There's absolutely no sweetness in this scent, all you can smell is fresh lemon. Seriously, if you want to have a homemade 1:1 dupe for this scent, squeeze lemon juice into the glass of water and spray yourself with it. You'll smell exactly the same. It's not a bad scent, but too realistic for my taste.

reviews.name: breakfastreason
reviews.comment: This smells like a glass of ice water with a slice of lemon in it. Very beautiful scent, but incredibly subtle. I have to spray this heavily to get scent payoff and I smell nothing after the first hour of wear.

reviews.name: sandallswood
reviews.comment: Sometime in middle school, I got a small bottle of this when it was first released. Bright grapefruit and lemon zest, a little ginger in there somewhere. My mom adored it- said it smelled like Phoenix, AZ at night- back when a lot of what is city now was acres of orange orchards. B+BW shelved the scent for years, so when it reappeared, I was thrilled to revisit it. I don't think its the same now. It's much lighter and less deep, but still very fresh and fun. I spray it before long study or work sessions because it feels energizing. Sillage and Longevity are almost nonexistent, but I still like this scent enough to keep it on my shelf.

reviews.name: PerfuMEOW
reviews.comment: Good air freshener.

reviews.name: perfumelexicon
reviews.comment: The original simple floral citrus scent to 2010s kids. It's just soft and beautiful and reminds me of when perfume was just fun to smell for a moment and forget about. It's not meant to have complex notes or lasting power, its just a nice scent that's fun to smell on yourself after you spray it! Love her!

reviews.name: adeleh
reviews.comment: Strong lemon zest, with a slight tinge of a kinda earthy floral.

reviews.name: LauraBug
reviews.comment: I just recently ordered this and I’m in love! The notes are lemon zest, sparkling grapefruit, ginger flower, freesia petals and clean woods. This is a super refreshing and light grapefruit, citrusy scent! It’s a light, not sharp or screechy grapefruit that is beautifully balanced by the fresh, slightly sweet lemon and very light floral notes and woods notes. It’s not particularly sweet, but is still girly, light, and fresh. I’m going to love this for spring and summer :) I think this would be lovely paired with my Marc Jacobs Daisy Eau So Fresh which also has a grapefruit note but is super sweet.

reviews.name: pattycifra
reviews.comment: The old formula was really nice and fresh. The new reformulated version is different and not as good.

reviews.name: barbieland
reviews.comment: there’s really nothing to write home about with this one, it’s just citrus that fades within twenty minutes. it does go on strong for the first few minutes, though, it always refreshes me and is super nice to put on when just waking up.

reviews.name: ruizlokxs
reviews.comment: fresh, clean citrus scent that you can't go wrong.

reviews.name: suzanne_ronald
reviews.comment: Simple COLD & ZESTY CITRUS. Opens with a burst of cold citrus that leans to white grapefruit. Expanding into the heart, it takes on zesty, watery & floral nuances. Has a refreshing simplicity. Has reminders for me of 4711 Acqua Colonia Lime & Nutmeg, Aqua Allegoria Bergamote Calabria & Light Blue Dolce & Gabbana. Affordable and a beautiful in its simplicity, this has average performance for a light summer wearing experience that can be extended by layering over its matching body lotion. This is the perfect scent to wear on a hot day. Enjoy!

reviews.name: ShadowsofLight
reviews.comment: White Citrus is quite simplistic to my nose, and I'm surprised that there are so many notes listed here. I don't detect half of these at all. I do think this befits it's name, as it does smell quite "white". It's never been orangey to me, but simply a clear (but not bitter) grapefruit, leading into clean white florals, and ending with a laundry musk scent. It only has the faintest hints of spice, but it has never struck me as gingery. It's exceedingly clean, but still has a touch of B&BW's signature sweetness throughout the wear experience. It evokes moods of 4 star hotels/spas, but *specifically* 4 stars and not 3, nor 5...because this is undoubtedly nice, but it isn't expensive smelling. Yet, it's not cheap or junky either. It's refreshing and definitely one for a relieving experience during high heat. It's also a one of those fragrances where I puzzle how anyone could have a strong negative response to, it's just so mass appealing (and unisex) that I feel that it's safe for anything from bedtime to the office 🌞 (Cross posted to other entries.)

title: Fresh Citrus & Vetiver Bespoke London cologne - a new fragrance for men 2024
description: Fresh Citrus & Vetiver by Bespoke London is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance. Fresh Citrus & Vetiver was launched in 2024. Top notes are Ginger, Mandarin, Black Pepper and Apple; middle notes are Clary Sage, Lavender and Vetiver; base notes are Amber, Dry Wood, Musk, Moss and Patchouli.
